papers.title: Seeing Without Eyes: 4D Human-Scene Understanding from Wearable IMUs
papers.abstract: Understanding human activities and their surrounding environments typically relies on visual perception, yet cameras pose persistent challenges in privacy, safety, energy efficiency, and scalability. We explore an alternative: 4D perception without vision. Its goal is to reconstruct human motion and 3D scene layouts purely from everyday wearable sensors. For this we introduce IMU-to-4D, a framework that repurposes large language models for non-visual spatiotemporal understanding of human-scene dynamics. IMU-to-4D uses data from a few inertial sensors from earbuds, watches, or smartphones and predicts detailed 4D human motion together with coarse scene structure. Experiments across diverse human-scene datasets show that IMU-to-4D yields more coherent and temporally stable results than SoTA cascaded pipelines, suggesting wearable motion sensors alone can support rich 4D understanding.

analysis.tldr: 仅用可穿戴IMU传感器，通过大语言模型实现4D人体-场景理解。

papers.title: Context Unrolling in Omni Models
papers.abstract: We present Omni, a unified multimodal model natively trained on diverse modalities, including text, images, videos, 3D geometry, and hidden representations. We find that such training enables Context Unrolling, where the model explicitly reasons across multiple modal representations before producing predictions. This process enables the model to aggregate complementary information across heterogeneous modalities, facilitating a more faithful approximation of the shared multimodal knowledge manifold and improving downstream reasoning fidelity. As a result, Omni achieves strong performance on both multimodal generation and understanding benchmarks, while demonstrating advanced multimodal reasoning capabilities, including in-context generation of text, image, video, and 3D geometry.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一多模态模型Omni，通过原生多模态训练实现上下文展开，提升多模态推理与生成性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有模型通常针对单一或少数模态设计，难以有效融合异构模态的互补信息，限制了多模态推理的忠实度。
analysis.problem: 如何训练一个统一的多模态模型，使其能够原生处理文本、图像、视频、3D几何和隐藏表示，并实现跨模态的显式推理。

analysis.method: 提出Omni模型，采用原生多模态训练策略，在文本、图像、视频、3D几何和隐藏表示等多种模态上联合训练，使模型学会在推理时展开上下文。
contributions: 提出Omni统一多模态模型，原生支持多种模态输入。
发现并命名上下文展开现象，证明其能提升多模态推理的忠实度。
在多模态生成和理解基准上取得强性能，并展示高级多模态推理能力。

papers.title: Vista4D: Video Reshooting with 4D Point Clouds
papers.abstract: We present Vista4D, a robust and flexible video reshooting framework that grounds the input video and target cameras in a 4D point cloud. Specifically, given an input video, our method re-synthesizes the scene with the same dynamics from a different camera trajectory and viewpoint. Existing video reshooting methods often struggle with depth estimation artifacts of real-world dynamic videos, while also failing to preserve content appearance and failing to maintain precise camera control for challenging new trajectories. We build a 4D-grounded point cloud representation with static pixel segmentation and 4D reconstruction to explicitly preserve seen content and provide rich camera signals, and we train with reconstructed multiview dynamic data for robustness against point cloud artifacts during real-world inference. Our results demonstrate improved 4D consistency, camera control, and visual quality compared to state-of-the-art baselines under a variety of videos and camera paths. Moreover, our method generalizes to real-world applications such as dynamic scene expansion and 4D scene recomposition. See our project page for results, code, and models: https://eyeline-labs.github.io/Vista4D

analysis.tldr: Vista4D 通过构建4D点云表示，实现了鲁棒且灵活的动态视频重拍摄，支持新视角和相机轨迹。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频重拍摄方法在处理真实动态视频时存在深度估计伪影、内容外观保持不佳以及相机控制不精确的问题，限制了其实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何从单目动态视频中生成具有新相机轨迹和视角的鲁棒重拍摄结果，同时保持内容一致性和精确相机控制。

papers.title: When Prompts Override Vision: Prompt-Induced Hallucinations in LVLMs
papers.abstract: Despite impressive progress in capabilities of large vision-language models (LVLMs), these systems remain vulnerable to hallucinations, i.e., outputs that are not grounded in the visual input. Prior work has attributed hallucinations in LVLMs to factors such as limitations of the vision backbone or the dominance of the language component, yet the relative importance of these factors remains unclear. To resolve this ambiguity, We propose HalluScope, a benchmark to better understand the extent to which different factors induce hallucinations. Our analysis indicates that hallucinations largely stem from excessive reliance on textual priors and background knowledge, especially information introduced through textual instructions. To mitigate hallucinations induced by textual instruction priors, we propose HalluVL-DPO, a framework for fine-tuning off-the-shelf LVLMs towards more visually grounded responses. HalluVL-DPO leverages preference optimization using a curated training dataset that we construct, guiding the model to prefer grounded responses over hallucinated ones. We demonstrate that our optimized model effectively mitigates the targeted hallucination failure mode, while preserving or improving performance on other hallucination benchmarks and visual capability evaluations. To support reproducibility and further research, we will publicly release our evaluation benchmark, preference training dataset, and code at https://pegah-kh.github.io/projects/prompts-override-vision/ .

analysis.tldr: LVLM中的幻觉主要源于对文本先验的过度依赖，尤其是文本指令引入的信息；提出HalluScope基准和HalluVL-DPO微调框架来缓解。
analysis.research_motivation: LVLM虽性能提升但仍存在幻觉问题，先前工作归因于视觉骨干限制或语言组件主导，但各因素相对重要性不明确，需要系统分析。
analysis.problem: LVLM中幻觉的根源不明确，且缺乏针对文本指令先验诱导幻觉的缓解方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分析表明幻觉主要源于对文本先验和背景知识的过度依赖，尤其是文本指令引入的信息。
analysis.method: 提出HalluScope基准用于分析不同因素诱导幻觉的程度；提出HalluVL-DPO框架，通过偏好优化微调LVLM，使其更倾向于视觉 grounded 的响应。
contributions: 提出HalluScope基准，系统分析LVLM幻觉的根源，揭示文本指令先验的关键作用。
提出HalluVL-DPO微调框架，利用偏好优化缓解文本指令先验诱导的幻觉，同时保持或提升其他性能。

limitations: 可能仅针对文本指令先验诱导的幻觉，对其他类型幻觉效果未知。

papers.title: From Research Question to Scientific Workflow: Leveraging Agentic AI for Science Automation
papers.abstract: Scientific workflow systems automate execution -- scheduling, fault tolerance, resource management -- but not the semantic translation that precedes it. Scientists still manually convert research questions into workflow specifications, a task requiring both domain knowledge and infrastructure expertise. We propose an agentic architecture that closes this gap through three layers: an LLM interprets natural language into structured intents (semantic layer); validated generators produce reproducible workflow DAGs (deterministic layer); and domain experts author ``Skills'': markdown documents encoding vocabulary mappings, parameter constraints, and optimization strategies (knowledge layer). This decomposition confines LLM non-determinism to intent extraction: identical intents always yield identical workflows. We implement and evaluate the architecture on the 1000 Genomes population genetics workflow and Hyperflow WMS running on Kubernetes. In an ablation study on 150 queries, Skills raise full-match intent accuracy from 44% to 83%; skill-driven deferred workflow generation reduces data transfer by 92\%; and the end-to-end pipeline completes queries on Kubernetes with LLM overhead below 15 seconds and cost under $0.001 per query.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种三层智能体架构，将自然语言研究问题自动转化为可复现的科学工作流，在1000 Genomes流程上验证了准确率和效率提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有科学工作流系统自动化了执行调度、容错和资源管理，但无法自动完成从研究问题到工作流规范的语义转换，科学家仍需手动进行这一需要领域知识和基础设施专长的任务。
analysis.problem: 如何将自然语言描述的研究问题自动、可靠地转化为可执行且可复现的科学工作流。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出三层智能体架构：语义层（LLM将自然语言解释为结构化意图）、确定性层（验证过的生成器产生可复现的工作流DAG）、知识层（领域专家编写'技能'文档，编码词汇映射、参数约束和优化策略）。该分解将LLM的非确定性限制在意图提取阶段，相同意图总是产生相同工作流。
contributions: 提出一种将LLM非确定性限制在意图提取阶段的智能体架构，确保相同意图生成相同工作流。
引入'技能'知识层，通过领域专家编写的Markdown文档编码词汇映射、参数约束和优化策略。
在1000 Genomes群体遗传学工作流和Kubernetes上的Hyperflow WMS上实现并评估，150个查询的消融实验显示技能将完全匹配意图准确率从44%提升至83%，数据转移减少92%，端到端延迟低于15秒，成本低于$0.001/查询。
analysis.experiments: 在1000 Genomes群体遗传学工作流和Kubernetes上的Hyperflow WMS上评估。消融实验使用150个查询，技能将完全匹配意图准确率从44%提升至83%，技能驱动的延迟工作流生成减少92%数据转移，端到端管道在Kubernetes上完成查询，LLM开销低于15秒，成本低于$0.001/查询。
limitations: 可能依赖特定领域专家编写和维护'技能'文档，扩展性受限。

papers.title: Directional Confusions Reveal Divergent Inductive Biases Through Rate-Distortion Geometry in Human and Machine Vision
papers.abstract: Humans and modern vision models can reach similar classification accuracy while making systematically different kinds of mistakes - differing not in how often they err, but in who gets mistaken for whom, and in which direction. We show that these directional confusions reveal distinct inductive biases that are invisible to accuracy alone. Using matched human and deep vision model responses on a natural-image categorization task under 12 perturbation types, we quantify asymmetry in confusion matrices and link it to generalization geometry through a Rate-Distortion (RD) framework, summarized by three geometric signatures (slope (beta), curvature (kappa)) and efficiency (AUC). We find that humans exhibit broad but weak asymmetries, whereas deep vision models show sparser, stronger directional collapses. Robustness training reduces global asymmetry but fails to recover the human-like breadth-strength profile of graded similarity. Mechanistic simulations further show that different asymmetry organizations shift the RD frontier in opposite directions, even when matched for performance. Together, these results position directional confusions and RD geometry as compact, interpretable signatures of inductive bias under distribution shift.

analysis.tldr: 通过方向性混淆和率失真几何揭示人类与机器视觉中不同的归纳偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类和视觉模型在分类准确率相近时，错误模式却存在系统性差异，但传统准确率指标无法捕捉这些差异，需要新的分析工具来揭示归纳偏差。
analysis.problem: 如何量化并解释人类与深度视觉模型在分类混淆方向上的不对称性及其背后的归纳偏差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人类表现出广泛但弱的不对称性，而深度视觉模型表现出稀疏但强的方向性坍塌；鲁棒性训练减少全局不对称性，但无法恢复人类式的广度-强度轮廓。
analysis.method: 利用率失真（Rate-Distortion）框架，通过三个几何特征（斜率β、曲率κ和效率AUC）量化混淆矩阵的不对称性，并结合机制模拟分析不同不对称组织对RD前沿的影响。
contributions: 提出方向性混淆作为揭示归纳偏差的新指标，超越准确率。
将率失真几何应用于人类与机器视觉比较，提供紧凑可解释的偏差特征。
analysis.experiments: 在12种扰动类型下的自然图像分类任务中，匹配人类和深度视觉模型响应，量化混淆矩阵不对称性并分析RD几何特征。
limitations: 仅针对特定分类任务和扰动类型，泛化性需验证。
机制模拟可能简化了真实神经网络的复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合认知科学与机器学习，但实验规模有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过方向性混淆和率失真几何揭示人类与机器视觉中不同的归纳偏差。

papers.title: UniGenDet: A Unified Generative-Discriminative Framework for Co-Evolutionary Image Generation and Generated Image Detection
papers.abstract: In recent years, significant progress has been made in both image generation and generated image detection. Despite their rapid, yet largely independent, development, these two fields have evolved distinct architectural paradigms: the former predominantly relies on generative networks, while the latter favors discriminative frameworks. A recent trend in both domains is the use of adversarial information to enhance performance, revealing potential for synergy. However, the significant architectural divergence between them presents considerable challenges. Departing from previous approaches, we propose UniGenDet: a Unified generative-discriminative framework for co-evolutionary image Generation and generated image Detection. To bridge the task gap, we design a symbiotic multimodal self-attention mechanism and a unified fine-tuning algorithm. This synergy allows the generation task to improve the interpretability of authenticity identification, while authenticity criteria guide the creation of higher-fidelity images. Furthermore, we introduce a detector-informed generative alignment mechanism to facilitate seamless information exchange. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance. Code: \href{https://github.com/Zhangyr2022/UniGenDet}{https://github.com/Zhangyr2022/UniGenDet}.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一生成-判别框架UniGenDet，通过共生多模态自注意力和统一微调算法，实现图像生成与检测的协同进化。
analysis.research_motivation: 图像生成和检测领域各自独立发展，架构差异大，但对抗信息的使用表明两者存在协同潜力，亟需统一框架以相互促进。
analysis.problem: 如何弥合生成网络与判别网络之间的架构鸿沟，实现图像生成与检测任务的协同进化。

contributions: 提出首个统一生成-判别框架UniGenDet，实现图像生成与检测的协同进化。

引入检测器引导的生成对齐机制，促进信息无缝交换。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一生成-判别框架UniGenDet，通过共生多模态自注意力和统一微调算法，实现图像生成与检测的协同进化。

papers.title: A Scale-Adaptive Framework for Joint Spatiotemporal Super-Resolution with Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Deep-learning video super-resolution has progressed rapidly, but climate applications typically super-resolve (increase resolution) either space or time, and joint spatiotemporal models are often designed for a single pair of super-resolution (SR) factors (upscaling spatial and temporal ratio between the low-resolution sequence and the high-resolution sequence), limiting transfer across spatial resolutions and temporal cadences (frame rates). We present a scale-adaptive framework that reuses the same architecture across factors by decomposing spatiotemporal SR into a deterministic prediction of the conditional mean, with attention, and a residual conditional diffusion model, with an optional mass-conservation (same precipitation amount in inputs and outputs) transform to preserve aggregated totals. Assuming that larger SR factors primarily increase underdetermination (hence required context and residual uncertainty) rather than changing the conditional-mean structure, scale adaptivity is achieved by retuning three factor-dependent hyperparameters before retraining: the diffusion noise schedule amplitude beta (larger for larger factors to increase diversity), the temporal context length L (set to maintain comparable attention horizons across cadences) and optionally a third, the mass-conservation function f (tapered to limit the amplification of extremes for large factors). Demonstrated on reanalysis precipitation over France (Comephore), the same architecture spans super-resolution factors from 1 to 25 in space and 1 to 6 in time, yielding a reusable architecture and tuning recipe for joint spatiotemporal super-resolution across scales.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种尺度自适应框架，通过分解时空超分辨率为确定性预测和残差扩散模型，并调整三个超参数实现跨尺度复用。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频超分辨率方法通常只处理空间或时间单一维度，且联合时空模型针对固定超分因子设计，难以在不同空间分辨率和时间帧率间迁移，限制了在气候等领域的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个可跨不同时空超分因子复用的联合时空超分辨率框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要假设：较大超分因子主要增加欠定性（需要更多上下文和残差不确定性），而非改变条件均值结构。
analysis.method: 将时空超分辨率分解为确定性条件均值预测（带注意力）和残差条件扩散模型，通过调整三个因子相关超参数（扩散噪声调度幅度、时间上下文长度、质量守恒函数）实现尺度自适应。
contributions: 提出尺度自适应框架，通过分解和超参数调整实现跨时空超分因子的架构复用。
引入可选的保质量变换以保持聚合总量。
在法国降水再分析数据上展示从1到25空间因子和1到6时间因子的统一架构。
analysis.experiments: 在法国降水再分析数据集（Comephore）上验证，覆盖空间因子1-25和时间因子1-6。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅在单一降水数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
超参数调整可能依赖特定任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法有创新性，但实验仅限单一数据集，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种尺度自适应框架，通过分解时空超分辨率为确定性预测和残差扩散模型，并调整三个超参数实现跨尺度复用。

papers.title: GiVA: Gradient-Informed Bases for Vector-Based Adaptation
papers.abstract: As model sizes continue to grow, parameter-efficient fine-tuning has emerged as a powerful alternative to full fine-tuning. While LoRA is widely adopted among these methods, recent research has explored vector-based adaptation methods due to their extreme parameter efficiency. However, these methods typically require substantially higher ranks than LoRA to match its performance, leading to increased training costs. This work introduces GiVA, a gradient-based initialization strategy for vector-based adaptation. It achieves training times comparable to LoRA and maintains the extreme parameter efficiency of vector-based adaptation. We evaluate GiVA across diverse benchmarks, including natural language understanding, natural language generation, and image classification. Experiments show that our approach consistently outperforms or achieves performance competitive with existing vector-based adaptation methods and LoRA while reducing rank requirements by a factor of eight ($8\times$).

analysis.tldr: GiVA通过梯度信息初始化向量基，使向量式微调方法在极低参数量下达到与LoRA相当的性能，并将所需秩降低8倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 大模型参数持续增长，参数高效微调成为重要替代方案。LoRA广泛使用，但向量式方法虽参数效率极高，却需要更高秩才能匹配LoRA性能，导致训练成本增加。
analysis.problem: 向量式微调方法需要较高秩才能达到与LoRA相当的性能，导致训练成本增加。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 向量式方法参数效率极高，但需要更高秩才能匹配LoRA性能。
analysis.method: 提出GiVA，一种基于梯度信息的初始化策略，为向量式微调方法提供更好的初始基向量。
contributions: 提出GiVA梯度初始化策略，使向量式微调方法在极低参数量下达到与LoRA相当的性能。
将所需秩降低8倍，同时保持训练时间与LoRA相当。
analysis.experiments: 在自然语言理解、自然语言生成和图像分类等多个基准上评估，GiVA一致优于或达到与现有向量式方法和LoRA竞争的性能。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的向量式微调方法。
梯度信息计算可能引入额外开销。

papers.title: Nemobot Games: Crafting Strategic AI Gaming Agents for Interactive Learning with Large Language Models
papers.abstract: This paper introduces a new paradigm for AI game programming, leveraging large language models (LLMs) to extend and operationalize Claude Shannon's taxonomy of game-playing machines. Central to this paradigm is Nemobot, an interactive agentic engineering environment that enables users to create, customize, and deploy LLM-powered game agents while actively engaging with AI-driven strategies. The LLM-based chatbot, integrated within Nemobot, demonstrates its capabilities across four distinct classes of games. For dictionary-based games, it compresses state-action mappings into efficient, generalized models for rapid adaptability. In rigorously solvable games, it employs mathematical reasoning to compute optimal strategies and generates human-readable explanations for its decisions. For heuristic-based games, it synthesizes strategies by combining insights from classical minimax algorithms (see, e.g., shannon1950chess) with crowd-sourced data. Finally, in learning-based games, it utilizes reinforcement learning with human feedback and self-critique to iteratively refine strategies through trial-and-error and imitation learning. Nemobot amplifies this framework by offering a programmable environment where users can experiment with tool-augmented generation and fine-tuning of strategic game agents. From strategic games to role-playing games, Nemobot demonstrates how AI agents can achieve a form of self-programming by integrating crowdsourced learning and human creativity to iteratively refine their own logic. This represents a step toward the long-term goal of self-programming AI.

analysis.tldr: 提出Nemobot框架，利用LLM创建可定制、自编程的AI游戏代理，覆盖四类游戏策略。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统AI游戏编程依赖手工规则或特定算法，缺乏灵活性和可扩展性；LLM的推理和生成能力为构建自适应、可交互的游戏代理提供了新可能。

papers.title: A Multi-Stage Warm-Start Deep Learning Framework for Unit Commitment
papers.abstract: Maintaining instantaneous balance between electricity supply and demand is critical for reliability and grid instability. System operators achieve this through solving the task of Unit Commitment (UC),ca high dimensional large-scale Mixed-integer Linear Programming (MILP) problem that is strictly and heavily governed by the grid physical constraints. As grid integrate variable renewable sources, and new technologies such as long duration storage in the grid, UC must be optimally solved for multi-day horizons and potentially with greater frequency. Therefore, traditional MILP solvers increasingly struggle to compute solutions within these tightening operational time limits. To bypass these computational bottlenecks, this paper proposes a novel framework utilizing a transformer-based architecture to predict generator commitment schedules over a 72-hour horizon. Also, because raw predictions in highly dimensional spaces often yield physically infeasible results, the pipeline integrates the self-attention network with deterministic post-processing heuristics that systematically enforce minimum up/down times and minimize excess capacity. Finally, these refined predictions are utilized as a warm start for a downstream MILP solver, while employing a confidence-based variable fixation strategy to drastically reduce the combinatorial search space. Validated on a single-bus test system, the complete multi-stage pipeline achieves 100\% feasibility and significantly accelerates computation times. Notably, in approximately 20\% of test instances, the proposed model reached a feasible operational schedule with a lower overall system cost than relying solely on the solver.

analysis.tldr: 提出多阶段深度学习框架，用Transformer预测机组启停计划并作为MILP求解器的热启动，显著加速电力系统机组组合问题求解。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着可再生能源和长时储能并入电网，机组组合（UC）问题需在更短操作时限内求解高维混合整数线性规划（MILP），传统求解器计算瓶颈日益突出。
analysis.problem: 如何在大规模、强约束的UC问题中，在保证可行性的前提下显著加速求解过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 原始Transformer预测在高维空间中常产生物理不可行结果，需结合后处理启发式方法强制满足最小启停时间等约束。
analysis.method: 多阶段框架：Transformer预测72小时机组启停计划 → 确定性后处理启发式（强制最小启停时间、最小化过剩容量） → 基于置信度的变量固定策略 → 作为热启动输入下游MILP求解器。
contributions: 提出Transformer与后处理启发式结合的UC预测框架，保证100%可行性。
设计置信度变量固定策略，大幅缩减MILP搜索空间，加速求解。
在单总线测试系统上验证，约20%实例中热启动方案总成本低于纯求解器方案。
analysis.experiments: 在单总线测试系统上验证，多阶段管道实现100%可行性并显著加速计算时间，约20%测试实例中热启动方案总成本更低。
limitations: 仅在单总线系统上验证，未在多节点或实际电网中测试。
后处理启发式可能无法处理更复杂的约束（如爬坡约束、网络潮流）。

papers.title: TingIS: Real-time Risk Event Discovery from Noisy Customer Incidents at Enterprise Scale
papers.abstract: Real-time detection and mitigation of technical anomalies are critical for large-scale cloud-native services, where even minutes of downtime can result in massive financial losses and diminished user trust. While customer incidents serve as a vital signal for discovering risks missed by monitoring, extracting actionable intelligence from this data remains challenging due to extreme noise, high throughput, and semantic complexity of diverse business lines. In this paper, we present TingIS, an end-to-end system designed for enterprise-grade incident discovery. At the core of TingIS is a multi-stage event linking engine that synergizes efficient indexing techniques with Large Language Models (LLMs) to make informed decisions on event merging, enabling the stable extraction of actionable incidents from just a handful of diverse user descriptions. This engine is complemented by a cascaded routing mechanism for precise business attribution and a multi-dimensional noise reduction pipeline that integrates domain knowledge, statistical patterns, and behavioral filtering. Deployed in a production environment handling a peak throughput of over 2,000 messages per minute and 300,000 messages per day, TingIS achieves a P90 alert latency of 3.5 minutes and a 95\% discovery rate for high-priority incidents. Benchmarks constructed from real-world data demonstrate that TingIS significantly outperforms baseline methods in routing accuracy, clustering quality, and Signal-to-Noise Ratio.

analysis.tldr: TingIS 是一个企业级实时风险事件发现系统，利用多阶段事件链接引擎和 LLM 从嘈杂的客户事件中提取可操作事件。

设计多阶段事件链接引擎，结合索引和 LLM 实现稳定事件提取。

papers.title: A Multimodal Text- and Graph-Based Approach for Open-Domain Event Extraction from Documents
papers.abstract: Event extraction is essential for event understanding and analysis. It supports tasks such as document summarization and decision-making in emergency scenarios. However, existing event extraction approaches have limitations: (1) closed-domain algorithms are restricted to predefined event types and thus rarely generalize to unseen types and (2) open-domain event extraction algorithms, capable of handling unconstrained event types, have largely overlooked the potential of large language models (LLMs) despite their advanced abilities. Additionally, they do not explicitly model document-level contextual, structural, and semantic reasoning, which are crucial for effective event extraction but remain challenging for LLMs due to lost-in-the-middle phenomenon and attention dilution. To address these limitations, we propose multimodal open-domain event extraction, MODEE , a novel approach for open-domain event extraction that combines graph-based learning with text-based representation from LLMs to model document-level reasoning. Empirical evaluations on large datasets demonstrate that MODEE outperforms state-of-the-art open-domain event extraction approaches and can be generalized to closed-domain event extraction, where it outperforms existing algorithms.

analysis.tldr: 提出结合图学习与LLM文本表示的多模态开放域事件抽取方法MODEE，在开放域和封闭域事件抽取上均超越现有方法。

papers.title: Addressing Image Authenticity When Cameras Use Generative AI
papers.abstract: The ability of generative AI (GenAI) methods to photorealistically alter camera images has raised awareness about the authenticity of images shared online. Interestingly, images captured directly by our cameras are considered authentic and faithful. However, with the increasing integration of deep-learning modules into cameras' capture-time hardware -- namely, the image signal processor (ISP) -- there is now a potential for hallucinated content in images directly output by our cameras. Hallucinated capture-time image content is typically benign, such as enhanced edges or texture, but in certain operations, such as AI-based digital zoom or low-light image enhancement, hallucinations can potentially alter the semantics and interpretation of the image content. As a result, users may not realize that the content in their camera images is not authentic. This paper addresses this issue by enabling users to recover the 'unhallucinated' version of the camera image to avoid misinterpretation of the image content. Our approach works by optimizing an image-specific multi-layer perceptron (MLP) decoder together with a modality-specific encoder so that, given the camera image, we can recover the image before hallucinated content was added. The encoder and MLP are self-contained and can be applied post-capture to the image without requiring access to the camera ISP. Moreover, the encoder and MLP decoder require only 180 KB of storage and can be readily saved as metadata within standard image formats such as JPEG and HEIC.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种方法，从相机图像中去除生成式AI带来的幻觉内容，恢复真实版本。
analysis.research_motivation: 相机中集成生成式AI模块（如AI数字变焦、低光增强）可能导致输出图像包含幻觉内容，用户可能误以为图像内容完全真实，引发真实性担忧。

papers.title: Grounding Video Reasoning in Physical Signals
papers.abstract: Physical video understanding requires more than naming an event correctly. A model can answer a question about pouring, sliding, or collision from textual regularities while still failing to localize the event in time or space. We introduce a grounded benchmark for physical video understanding that extends the what--when--where evaluation structure of V-STaR to four video sources, six physics domains, three prompt families (physics, vstar_like, and neutral_rstr), and four input conditions (original, shuffled, ablated, and frame-masked). The benchmark contains 1,560 base video clips from SSV2, YouCook2, HoloAssist, and Roundabout-TAU. Each clip is first converted into a shared grounded event record, and the three query families are derived from that record. Temporal and spatial targets are shared across prompt families, while the non-physics families use deterministic family-appropriate semantic a_what targets derived from the same record. Across models and prompt families, physics remains the strongest regime overall, vstar_like is the clearest non-physics semantic comparison, and neutral_rstr behaves as a harder templated control. Prompt-family robustness is selective rather than universal, perturbation gains cluster in weak original cases, and spatial grounding is the weakest across settings. These results suggest that video Q&A reasoning benchmarks shall report physically grounded, prompt-aware, and perturbation-aware diagnostics alongside aggregate accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个物理视频理解基准，评估模型在时间、空间和物理信号上的接地能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频问答基准主要依赖文本规律，模型可能正确回答但无法定位事件的时间或空间，缺乏对物理理解的严格评估。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够评估视频模型在物理信号（时间、空间、物理域）上接地能力的基准。

contributions: 提出了一个物理视频理解基准，包含多源、多域、多提示族和多输入条件。

papers.title: Replay-buffer engineering for noise-robust quantum circuit optimization
papers.abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (RL) for quantum circuit optimization faces three fundamental bottlenecks: replay buffers that ignore the reliability of temporal-difference (TD) targets, curriculum-based architecture search that triggers a full quantum-classical evaluation at every environment step, and the routine discard of noiseless trajectories when retraining under hardware noise. We address all three by treating the replay buffer as a primary algorithmic lever for quantum optimization. We introduce ReaPER$+$, an annealed replay rule that transitions from TD error-driven prioritization early in training to reliability-aware sampling as value estimates mature, achieving $4-32\times$ gains in sample efficiency over fixed PER, ReaPER, and uniform replay while consistently discovering more compact circuits across quantum compilation and QAS benchmarks; validation on LunarLander-v3 confirms the principle is domain-agnostic. Furthermore we eliminate the quantum-classical evaluation bottleneck in curriculum RL by introducing OptCRLQAS which amortizes expensive evaluations over multiple architectural edits, cutting wall-clock time per episode by up to $67.5\%$ on a 12-qubit optimization problem without degrading solution quality. Finally we introduce a lightweight replay-buffer transfer scheme that warm-starts noisy-setting learning by reusing noiseless trajectories, without network-weight transfer or $ε$-greedy pretraining. This reduces steps to chemical accuracy by up to $85-90\%$ and final energy error by up to $90\%$ over from-scratch baselines on 6-, 8-, and 12-qubit molecular tasks. Together, these results establish that experience storage, sampling, and transfer are decisive levers for scalable, noise-robust quantum circuit optimization.

analysis.tldr: 通过重放缓冲区的工程化设计（采样规则、评估加速、轨迹迁移）显著提升量子电路优化的样本效率和噪声鲁棒性。

papers.title: Transient Turn Injection: Exposing Stateless Multi-Turn Vulnerabilities in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into sensitive workflows, raising the stakes for adversarial robustness and safety. This paper introduces Transient Turn Injection(TTI), a new multi-turn attack technique that systematically exploits stateless moderation by distributing adversarial intent across isolated interactions. TTI leverages automated attacker agents powered by large language models to iteratively test and evade policy enforcement in both commercial and open-source LLMs, marking a departure from conventional jailbreak approaches that typically depend on maintaining persistent conversational context. Our extensive evaluation across state-of-the-art models-including those from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, Meta, and prominent open-source alternatives-uncovers significant variations in resilience to TTI attacks, with only select architectures exhibiting substantial inherent robustness. Our automated blackbox evaluation framework also uncovers previously unknown model specific vulnerabilities and attack surface patterns, especially within medical and high stakes domains. We further compare TTI against established adversarial prompting methods and detail practical mitigation strategies, such as session level context aggregation and deep alignment approaches. Our study underscores the urgent need for holistic, context aware defenses and continuous adversarial testing to future proof LLM deployments against evolving multi-turn threats.

analysis.tldr: 提出瞬态轮次注入（TTI）攻击，利用无状态审核在多轮对话中分布恶意意图，暴露LLM安全漏洞。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM被集成到敏感工作流中，对抗鲁棒性和安全性至关重要，现有越狱方法依赖持久对话上下文，无法应对无状态多轮攻击。
analysis.problem: 现有LLM安全机制无法防御跨隔离交互分布恶意意图的多轮攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同模型对TTI攻击的鲁棒性差异显著，仅少数架构具有内在鲁棒性；在医疗等高危领域发现未知漏洞和攻击面模式。
analysis.method: TTI：利用LLM驱动的自动攻击代理，在无状态隔离交互中迭代测试和规避策略执行，无需维持对话上下文。
contributions: 提出TTI攻击技术，系统性地利用无状态审核在多轮对话中分布恶意意图。
构建自动化黑盒评估框架，发现模型特定漏洞和高危领域攻击模式。
与现有对抗提示方法对比，提出会话级上下文聚合和深度对齐等缓解策略。
analysis.experiments: 在OpenAI、Anthropic、Google Gemini、Meta及开源模型上进行广泛评估，发现鲁棒性差异和未知漏洞。
limitations: 可能仅适用于无状态审核场景，有状态审核可能防御部分攻击。
缓解策略的有效性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 提出新颖的多轮攻击方法，实验覆盖主流模型，对LLM安全有重要启示，但技术细节和缓解策略需进一步验证。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出瞬态轮次注入（TTI）攻击，利用无状态审核在多轮对话中分布恶意意图，暴露LLM安全漏洞。

papers.title: Bounding the Black Box: A Statistical Certification Framework for AI Risk Regulation
papers.abstract: Artificial intelligence now decides who receives a loan, who is flagged for criminal investigation, and whether an autonomous vehicle brakes in time. Governments have responded: the EU AI Act, the NIST Risk Management Framework, and the Council of Europe Convention all demand that high-risk systems demonstrate safety before deployment. Yet beneath this regulatory consensus lies a critical vacuum: none specifies what ``acceptable risk'' means in quantitative terms, and none provides a technical method for verifying that a deployed system actually meets such a threshold. The regulatory architecture is in place; the verification instrument is not. This gap is not theoretical. As the EU AI Act moves into full enforcement, developers face mandatory conformity assessments without established methodologies for producing quantitative safety evidence - and the systems most in need of oversight are opaque statistical inference engines that resist white-box scrutiny. This paper provides the missing instrument. Drawing on the aviation certification paradigm, we propose a two-stage framework that transforms AI risk regulation into engineering practice. In Stage One, a competent authority formally fixes an acceptable failure probability $δ$ and an operational input domain $\varepsilon$ - a normative act with direct civil liability implications. In Stage Two, the RoMA and gRoMA statistical verification tools compute a definitive, auditable upper bound on the system's true failure rate, requiring no access to model internals and scaling to arbitrary architectures. We demonstrate how this certificate satisfies existing regulatory obligations, shifts accountability upstream to developers, and integrates with the legal frameworks that exist today.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个两阶段统计认证框架，将AI风险监管转化为可量化的工程实践。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI法规（如EU AI Act）要求高风险系统证明安全性，但缺乏量化'可接受风险'的技术方法和验证工具，导致监管存在关键空白。
analysis.problem: 如何为高风险AI系统提供可审计、可量化的安全认证方法，使其满足监管要求且不依赖模型内部结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：阶段一由监管机构设定可接受故障概率δ和操作输入域ε；阶段二使用RoMA和gRoMA统计验证工具计算系统真实故障率的可审计上界，无需访问模型内部。
contributions: 提出将航空认证范式迁移至AI风险监管的两阶段框架
开发RoMA和gRoMA统计验证工具，可扩展至任意架构且无需白盒访问
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架依赖监管机构合理设定δ和ε，实际中可能面临争议
统计上界可能过于保守，导致过度拒绝安全系统

analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，直接回应EU AI Act等监管需求，但缺乏实验验证，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个两阶段统计认证框架，将AI风险监管转化为可量化的工程实践。

papers.title: TraceScope: Interactive URL Triage via Decoupled Checklist Adjudication
papers.abstract: Modern phishing campaigns increasingly evade snapshot-based URL classifiers using interaction gates (e.g., checkbox/slider challenges), delayed content rendering, and logo-less credential harvesters. This shifts URL triage from static classification toward an interactive forensics task: an analyst must actively navigate the page while isolating themselves from potential runtime exploits. We present TraceScope, a decoupled triage pipeline that operationalizes this workflow at scale. To prevent the observer effect and ensure safety, a sandboxed operator agent drives a real GUI browser guided by visual motivation to elicit page behavior, freezing the session into an immutable evidence bundle. Separately, an adjudicator agent circumvents LLM context limitations by querying evidence on demand to verify a MITRE ATT&CK checklist, and generates an audit-ready report with extracted indicators of compromise (IOCs) and a final verdict. Evaluated on 708 reachable URLs from existing dataset (241 verified phishing from PhishTank and 467 benign from Tranco-derived crawling), TraceScope achieves 0.94 precision and 0.78 recall, substantially improving recall over three prior visual/reference-based classifiers while producing reproducible, analyst-grade evidence suitable for review. More importantly, we manually curated a dataset of real-world phishing emails to evaluate our system in a practical setting. Our evaluation reveals that TraceScope demonstrates superior performance in a real-world scenario as well, successfully detecting sophisticated phishing attempts that current state-of-the-art defenses fail to identify.

analysis.tldr: TraceScope 通过解耦的检查表裁决流水线，实现交互式 URL 分类，有效检测绕过静态分类器的复杂钓鱼攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代钓鱼攻击利用交互门控、延迟渲染和无 logo 凭证收集器，绕过基于快照的 URL 分类器，使得 URL 分类从静态任务转变为交互式取证任务，但现有方法缺乏安全、可扩展的自动化流程。
analysis.problem: 如何安全且大规模地执行交互式 URL 分类，以检测复杂钓鱼页面，同时避免观察者效应和运行时漏洞风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 TraceScope，包含沙箱化操作代理驱动真实 GUI 浏览器，基于视觉动机引导页面行为，冻结会话为不可变证据包；然后裁决代理按需查询证据，验证 MITRE ATT&CK 检查表，生成包含 IOC 和最终裁决的审计报告。
contributions: 提出解耦的交互式 URL 分类流水线，分离操作与裁决，确保安全性和可扩展性。
在 708 个 URL 数据集上达到 0.94 精度和 0.78 召回率，显著优于三个先前方法。
手动整理真实钓鱼邮件数据集，验证系统在实战场景中的优越性，能检测现有防御失败的高级攻击。
analysis.experiments: 在 708 个 URL（241 个钓鱼，467 个良性）上评估，精度 0.94，召回 0.78；并在手动整理的真实钓鱼邮件数据集上验证，检测出当前最先进防御无法识别的攻击。
limitations: 可能依赖浏览器沙箱的隔离能力，存在潜在逃逸风险。
数据集规模有限，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新，实验充分，但主题与核心方向（VLM/视频生成等）关联较弱，适合安全领域读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TraceScope 通过解耦的检查表裁决流水线，实现交互式 URL 分类，有效检测绕过静态分类器的复杂钓鱼攻击。

papers.title: Modulating Cross-Modal Convergence with Single-Stimulus, Intra-Modal Dispersion
papers.abstract: Neural networks exhibit a remarkable degree of representational convergence across diverse architectures, training objectives, and even data modalities. This convergence is predictive of alignment with brain representation. A recent hypothesis suggests this arises from learning the underlying structure in the environment in similar ways. However, it is unclear how individual stimuli elicit convergent representations across networks. An image can be perceived in multiple ways and expressed differently using words. Here, we introduce a methodology based on the Generalized Procrustes Algorithm to measure intra-modal representational convergence at the single-stimulus level. We applied this to vision models with distinct training objectives, selecting stimuli based on their degree of alignment (intra-modal dispersion). Crucially, we found that this intra-modal dispersion strongly modulates alignment between vision and language models (cross-modal convergence). Specifically, stimuli with low intra-modal dispersion (high agreement among vision models) elicited significantly higher cross-modal alignment than those with high dispersion, by up to a factor of two (e.g., in pairings of DINOv2 with language models). This effect was robust to stimulus selection criteria and generalized across different pairings of vision and language models. Measuring convergence at the single-stimulus level provides a path toward understanding the sources of convergence and divergence across modalities, and between neural networks and human neural representations.

analysis.tldr: 单刺激层内的表征分散度强烈调节视觉与语言模型之间的跨模态对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经网络在不同架构、训练目标和数据模态间表现出显著的表征收敛，且与大脑表征对齐相关，但单个刺激如何引发跨网络收敛尚不清楚。
analysis.problem: 如何量化单个刺激在视觉模型中的表征收敛程度，并探究其对跨模态对齐的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现：视觉模型间一致性高的刺激（低模态内分散）能显著提升与语言模型的跨模态对齐，效果可达两倍；该效应在多种模型配对和选择标准下稳健。
analysis.method: 基于广义普鲁克算法测量单刺激水平的模态内表征分散度，并据此选择刺激，分析其与跨模态对齐的关系。
contributions: 提出单刺激水平上测量模态内表征收敛的方法。
发现模态内分散度是跨模态对齐的关键调节因素。
analysis.experiments: 在多种视觉模型（如DINOv2）与语言模型配对中验证，使用不同刺激选择标准，结果稳健。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅涉及视觉与语言模态，未扩展到其他模态。
未深入解释分散度调节跨模态对齐的机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，与神经科学和跨模态对齐相关，但实验细节有限，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 单刺激层内的表征分散度强烈调节视觉与语言模型之间的跨模态对齐。

papers.title: Alignment has a Fantasia Problem
papers.abstract: Modern AI assistants are trained to follow instructions, implicitly assuming that users can clearly articulate their goals and the kind of assistance they need. Decades of behavioral research, however, show that people often engage with AI systems before their goals are fully formed. When AI systems treat prompts as complete expressions of intent, they can appear to be useful or convenient, but not necessarily aligned with the users' needs. We call these failures Fantasia interactions. We argue that Fantasia interactions demand a rethinking of alignment research: rather than treating users as rational oracles, AI should provide cognitive support by actively helping users form and refine their intent through time. This requires an interdisciplinary approach that bridges machine learning, interface design, and behavioral science. We synthesize insights from these fields to characterize the mechanisms and failures of Fantasia interactions. We then show why existing interventions are insufficient, and propose a research agenda for designing and evaluating AI systems that better help humans navigate uncertainty in their tasks.

analysis.tldr: 论文指出当前AI对齐研究忽视了用户目标未成形时的交互失败（Fantasia交互），呼吁跨学科重新设计对齐范式。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI对齐假设用户能清晰表达目标，但行为研究表明用户常在与AI交互时目标尚未形成，导致系统看似有用却未真正对齐用户需求。
analysis.problem: 解决AI系统在用户目标未成形时（Fantasia交互）的失败问题，即系统将提示视为完整意图表达而忽略用户认知支持需求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出用户常在与AI系统交互时目标尚未完全形成，系统若将提示视为完整意图表达，会导致表面有用但实际未对齐的失败模式。
analysis.method: 提出跨学科研究议程，整合机器学习、界面设计和行为科学，设计能主动帮助用户形成和细化意图的AI系统。
contributions: 定义并刻画Fantasia交互的机制与失败模式
论证现有干预措施不足并提出新的研究议程
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果
limitations: 未提供实证验证，仅提出概念框架和研究方向
跨学科整合的具体实现细节尚未展开
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 概念新颖但缺乏技术细节和实验，适合关注对齐方向的读者阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文指出当前AI对齐研究忽视了用户目标未成形时的交互失败（Fantasia交互），呼吁跨学科重新设计对齐范式。

papers.title: Tool Attention Is All You Need: Dynamic Tool Gating and Lazy Schema Loading for Eliminating the MCP/Tools Tax in Scalable Agentic Workflows
papers.abstract: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) has become a common interface for connecting large language model (LLM) agents to external tools, but its reliance on stateless, eager schema injection imposes a hidden per-turn overhead the MCP Tax or Tools Tax that practitioner reports place between roughly 10k and 60k tokens in typical multi-server deployments. This payload inflates the key-value cache, is associated with reasoning degradation as context utilization approaches published fracture points around 70%, and turns token budgets into a recurring operational cost. We introduce Tool Attention, a middleware-layer mechanism that generalizes the "Attention Is All You Need" paradigm from self-attention over tokens to gated attention over tools. Tool Attention combines (i) an Intent Schema Overlap (ISO) score from sentence embeddings, (ii) a state-aware gating function enforcing preconditions and access scopes, and (iii) a two-phase lazy schema loader that keeps a compact summary pool in context and promotes full JSON schemas only for top-k gated tools. We evaluate on a simulated 120-tool, six-server benchmark whose per-server token counts are calibrated to public audits of real MCP deployments. In this simulation, Tool Attention directly reduces measured per-turn tool tokens by 95.0% (47.3k -> 2.4k) and raises effective context utilization (a token-ratio quantity) from 24% to 91%. End-to-end figures for task success, latency, cost, and reasoning quality are reported as projections derived from the measured token counts combined with published deployment telemetry; they are not measured on live LLM agents, and we mark projected values explicitly throughout. Taken together, the results support a simple thesis: protocol-level efficiency, not raw context length, is a binding constraint on scalable gentic systems. The code for this work is accessible at https://github.com/asadani/tool-attention

analysis.tldr: 提出Tool Attention机制，通过动态工具门控和惰性模式加载消除MCP/Tools Tax，将每轮工具token减少95%。
analysis.research_motivation: MCP协议中无状态、急切模式注入导致每轮工具token开销高达10k-60k，膨胀KV缓存并降低推理质量，成为可扩展智能体系统的瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 解决MCP/Tools Tax问题，即工具模式注入带来的高token开销和上下文利用率下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出工具token开销在典型多服务器部署中为10k-60k，且上下文利用率超过70%时推理质量下降。
analysis.method: Tool Attention机制，结合意图模式重叠(ISO)分数、状态感知门控函数和两阶段惰性模式加载器，仅对top-k门控工具加载完整JSON模式。
contributions: 提出Tool Attention机制，将自注意力范式推广到工具门控注意力。
引入ISO分数、状态感知门控和惰性模式加载，显著降低工具token开销。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟120工具、六服务器的基准上，每轮工具token减少95.0%（47.3k->2.4k），有效上下文利用率从24%提升至91%。端到端任务成功率、延迟、成本和推理质量基于测量token数和公开部署遥测的投影值，未在真实LLM智能体上测量。
limitations: 实验基于模拟基准，未在真实LLM智能体上验证。
端到端指标为投影值，实际效果可能不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，针对实际痛点，模拟实验效果显著，但缺乏真实环境验证，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Tool Attention机制，通过动态工具门控和惰性模式加载消除MCP/Tools Tax，将每轮工具token减少95%。

papers.title: Divide-then-Diagnose: Weaving Clinician-Inspired Contexts for Ultra-Long Capsule Endoscopy Videos
papers.abstract: Capsule endoscopy (CE) enables non-invasive gastrointestinal screening, but current CE research remains largely limited to frame-level classification and detection, leaving video-level analysis underexplored. To bridge this gap, we introduce and formally define a new task, diagnosis-driven CE video summarization, which requires extracting key evidence frames that covers clinically meaningful findings and making accurate diagnoses from those evidence frames. This setting is challenging because diagnostically relevant events are extremely sparse and can be overwhelmed by tens of thousands of redundant normal frames, while individual observations are often ambiguous due to motion blur, debris, specular highlights, and rapid viewpoint changes. To facilitate research in this direction, we introduce VideoCAP, the first CE dataset with diagnosis-driven annotations derived from real clinical reports. VideoCAP comprises 240 full-length videos and provides realistic supervision for both key evidence frame extraction and diagnosis. To address this task, we further propose DiCE, a clinician-inspired framework that mirrors the standard CE reading workflow. DiCE first performs efficient candidate screening over the raw video, then uses a Context Weaver to organize candidates into coherent diagnostic contexts that preserve distinct lesion events, and an Evidence Converger to aggregate multi-frame evidence within each context into robust clip-level judgments. Experiments show that DiCE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, producing concise and clinically reliable diagnostic summaries. These results highlight diagnosis-driven contextual reasoning as a promising paradigm for ultra-long CE video summarization.

analysis.tldr: 提出诊断驱动的胶囊内镜视频摘要新任务、数据集和框架，通过模拟临床阅读流程实现长视频高效诊断。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前胶囊内镜研究局限于帧级分类和检测，缺乏视频级分析，而诊断相关事件极其稀疏且易被冗余帧淹没，个体观察因运动模糊等干扰而模糊。
analysis.problem: 如何从超长胶囊内镜视频中提取关键证据帧并基于这些帧做出准确诊断。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 诊断相关事件极其稀疏，被数万冗余帧淹没；个体观察因运动模糊、碎片、镜面高光和视角快速变化而模糊。
analysis.method: 提出DiCE框架，模拟临床阅读流程：先高效候选筛选，再用Context Weaver组织候选帧为连贯诊断上下文，最后用Evidence Converger聚合多帧证据得到剪辑级判断。
contributions: 正式定义并引入诊断驱动的CE视频摘要新任务
构建首个带诊断驱动标注的CE数据集VideoCAP
提出模拟临床工作流的DiCE框架，在长视频摘要上超越现有方法
analysis.experiments: 在VideoCAP数据集上实验，DiCE一致优于现有方法，生成简洁且临床可靠的诊断摘要。
limitations: 数据集规模有限（240个视频），可能影响泛化性
方法依赖临床标注，标注成本高
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 任务定义新颖，数据集和框架有实际临床价值，实验充分，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出诊断驱动的胶囊内镜视频摘要新任务、数据集和框架，通过模拟临床阅读流程实现长视频高效诊断。

papers.title: Probably Approximately Consensus: On the Learning Theory of Finding Common Ground
papers.abstract: A primary goal of online deliberation platforms is to identify ideas that are broadly agreeable to a community of users through their expressed preferences. Yet, consensus elicitation should ideally extend beyond the specific statements provided by users and should incorporate the relative salience of particular topics. We address this issue by modelling consensus as an interval in a one-dimensional opinion space derived from potentially high-dimensional data via embedding and dimensionality reduction. We define an objective that maximizes expected agreement within a hypothesis interval where the expectation is over an underlying distribution of issues, implicitly taking into account their salience. We propose an efficient Empirical Risk Minimization (ERM) algorithm and establish PAC-learning guarantees. Our initial experiments demonstrate the performance of our algorithm and examine more efficient approaches to identifying optimal consensus regions. We find that through selectively querying users on an existing sample of statements, we can reduce the number of queries needed to a practical number.

analysis.tldr: 将共识建模为意见空间中的区间，并提出PAC学习保证的ERM算法。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线讨论平台需要识别广泛认同的观点，但现有共识挖掘方法局限于用户明确表达的陈述，忽略了议题的相对重要性。
analysis.problem: 如何从高维用户偏好数据中高效学习一个能最大化预期共识的区间，并保证泛化性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过选择性查询现有陈述样本，可将查询次数降至实际可行数量。
analysis.method: 将共识建模为嵌入降维后一维意见空间中的区间，定义最大化预期一致性的目标函数，并设计经验风险最小化（ERM）算法，给出PAC学习保证。
contributions: 提出将共识形式化为意见空间中的区间，并考虑议题分布的重要性。
给出PAC学习保证的ERM算法，并通过实验验证其有效性及查询效率。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 假设意见空间为一维，可能无法捕捉复杂多维共识。

papers.title: Multiscale Super Resolution without Image Priors
papers.abstract: We address the ambiguities in the super-resolution problem under translation. We demonstrate that combinations of low-resolution images at different scales can be used to make the super-resolution problem well posed. Such differences in scale can be achieved using sensors with different pixel sizes (as demonstrated here) or by varying the effective pixel size through changes in optical magnification (e.g., using a zoom lens). We show that images acquired with pairwise coprime pixel sizes lead to a system with a stable inverse, and furthermore, that super-resolution images can be reconstructed efficiently using Fourier domain techniques or iterative least squares methods. Our mathematical analysis provides an expression for the expected error of the least squares reconstruction for large signals assuming i.i.d. noise that elucidates the noise-resolution tradeoff. These results are validated through both one- and two-dimensional experiments that leverage charge-coupled device (CCD) hardware binning to explore reconstructions over a large range of effective pixel sizes. Finally, two-dimensional reconstructions for a series of targets are used to demonstrate the advantages of multiscale super-resolution, and implications of these results for common imaging systems are discussed.

analysis.tldr: 利用不同尺度低分辨率图像（如不同像素尺寸传感器）使超分辨率问题适定，无需图像先验。
analysis.research_motivation: 超分辨率问题在平移下存在歧义，传统方法依赖图像先验或单一尺度信息，难以稳定重建。

analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用互质像素尺寸的传感器获取多尺度低分辨率图像，通过傅里叶域技术或迭代最小二乘法重建超分辨率图像，并给出噪声-分辨率权衡的误差表达式。
contributions: 证明互质像素尺寸的图像组合可使超分辨率问题适定且具有稳定逆。
提出基于傅里叶域或迭代最小二乘的高效重建方法，并给出大信号下期望误差的解析表达式。

limitations: 方法依赖多尺度传感器或变焦镜头，硬件要求较高。

papers.title: Quotient-Space Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Diffusion-based generative models have reformed generative AI, and have enabled new capabilities in the science domain, for example, generating 3D structures of molecules. Due to the intrinsic problem structure of certain tasks, there is often a symmetry in the system, which identifies objects that can be converted by a group action as equivalent, hence the target distribution is essentially defined on the quotient space with respect to the group. In this work, we establish a formal framework for diffusion modeling on a general quotient space, and apply it to molecular structure generation which follows the special Euclidean group $\text{SE}(3)$ symmetry. The framework reduces the necessity of learning the component corresponding to the group action, hence simplifies learning difficulty over conventional group-equivariant diffusion models, and the sampler guarantees recovering the target distribution, while heuristic alignment strategies lack proper samplers. The arguments are empirically validated on structure generation for small molecules and proteins, indicating that the principled quotient-space diffusion model provides a new framework that outperforms previous symmetry treatments.

analysis.tldr: 提出商空间扩散模型框架，利用对称性简化学习难度，在分子结构生成中优于传统等变扩散模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型在科学领域（如分子3D结构生成）中应用广泛，但许多任务存在对称性（如SE(3)群作用），传统等变扩散模型需学习群作用对应分量，学习难度大且缺乏理论保证的采样器。
analysis.problem: 如何利用对称性在商空间上构建扩散模型，以简化学习难度并保证采样分布正确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

contributions: 首次为一般商空间建立扩散模型的形式化框架。
应用于SE(3)对称的分子结构生成，简化学习难度并提供正确采样器。
在小分子和蛋白质结构生成上验证了方法优于传统对称处理方法。
analysis.experiments: 在小分子和蛋白质结构生成任务上进行实验，表明商空间扩散模型优于之前的对称处理方法。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 框架可能仅适用于具有明确群对称性的任务。

papers.title: A general optimization solver based on OP-to-MaxSAT reduction
papers.abstract: Optimization problems are fundamental in diverse fields, such as engineering, economics, and scientific computing. However, current algorithms are mostly designed for specific problem types and exhibit limited generality in solving multiple types of optimization problems. To enhance generality, we propose an automated reduction method named OP-to-MaxSAT reduction and a general optimization solver based on OP-to-MaxSAT reduction (GORED). GORED unifies the solving of multiple types of optimization problems by reducing the problems from optimization problems to MaxSAT instances in polynomial time and solving them using the state-of-the-art MaxSAT solver. The generality and solution quality of GORED are validated through experiments on 136 instances across 11 types of optimization problems. Experimental results demonstrate that GORED not only successfully solves a wide range of optimization problems but also yields solutions comparable in quality to those from existing methods, with no statistically significant differences observed. By introducing automated reduction, this work shifts the paradigm of optimization solvers from designing specialized algorithms for each problem type to employing a single algorithm for diverse problems. As a result, advances in this single algorithm can now drive progress in a wide range of optimization problems across various domains.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于OP-to-MaxSAT归约的通用优化求解器GORED，可统一求解多种优化问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有优化算法大多针对特定问题类型设计，缺乏通用性，难以高效处理多种优化问题。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个通用优化求解器，能够自动将多种优化问题归约为MaxSAT实例并高效求解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

构建通用优化求解器GORED，在11类136个实例上验证了其通用性和解质量。
analysis.experiments: 在11类优化问题的136个实例上进行实验，结果表明GORED能成功求解广泛问题，且解质量与现有方法无显著差异。

papers.title: TEMA: Anchor the Image, Follow the Text for Multi-Modification Composed Image Retrieval
papers.abstract: Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) is an important image retrieval paradigm that enables users to retrieve a target image using a multimodal query that consists of a reference image and modification text. Although research on CIR has made significant progress, prevailing setups still rely simple modification texts that typically cover only a limited range of salient changes, which induces two limitations highly relevant to practical applications, namely Insufficient Entity Coverage and Clause-Entity Misalignment. In order to address these issues and bring CIR closer to real-world use, we construct two instruction-rich multi-modification datasets, M-FashionIQ and M-CIRR. In addition, we propose TEMA, the Text-oriented Entity Mapping Architecture, which is the first CIR framework designed for multi-modification while also accommodating simple modifications. Extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets demonstrate that TEMA's superiority in both original and multi-modification scenarios, while maintaining an optimal balance between retrieval accuracy and computational efficiency. Our codes and constructed multi-modification dataset (M-FashionIQ and M-CIRR) are available at https://github.com/lee-zixu/ACL26-TEMA/.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个支持多修改组合图像检索的框架TEMA，并构建了两个多修改数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有组合图像检索（CIR）方法仅处理简单修改文本，导致实体覆盖不足和子句-实体错位，难以满足实际应用需求。
analysis.problem: 解决CIR中多修改文本带来的实体覆盖不足和子句-实体对齐问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出简单修改文本仅覆盖有限显著变化，导致两个局限性：实体覆盖不足和子句-实体错位。
analysis.method: 提出TEMA（Text-oriented Entity Mapping Architecture），首个面向多修改的CIR框架，通过文本导向的实体映射架构同时处理多修改和简单修改。
contributions: 构建了两个指令丰富的多修改数据集M-FashionIQ和M-CIRR。
提出首个支持多修改的CIR框架TEMA，在原始和多修改场景下均表现优越。
analysis.experiments: 在四个基准数据集上进行实验，TEMA在原始和多修改场景下均优于现有方法，并在检索精度和计算效率间取得最佳平衡。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。

papers.title: SyMTRS: Benchmark Multi-Task Synthetic Dataset for Depth, Domain Adaptation and Super-Resolution in Aerial Imagery
papers.abstract: Recent advances in deep learning for remote sensing rely heavily on large annotated datasets, yet acquiring high-quality ground truth for geometric, radiometric, and multi-domain tasks remains costly and often infeasible. In particular, the lack of accurate depth annotations, controlled illumination variations, and multi-scale paired imagery limits progress in monocular depth estimation, domain adaptation, and super-resolution for aerial scenes. We present SyMTRS, a large-scale synthetic dataset generated using a high-fidelity urban simulation pipeline. The dataset provides high-resolution RGB aerial imagery (2048 x 2048), pixel-perfect depth maps, night-time counterparts for domain adaptation, and aligned low-resolution variants for super-resolution at x2, x4, and x8 scales. Unlike existing remote sensing datasets that focus on a single task or modality, SyMTRS is designed as a unified multi-task benchmark enabling joint research in geometric understanding, cross-domain robustness, and resolution enhancement. We describe the dataset generation process, its statistical properties, and its positioning relative to existing benchmarks. SyMTRS aims to bridge critical gaps in remote sensing research by enabling controlled experiments with perfect geometric ground truth and consistent multi-domain supervision. The results obtained in this work can be reproduced from this Github repository: https://github.com/safouaneelg/SyMTRS.

analysis.tldr: SyMTRS是一个大规模合成航拍多任务基准数据集，提供深度、域适应和超分辨率标注。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感深度学习依赖大量标注数据，但获取几何、辐射和多域任务的高质量真值成本高昂且不可行，现有数据集多聚焦单一任务或模态，限制了联合研究。

analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用高保真城市仿真管线生成大规模合成数据集，包含高分辨率RGB图像、像素级深度图、夜间图像以及不同倍率的低分辨率变体。
contributions: 提出了SyMTRS，一个大规模合成多任务航拍基准数据集，覆盖深度、域适应和超分辨率任务。
数据集提供2048x2048高分辨率RGB、像素级深度、夜间图像和多尺度低分辨率图像，支持几何理解、跨域鲁棒性和分辨率增强的联合研究。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。

papers.title: Learning to Communicate: Toward End-to-End Optimization of Multi-Agent Language Systems
papers.abstract: Multi-agent systems built on large language models have shown strong performance on complex reasoning tasks, yet most work focuses on agent roles and orchestration while treating inter-agent communication as a fixed interface. Latent communication through internal representations such as key-value caches offers a promising alternative to text-based protocols, but existing approaches do not jointly optimize communication with multi-agent reasoning. Therefore we propose DiffMAS, a training framework that treats latent communication as a learnable component of multi-agent systems. DiffMAS performs parameter-efficient supervised training over multi-agent latent trajectories, enabling agents to jointly learn how information should be encoded and interpreted across interactions. Experiments on mathematical reasoning, scientific QA, code generation, and commonsense benchmarks show that DiffMAS consistently improves reasoning accuracy and decoding stability over single-agent inference, text-based multi-agent systems, and prior latent communication methods, achieving 26.7% on AIME24, 20.2% on GPQA-Diamond, and consistent gains across reasoning benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出DiffMAS框架，将多智能体系统中的潜在通信作为可学习组件进行端到端优化，显著提升推理准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于LLM的多智能体系统大多将智能体间通信视为固定接口，未联合优化通信与推理过程，限制了系统性能。
analysis.problem: 如何将多智能体系统中的潜在通信（如键值缓存）作为可学习组件，并与多智能体推理过程联合优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

papers.title: Inferring High-Level Events from Timestamped Data: Complexity and Medical Applications
papers.abstract: In this paper, we develop a novel logic-based approach to detecting high-level temporally extended events from timestamped data and background knowledge. Our framework employs logical rules to capture existence and termination conditions for simple temporal events and to combine these into meta-events. In the medical domain, for example, disease episodes and therapies are inferred from timestamped clinical observations, such as diagnoses and drug administrations stored in patient records, and can be further combined into higher-level disease events. As some incorrect events might be inferred, we use constraints to identify incompatible combinations of events and propose a repair mechanism to select preferred consistent sets of events. While reasoning in the full framework is intractable, we identify relevant restrictions that ensure polynomial-time data complexity. Our prototype system implements core components of the approach using answer set programming. An evaluation on a lung cancer use case supports the interest of the approach, both in terms of computational feasibility and positive alignment of our results with medical expert opinions. While strongly motivated by the needs of the healthcare domain, our framework is purposely generic, enabling its reuse in other areas.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于逻辑规则和约束修复的事件推理框架，从时间戳数据中推断高层事件，并在肺癌病例中验证了可行性和医学一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 医疗领域需要从时间戳临床数据（如诊断、用药记录）中自动推断高层事件（如疾病发作、治疗过程），但现有方法难以处理事件的不确定性和组合复杂性。
analysis.problem: 如何从带时间戳的数据和背景知识中，通过逻辑规则和约束修复机制，可靠地推断出高层时间扩展事件，并保证计算可行性。

contributions: 提出一种通用的逻辑框架，从时间戳数据推断高层事件，支持约束和修复机制。
识别出保证多项式时间数据复杂度的限制条件。
在肺癌病例中验证了方法的计算可行性和与医学专家意见的一致性。
