papers.title: From Codebooks to VLMs: Evaluating Automated Visual Discourse Analysis for Climate Change on Social Media
papers.abstract: Social media platforms have become primary arenas for climate communication, generating millions of images and posts that - if systematically analysed - can reveal which communication strategies mobilise public concern and which fall flat. We aim to facilitate such research by analysing how computer vision methods can be used for social media discourse analysis. This analysis includes application-based taxonomy design, model selection, prompt engineering, and validation. We benchmark six promptable vision-language models and 15 zero-shot CLIP-like models on two datasets from X (formerly Twitter) - a 1,038-image expert-annotated set and a larger corpus of over 1.2 million images, with 50,000 labels manually validated - spanning five annotation dimensions: animal content, climate change consequences, climate action, image setting, and image type. Among the models benchmarked, Gemini-3.1-flash-lite outperforms all others across all super-categories and both datasets, while the gap to open-weight models of moderate size remains relatively small. Beyond instance-level metrics, we advocate for distributional evaluation: VLM predictions can reliably recover population level trends even when per-image accuracy is moderate, making them a viable starting point for discourse analysis at scale. We find that chain-of-thought reasoning reduces rather than improves performance, and that annotation dimension specific prompt design improves performance. We release tweet IDs and labels along with our code at https://github.com/KathPra/Codebooks2VLMs.git.

analysis.tldr: 评估视觉语言模型在社交媒体气候变化视觉话语分析中的表现，发现Gemini-3.1-flash-lite最优，链式思维推理反而降低性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 社交媒体上大量气候传播图像需要自动化分析，但现有计算机视觉方法在话语分析中的应用缺乏系统评估。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估视觉语言模型（VLM）和CLIP类模型在社交媒体气候变化视觉话语分析中的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 链式思维推理降低性能；针对特定标注维度的提示设计提升性能；VLM在分布级评估中可靠恢复总体趋势，即使实例级准确率中等。
analysis.method: 基准测试6个可提示VLM和15个零样本CLIP类模型，涵盖5个标注维度，使用两个X平台数据集，并引入分布级评估。
contributions: 系统评估了多种VLM和CLIP模型在气候变化视觉话语分析中的性能。
发现链式思维推理降低性能，而维度特定提示设计提升性能。
提出分布级评估方法，证明VLM在总体趋势分析中的可靠性。
发布数据集和代码。
analysis.experiments: 在两个数据集上（1,038张专家标注图像和120万张图像含5万人工验证标签）进行基准测试，覆盖5个标注维度。
limitations: 仅针对气候变化领域，可能不适用于其他话语分析任务。
未深入探讨模型失败的具体原因。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 系统评估VLM在特定应用场景的性能，有实际数据集和代码发布，但方法创新性一般。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 评估视觉语言模型在社交媒体气候变化视觉话语分析中的表现，发现Gemini-3.1-flash-lite最优，链式思维推理反而降低性能。

papers.title: Reshoot-Anything: A Self-Supervised Model for In-the-Wild Video Reshooting
papers.abstract: Precise camera control for reshooting dynamic videos is bottlenecked by the severe scarcity of paired multi-view data for non-rigid scenes. We overcome this limitation with a highly scalable self-supervised framework capable of leveraging internet-scale monocular videos. Our core contribution is the generation of pseudo multi-view training triplets, consisting of a source video, a geometric anchor, and a target video. We achieve this by extracting distinct smooth random-walk crop trajectories from a single input video to serve as the source and target views. The anchor is synthetically generated by forward-warping the first frame of the source with a dense tracking field, which effectively simulates the distorted point-cloud inputs expected at inference. Because our independent cropping strategy introduces spatial misalignment and artificial occlusions, the model cannot simply copy information from the current source frame. Instead, it is forced to implicitly learn 4D spatiotemporal structures by actively routing and re-projecting missing high-fidelity textures across distinct times and viewpoints from the source video to reconstruct the target. At inference, our minimally adapted diffusion transformer utilizes a 4D point-cloud derived anchor to achieve state-of-the-art temporal consistency, robust camera control, and high-fidelity novel view synthesis on complex dynamic scenes.

analysis.tldr: 提出自监督框架，利用单目视频生成伪多视图三元组，实现动态视频重拍中的精确相机控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 动态视频重拍需要精确相机控制，但非刚性场景的配对多视图数据严重稀缺，限制了现有方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有配对多视图数据的情况下，实现动态视频的精确相机控制和高质量新视角合成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 独立裁剪策略引入空间错位和人工遮挡，迫使模型学习4D时空结构，而非简单复制源帧信息。
analysis.method: 自监督框架：从单目视频中提取平滑随机游走裁剪轨迹作为源和目标视图，通过前向扭曲生成几何锚点，训练扩散变压器隐式学习4D时空结构。
contributions: 提出可扩展的自监督框架，利用互联网规模单目视频进行训练。
设计伪多视图三元组生成策略，包括源视频、几何锚点和目标视频。
在复杂动态场景上实现最先进的时序一致性、鲁棒相机控制和高保真新视角合成。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖密集跟踪场生成锚点，可能受限于跟踪精度。
独立裁剪策略可能引入额外遮挡，影响复杂场景性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，自监督框架解决数据稀缺问题，但摘要未提供实验细节，影响评估。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自监督框架，利用单目视频生成伪多视图三元组，实现动态视频重拍中的精确相机控制。

papers.title: Back to Source: Open-Set Continual Test-Time Adaptation via Domain Compensation
papers.abstract: Test-Time Adaptation (TTA) aims to mitigate distributional shifts between training and test domains during inference time. However, existing TTA methods fall short in the realistic scenario where models face both continually changing domains and the simultaneous emergence of unknown semantic classes, a challenging setting we term Open-set Continual Test-Time Adaptation (OCTTA). The coupling of domain and semantic shifts often collapses the feature space, severely degrading both classification and out-of-distribution detection. To tackle this, we propose DOmain COmpensation (DOCO), a lightweight and effective framework that robustly performs domain adaptation and OOD detection in a synergistic, closed loop. DOCO first performs dynamic, adaptation-conditioned sample splitting to separate likely ID from OOD samples. Then, using only the ID samples, it learns a domain compensation prompt by aligning feature statistics with the source domain, guided by a structural preservation regularizer that prevents semantic distortion. This learned prompt is then propagated to the OOD samples within the same batch, effectively isolating their semantic novelty for more reliable detection. Extensive experiments on multiple challenging benchmarks demonstrate that DOCO outperforms prior CTTA and OSTTA methods, establishing a new state-of-the-art for the demanding OCTTA setting.

analysis.tldr: 提出DOCO框架，通过域补偿提示和结构保持正则化，解决开放集持续测试时适应中的域偏移与语义类别涌现耦合问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有测试时适应方法无法应对域持续变化与未知语义类别同时出现的现实场景，导致特征空间崩溃和分类与OOD检测性能严重下降。
analysis.problem: 解决开放集持续测试时适应（OCTTA）中域偏移与语义偏移耦合导致的特征空间崩溃问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 域偏移与语义偏移的耦合会导致特征空间崩溃，严重降低分类和OOD检测性能。
analysis.method: 提出DOCO框架，包括动态适应条件样本分割、基于源域特征统计对齐的域补偿提示学习、结构保持正则化防止语义失真，以及将提示传播给OOD样本以隔离语义新颖性。
contributions: 首次定义并形式化开放集持续测试时适应（OCTTA）问题。
提出DOCO框架，通过域补偿提示和结构保持正则化实现域适应与OOD检测的协同闭环。
在多个基准上取得SOTA性能，超越现有CTTA和OSTTA方法。
analysis.experiments: 在多个具有挑战性的基准上进行了大量实验，DOCO优于先前的CTTA和OSTTA方法，建立了OCTTA设置的新SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖源域统计信息的可用性。
动态样本分割的准确性可能影响整体性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，定义新问题并取得SOTA，与鲁棒性方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DOCO框架，通过域补偿提示和结构保持正则化，解决开放集持续测试时适应中的域偏移与语义类别涌现耦合问题。

papers.title: Who Defines "Best"? Towards Interactive, User-Defined Evaluation of LLM Leaderboards
papers.abstract: LLM leaderboards are widely used to compare models and guide deployment decisions. However, leaderboard rankings are shaped by evaluation priorities set by benchmark designers, rather than by the diverse goals and constraints of actual users and organizations. A single aggregate score often obscures how models behave across different prompt types and compositions. In this work, we conduct an in-depth analysis of the dataset used in the LMArena (formerly Chatbot Arena) benchmark and investigate this evaluation challenge by designing an interactive visualization interface as a design probe. Our analysis reveals that the dataset is heavily skewed toward certain topics, that model rankings vary across prompt slices, and that preference-based judgments are used in ways that blur their intended scope. Building on this analysis, we introduce a visualization interface that allows users to define their own evaluation priorities by selecting and weighting prompt slices and to explore how rankings change accordingly. A qualitative study suggests that this interactive approach improves transparency and supports more context-specific model evaluation, pointing toward alternative ways to design and use LLM leaderboards.

analysis.tldr: LLM排行榜由基准设计者定义，忽略了用户多样需求；本文通过分析LMArena数据集并设计交互可视化界面，让用户自定义评估优先级。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM排行榜由基准设计者设定评估优先级，无法反映实际用户和组织的多样化目标与约束，导致单一聚合分数掩盖模型在不同提示类型上的表现差异。
analysis.problem: 如何让用户能够根据自身需求自定义LLM评估标准，从而获得更透明、更符合实际场景的模型排名。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分析LMArena数据集发现：数据集严重偏向某些主题；模型排名在不同提示切片上存在差异；基于偏好的判断被模糊使用，偏离了其预期范围。
analysis.method: 设计交互式可视化界面作为设计探针，允许用户选择和加权提示切片，探索排名如何随之变化。
contributions: 对LMArena数据集进行了深入分析，揭示了其主题偏差、排名变化和偏好判断的模糊使用。
提出并实现了一个交互式可视化界面，使用户能够自定义评估优先级，提升透明度和上下文特定评估。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及一项定性研究表明交互方法改善了透明度和上下文特定评估。
limitations: 定性研究样本量可能有限，缺乏大规模定量验证。
界面依赖用户手动选择提示切片，可能增加用户负担。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新（交互式自定义评估）且针对排行榜公平性这一重要问题，但实验仅为定性，技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM排行榜由基准设计者定义，忽略了用户多样需求；本文通过分析LMArena数据集并设计交互可视化界面，让用户自定义评估优先级。

papers.title: Thinking with Reasoning Skills: Fewer Tokens, More Accuracy
papers.abstract: Reasoning LLMs often spend substantial tokens on long intermediate reasoning traces (e.g., chain-of-thought) when solving new problems. We propose to summarize and store reusable reasoning skills distilled from extensive deliberation and trial-and-error exploration, and to retrieve these skills at inference time to guide future reasoning. Unlike the prevailing \emph{reasoning from scratch} paradigm, our approach first recalls relevant skills for each query, helping the model avoid redundant detours and focus on effective solution paths. We evaluate our method on coding and mathematical reasoning tasks, and find that it significantly reduces reasoning tokens while improving overall performance. The resulting lower per-request cost indicates strong practical and economic potential for real-world deployment.

analysis.tldr: 通过检索预存的推理技能，减少推理LLM的token消耗并提升准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前推理LLM在解决新问题时往往生成冗长的中间推理链（如思维链），导致高计算成本和低效率，实际部署中经济性差。
analysis.problem: 如何减少推理LLM在推理过程中不必要的token消耗，同时保持或提升推理准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种技能总结与检索方法：将大量推理过程中的可复用技能（从深思熟虑和试错探索中提炼）进行总结和存储，在推理时检索相关技能以指导后续推理，避免从零开始推理。
contributions: 提出一种基于技能检索的推理范式，替代传统的从零推理范式。
在编程和数学推理任务上验证了该方法能显著减少推理token并提升性能。
analysis.experiments: 在编程和数学推理任务上进行了评估，结果显示显著减少了推理token并提升了整体性能。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 技能库的构建和维护成本可能较高。
技能检索的准确性和泛化性可能受限于技能库的覆盖范围。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，显著降低推理成本，与LLM推理方向高度相关，但摘要未提供详细实验数据。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过检索预存的推理技能，减少推理LLM的token消耗并提升准确率。

papers.title: Interpretable facial dynamics as behavioral and perceptual traces of deepfakes
papers.abstract: Deepfake detection research has largely converged on deep learning approaches that, despite strong benchmark performance, offer limited insight into what distinguishes real from manipulated facial behavior. This study presents an interpretable alternative grounded in bio-behavioral features of facial dynamics and evaluates how computational detection strategies relate to human perceptual judgments. We identify core low-dimensional patterns of facial movement, from which temporal features characterizing spatiotemporal structure were derived. Traditional machine learning classifiers trained on these features achieved modest but significant above-chance deepfake classification, driven by higher-order temporal irregularities that were more pronounced in manipulated than real facial dynamics. Notably, detection was substantially more accurate for videos containing emotive expressions than those without. An emotional valence classification analysis further indicated that emotive signals are systematically degraded in deepfakes, explaining the differential impact of emotive dynamics on detection. Furthermore, we provide an additional and often overlooked dimension of explainability by assessing the relationship between model decisions and human perceptual detection. Model and human judgments converged for emotive but diverged for non-emotive videos, and even where outputs aligned, underlying detection strategies differed. These findings demonstrate that face-swapped deepfakes carry a measurable behavioral fingerprint, most salient during emotional expression. Additionally, model-human comparisons suggest that interpretable computational features and human perception may offer complementary rather than redundant routes to detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于面部动态生物行为特征的可解释深度伪造检测方法，发现情感表达中的高阶时间不规则性最有效，且模型与人类判断在情感视频上一致但在非情感视频上分歧。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度伪造检测依赖深度学习黑箱模型，虽性能强但缺乏可解释性，无法揭示真实与伪造面部行为的本质区别，且与人类感知的关联未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 如何设计可解释的深度伪造检测方法，利用面部动态的生物行为特征，并评估其与人类感知判断的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：1) 深度伪造中高阶时间不规则性更显著；2) 含情感表达的视频检测准确率更高；3) 深度伪造中情感信号系统性退化；4) 模型与人类在情感视频上判断一致，但在非情感视频上分歧，且即使输出一致，底层策略也不同。
analysis.method: 提取面部运动的低维时空模式，构建时序特征，使用传统机器学习分类器（如SVM）进行深度伪造分类，并通过情感效价分析及模型-人类对比增强可解释性。
contributions: 提出基于面部动态生物行为特征的可解释深度伪造检测框架，避免黑箱模型。
揭示情感表达在深度伪造检测中的关键作用，并量化情感信号的退化。
首次系统比较模型决策与人类感知，发现两者在情感视频上互补而非冗余。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及分类性能“modest but significant above-chance”，且情感视频检测更准确。
limitations: 传统机器学习分类器性能有限，可能不如深度学习方法。
仅针对人脸交换深度伪造，未覆盖其他类型（如重演、生成）。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖（可解释生物行为特征+模型-人类对比），但性能有限且实验细节不足，适合精读以了解可解释性思路。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于面部动态生物行为特征的可解释深度伪造检测方法，发现情感表达中的高阶时间不规则性最有效，且模型与人类判断在情感视频上一致但在非情感视频上分歧。

papers.title: Why are all LLMs Obsessed with Japanese Culture? On the Hidden Cultural and Regional Biases of LLMs
papers.abstract: LLMs have been showing limitations when it comes to cultural coverage and competence, and in some cases show regional biases such as amplifying Western and Anglocentric viewpoints. While there have been works analysing the cultural capabilities of LLMs, there has not been specific work on highlighting LLM regional preferences when it comes to cultural-related questions. In this work, we propose a new dataset based on a comprehensive taxonomy of Culture-Related Open Questions (CROQ). The results show that, contrary to previous cultural bias work, LLMs show a clear tendency towards countries such as Japan. Moveover, our results show that when prompting in languages such as English or other high-resource ones, LLMs tend to provide more diverse outputs and show less inclinations towards answering questions highlighting countries for which the input language is an official language. Finally, we also investigate at which point of LLM training this cultural bias emerges, with our results suggesting that the first clear signs appear after supervised fine-tuning, and not during pre-training.

analysis.tldr: LLMs在文化相关问题上表现出对日本等国家的偏好，且这种偏见在监督微调后出现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究关注LLM的文化能力不足和西方中心偏见，但缺乏对LLM在文化问题上的区域偏好的系统分析。
analysis.problem: 揭示LLM在文化相关问题中隐藏的区域偏见，特别是对日本等国家的偏好，并探究其来源。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM在文化问题上倾向于回答与日本相关的内容，而非西方；使用英语等高级语言提示时输出更多样化，且偏见在监督微调后出现。
analysis.method: 构建基于文化相关开放问题（CROQ）分类体系的数据集，分析LLM在不同语言提示下的回答偏好，并追踪偏见在训练阶段（预训练 vs. 监督微调）的涌现。
contributions: 提出CROQ数据集，用于系统评估LLM的文化区域偏好
发现LLM对日本文化的显著偏好，并揭示偏见在监督微调后出现
analysis.experiments: 使用CROQ数据集测试多个LLM，分析不同语言提示下的输出分布，并比较预训练与微调后的表现。
limitations: 数据集可能未覆盖所有文化区域
未深入分析偏见产生的具体机制
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 揭示了LLM文化偏见的新现象（日本偏好），方法新颖且具有社会影响，但技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLMs在文化相关问题上表现出对日本等国家的偏好，且这种偏见在监督微调后出现。

papers.title: StructMem: Structured Memory for Long-Horizon Behavior in LLMs
papers.abstract: Long-term conversational agents need memory systems that capture relationships between events, not merely isolated facts, to support temporal reasoning and multi-hop question answering. Current approaches face a fundamental trade-off: flat memory is efficient but fails to model relational structure, while graph-based memory enables structured reasoning at the cost of expensive and fragile construction. To address these issues, we propose \textbf{StructMem}, a structure-enriched hierarchical memory framework that preserves event-level bindings and induces cross-event connections. By temporally anchoring dual perspectives and performing periodic semantic consolidation, StructMem improves temporal reasoning and multi-hop performance on \texttt{LoCoMo}, while substantially reducing token usage, API calls, and runtime compared to prior memory systems, see https://github.com/zjunlp/LightMem .

analysis.tldr: StructMem通过结构增强的分层记忆框架，在长程对话中提升时间推理和多跳问答能力，同时降低计算开销。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有对话记忆系统在效率和结构化推理之间存在权衡：扁平记忆高效但缺乏关系建模，图记忆支持结构化推理但构建昂贵且脆弱。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种记忆框架，既能捕获事件间关系以支持时间推理和多跳问答，又保持高效和低开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出StructMem，一种结构增强的分层记忆框架，通过时间锚定双视角和周期性语义整合，保留事件级绑定并诱导跨事件连接。
contributions: 提出StructMem框架，在长程对话中同时提升时间推理和多跳问答性能。
相比现有记忆系统，显著减少token使用、API调用和运行时间。
analysis.experiments: 在LoCoMo基准上评估，显示时间推理和多跳性能提升，同时降低资源消耗。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定对话场景，泛化性需进一步验证。
周期性语义整合的触发策略可能引入额外超参数。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法有创新性且实验显示效率提升，但摘要未提供详细结果，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: StructMem通过结构增强的分层记忆框架，在长程对话中提升时间推理和多跳问答能力，同时降低计算开销。

papers.title: Agentic AI-assisted coding offers a unique opportunity to instill epistemic grounding during software development
papers.abstract: The capabilities of AI-assisted coding are progressing at breakneck speed. Chat-based vibe coding has evolved into fully fledged AI-assisted, agentic software development using agent scaffolds where the human developer creates a plan that agentic AIs implement. One current trend is utilizing documents beyond this plan document, such as project and method-scoped documents. Here we propose GROUNDING$.$md, a community-governed, field-scoped epistemic grounding document, using mass spectrometry-based proteomics as an example. This explicit field-scoped grounding document encodes Hard Constraints (non-negotiable validity invariants empirically required for scientific correctness) and Convention Parameters (community-agreed defaults) that override all other contexts to enforce validity, regardless of what the user prompts. In practice, this will empower a non-domain expert to generate code, tools, and software that have best practices baked in at the ground level, providing confidence to the software developer but also to those reviewing or using the final product. Undoubtedly it is easier to have agentic AIs adhere to guidelines than humans, and this opportunity allows for organizations to develop epistemic grounding documents in such a way as to keep domain experts in the loop in a future of democratized generation of bespoke software solutions.

analysis.tldr: 提出GROUNDING$.$md，一种社区治理的领域范围认知基础文档，用于在AI辅助编码中注入科学正确性约束。
analysis.research_motivation: AI辅助编码发展迅速，但缺乏领域知识约束，非专家生成的代码可能违反科学正确性，需要一种机制在开发过程中嵌入领域最佳实践。
analysis.problem: 如何在AI辅助软件开发中确保代码符合领域特定的科学正确性和社区约定，即使开发者不是领域专家。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

contributions: 提出认知基础文档概念，用于AI辅助编码中注入领域知识。
以质谱蛋白质组学为例展示社区治理的文档结构。

papers.title: Bridging the Training-Deployment Gap: Gated Encoding and Multi-Scale Refinement for Efficient Quantization-Aware Image Enhancement
papers.abstract: Image enhancement models for mobile devices often struggle to balance high output quality with the fast processing speeds required by mobile hardware. While recent deep learning models can enhance low-quality mobile photos into high-quality images, their performance is often degraded when converted to lower-precision formats for actual use on mobile phones. To address this training-deployment mismatch, we propose an efficient image enhancement model designed specifically for mobile deployment. Our approach uses a hierarchical network architecture with gated encoder blocks and multiscale refinement to preserve fine-grained visual features. Moreover, we incorporate Quantization-Aware Training (QAT) to simulate the effects of low-precision representation during the training process. This allows the network to adapt and prevents the typical drop in quality seen with standard post-training quantization (PTQ). Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method produces high-fidelity visual output while maintaining the low computational overhead needed for practical use on standard mobile devices. The code will be available at https://github.com/GenAI4E/QATIE.git.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种面向移动端部署的量化感知图像增强模型，通过门控编码和多尺度细化弥合训练与部署间的精度差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 移动设备上的图像增强模型在部署时因低精度量化导致性能下降，现有方法难以兼顾高质量输出与移动硬件所需的快速处理速度。
analysis.problem: 解决图像增强模型在训练（高精度）与移动端部署（低精度）之间的性能不匹配问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出标准后训练量化（PTQ）会导致模型输出质量显著下降，而量化感知训练（QAT）可帮助网络适应低精度表示，避免质量损失。
analysis.method: 采用层次化网络架构，包含门控编码器块和多尺度细化模块以保留细粒度视觉特征，并在训练过程中引入量化感知训练（QAT）模拟低精度表示效果。
contributions: 提出一种专为移动部署设计的高效图像增强模型，结合门控编码与多尺度细化。
将量化感知训练（QAT）融入训练流程，有效缓解训练-部署精度差距，避免后训练量化带来的质量下降。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及方法在标准移动设备上产生高保真视觉输出且计算开销低。
limitations: 可能仅在特定移动硬件上验证，泛化性未知。
未与多种量化方案或更大规模模型进行对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法针对移动端量化部署问题，有一定实用价值，但创新性中等，摘要未提供实验细节。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种面向移动端部署的量化感知图像增强模型，通过门控编码和多尺度细化弥合训练与部署间的精度差距。

papers.title: Evaluating Patient Safety Risks in Generative AI: Development and Validation of a FMECA Framework for Generated Clinical Content
papers.abstract: Objectives: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for clinical text summarization, yet structured methods to assess associated patient safety risks remain limited. Failure Mode, Effects, and Criticality Analysis (FMECA) provides a proactive framework for systematic risk identification but has not been adapted to LLM-generated clinical content. This study aimed to develop and validate a novel FMECA framework for the prospective assessment of patient safety risks in LLM-generated clinical summaries. Materials and Methods: An interdisciplinary expert panel (n = 8) developed a taxonomy of failure modes through literature review and brainstorming. Standard FMECA dimensions (occurrence, severity, detectability) were adapted into 5-point ordinal scales. The framework was applied to 36 discharge summaries from four patients, generated by an open LLM (GPT-OSS 120B) using real-world clinical data from the Geneva University Hospitals. Reviewers independently annotated the summaries across two rounds. Inter-rater reliability was assessed at failure mode, severity and detectability score levels. Usability and content validity were evaluated using an adapted System Usability Scale and structured feedback. Results: The final framework comprised 14 failure modes organized into categories. Inter-rater agreement improved between rounds, reaching moderate-to-substantial agreement for failure mode identification and good agreement for severity and detectability scoring. Usability was rated as good (mean SUS: 79.2/100), with high evaluator confidence. Discussion and Conclusion: This study presents the first FMECA-based framework for systematic patient safety risk assessment of LLM-generated clinical summaries. The framework provides a structured and reproducible method for identifying clinically relevant risks caused by these summaries.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个基于FMECA的框架，用于系统评估LLM生成临床摘要的患者安全风险。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM越来越多用于临床文本摘要，但缺乏结构化方法来评估相关的患者安全风险，现有FMECA框架尚未适应LLM生成内容。
analysis.problem: 如何开发并验证一个适用于LLM生成临床摘要的患者安全风险评估框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过跨学科专家小组开发故障模式分类法，将标准FMECA维度（发生、严重性、可检测性）改编为5点序数量表，应用于4名患者的36份出院摘要，由评审者独立标注两轮。
contributions: 首次提出基于FMECA的LLM生成临床摘要患者安全风险评估框架。
通过两轮标注和可靠性评估验证了框架的可用性和内容效度。
analysis.experiments: 对36份出院摘要进行两轮独立标注，评估了评分者间信度（故障模式识别达到中等至实质性一致，严重性和可检测性评分达到良好一致），可用性评分为79.2/100。
limitations: 样本量较小（仅4名患者、36份摘要）。
仅使用单一开源LLM（GPT-OSS 120B），可能不具广泛代表性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，针对LLM临床安全风险，但实验规模有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个基于FMECA的框架，用于系统评估LLM生成临床摘要的患者安全风险。

papers.title: Enabling and Inhibitory Pathways of University Students' Willingness to Disclose AI Use: A Cognition-Affect-Conation Perspective
papers.abstract: The increasing integration of artificial intelligence (AI) in higher education has raised important questions regarding students' transparency in reporting AI-assisted work. This study investigates the psychological mechanisms underlying university students' willingness to disclose AI use by applying the Cognition--Affect--Conation (CAC) framework. A sequential explanatory mixed-methods design was employed. In the quantitative phase, survey data were collected from 546 university students and analysed using structural equation modelling to examine the relationships among cognitive perceptions, affective responses, and disclosure intention. In the qualitative phase, semi-structured interviews with 22 students were conducted to further interpret the quantitative findings. The results indicate that psychological safety significantly increases students' willingness to disclose AI use and is positively shaped by perceived fairness, perceived teacher support, and perceived organisational support. Conversely, evaluation apprehension reduces disclosure intention and psychological safety, and is strengthened by perceived stigma, perceived uncertainty, and privacy concern. Qualitative findings further reveal that institutional clarity and supportive instructional practices encourage openness, whereas policy ambiguity and fear of negative evaluation often lead students to adopt cautious or strategic disclosure practices. Overall, the study highlights the dual role of enabling and inhibitory psychological mechanisms in shaping AI-use disclosure and underscores the importance of supportive institutional environments and clear guidance for promoting responsible AI transparency in higher education.

analysis.tldr: 基于认知-情感-意动框架，揭示大学生AI使用披露意愿的促进与抑制心理机制。
analysis.research_motivation: AI在高等教育中日益普及，但学生对AI辅助工作的报告透明度不足，缺乏对其心理机制的系统理解。
analysis.problem: 探究大学生披露AI使用的心理机制，特别是认知感知、情感反应和披露意愿之间的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 心理安全显著提升披露意愿，而评价恐惧降低披露意愿和心理安全；制度清晰度和支持性教学实践促进开放，政策模糊和负面评价恐惧导致谨慎或策略性披露。
analysis.method: 采用顺序解释性混合方法：定量阶段对546名学生进行问卷调查并使用结构方程模型分析，定性阶段对22名学生进行半结构化访谈以解释定量结果。
contributions: 将CAC框架应用于AI使用披露领域，揭示了心理安全与评价恐惧的双重作用。
通过混合方法设计，提供了定量与定性相互验证的实证证据。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅报告了结构方程模型和访谈的定性发现。
limitations: 样本可能局限于特定大学或文化背景，影响泛化性。
未探讨实际披露行为与意愿之间的差距。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 研究主题与AI透明性相关，但属于社会科学调查，非机器学习核心方法创新，适合保存供参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于认知-情感-意动框架，揭示大学生AI使用披露意愿的促进与抑制心理机制。

papers.title: Ramen: Robust Test-Time Adaptation of Vision-Language Models with Active Sample Selection
papers.abstract: Pretrained vision-language models such as CLIP exhibit strong zero-shot generalization but remain sensitive to distribution shifts. Test-time adaptation adapts models during inference without access to source data or target labels, offering a practical way to handle such shifts. However, existing methods typically assume that test samples come from a single, consistent domain, while in practice, test data often include samples from mixed domains with distinct characteristics. Consequently, their performance degrades under mixed-domain settings. To address this, we present Ramen, a framework for robust test-time adaptation through active sample selection. For each incoming test sample, Ramen retrieves a customized batch of relevant samples from previously seen data based on two criteria: domain consistency, which ensures that adaptation focuses on data from similar domains, and prediction balance, which mitigates adaptation bias caused by skewed predictions. To improve efficiency, Ramen employs an embedding-gradient cache that stores the embeddings and sample-level gradients of past test images. The stored embeddings are used to retrieve relevant samples, and the corresponding gradients are aggregated for model updates, eliminating the need for any additional forward or backward passes. Our theoretical analysis provides insight into why the proposed adaptation mechanism is effective under mixed-domain shifts. Experiments on multiple image corruption and domain-shift benchmarks demonstrate that Ramen achieves strong and consistent performance, offering robust and efficient adaptation in complex mixed-domain scenarios. Our code is available at https://github.com/baowenxuan/Ramen .

analysis.tldr: 提出Ramen框架，通过主动样本选择实现视觉-语言模型在混合域分布偏移下的鲁棒测试时自适应。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有测试时自适应方法假设测试数据来自单一一致域，但实际中常出现混合域场景，导致性能下降。
analysis.problem: 解决视觉-语言模型在混合域分布偏移下的测试时自适应问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法在混合域设置下性能退化，但未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Ramen框架：对每个测试样本，基于域一致性和预测平衡两个标准从历史数据中检索定制批次，并利用嵌入-梯度缓存高效更新模型。
contributions: 提出Ramen框架，通过主动样本选择实现混合域下的鲁棒测试时自适应。
设计嵌入-梯度缓存机制，避免额外前向/反向传播，提升效率。
理论分析解释了所提机制在混合域偏移下的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个图像损坏和域偏移基准上实验，Ramen取得强且一致的性能。
limitations: 可能依赖历史数据质量，若初始样本偏差大可能影响检索。
缓存机制的内存开销可能随测试序列增长而增加。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且针对混合域这一实际痛点，实验充分，与VLM方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Ramen框架，通过主动样本选择实现视觉-语言模型在混合域分布偏移下的鲁棒测试时自适应。

papers.title: AEL: Agent Evolving Learning for Open-Ended Environments
papers.abstract: LLM agents increasingly operate in open-ended environments spanning hundreds of sequential episodes, yet they remain largely stateless: each task is solved from scratch without converting past experience into better future behavior. The central obstacle is not \emph{what} to remember but \emph{how to use} what has been remembered, including which retrieval policy to apply, how to interpret prior outcomes, and when the current strategy itself must change. We introduce \emph{Agent Evolving Learning} (\ael{}), a two-timescale framework that addresses this obstacle. At the fast timescale, a Thompson Sampling bandit learns which memory retrieval policy to apply at each episode; at the slow timescale, LLM-driven reflection diagnoses failure patterns and injects causal insights into the agent's decision prompt, giving it an interpretive frame for the evidence it retrieves. On a sequential portfolio benchmark (10 sector-diverse tickers, 208 episodes, 5 random seeds), \ael{} achieves a Sharpe ratio of 2.13$\pm$0.47, outperforming five published self-improving methods and all non-LLM baselines while maintaining the lowest variance among all LLM-based approaches. A nine-variant ablation reveals a ``less is more'' pattern: memory and reflection together produce a 58\% cumulative improvement over the stateless baseline, yet every additional mechanism we test (planner evolution, per-tool selection, cold-start initialization, skill extraction, and three credit assignment methods) \emph{degrades} performance. This demonstrates that the bottleneck in agent self-improvement is \emph{self-diagnosing how to use} experience rather than adding architectural complexity. Code and data: https://github.com/WujiangXu/AEL.

analysis.tldr: 提出双时间尺度框架AEL，通过Thompson采样选择记忆检索策略与LLM反思注入因果洞察，在开放环境中实现智能体自我进化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM智能体在开放环境中缺乏状态记忆，每个任务从零开始，无法利用过往经验改进未来行为，而核心障碍不在于记忆什么，而在于如何使用记忆。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM智能体在开放环境中有效利用历史经验，包括选择检索策略、解释先前结果以及判断何时改变当前策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 消融实验发现“少即是多”模式：记忆与反思带来58%累积提升，但额外机制（规划器进化、工具选择、冷启动初始化、技能提取、信用分配）反而降低性能，表明瓶颈在于自我诊断如何使用经验而非增加架构复杂度。
analysis.method: 双时间尺度框架：快时间尺度使用Thompson Sampling bandit学习每轮选择哪种记忆检索策略；慢时间尺度通过LLM驱动反思诊断失败模式，将因果洞察注入决策提示。
contributions: 提出AEL框架，将记忆检索策略选择与因果反思分离为快慢两个时间尺度。
在顺序投资组合基准上实现2.13 Sharpe比，超越五种自改进方法和所有非LLM基线，且方差最低。
通过九变体消融揭示“少即是多”现象，证明智能体自我改进的瓶颈在于如何使用经验而非增加架构复杂度。
analysis.experiments: 在顺序投资组合基准（10个行业分散股票，208轮，5个随机种子）上评估，AEL实现Sharpe比2.13±0.47，优于五种已发表的自改进方法和所有非LLM基线，并在所有LLM方法中方差最低。
limitations: 仅在一个投资组合基准上验证，泛化性未知。
反思机制依赖LLM的推理能力，可能受限于模型本身。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新（双时间尺度+Thompson采样）且实验充分，消融揭示重要现象，与LLM Agent方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双时间尺度框架AEL，通过Thompson采样选择记忆检索策略与LLM反思注入因果洞察，在开放环境中实现智能体自我进化。

papers.title: Unlocking the Power of Critical Factors for 3D Visual Geometry Estimation
papers.abstract: Feed-forward visual geometry estimation has recently made rapid progress. However, an important gap remains: multi-frame models usually produce better cross-frame consistency, yet they often underperform strong per-frame methods on single-frame accuracy. This observation motivates our systematic investigation into the critical factors driving model performance through rigorous ablation studies, which reveals several key insights: 1) Scaling up data diversity and quality unlocks further performance gains even in state-of-the-art visual geometry estimation methods; 2) Commonly adopted confidence-aware loss and gradient-based loss mechanisms may unintentionally hinder performance; 3) Joint supervision through both per-sequence and per-frame alignment improves results, while local region alignment surprisingly degrades performance. Furthermore, we introduce two enhancements to integrate the advantages of optimization-based methods and high-resolution inputs: a consistency loss function that enforces alignment between depth maps, camera parameters, and point maps, and an efficient architectural design that leverages high-resolution information. We integrate these designs into CARVE, a resolution-enhanced model for feed-forward visual geometry estimation. Experiments on point cloud reconstruction, video depth estimation, and camera pose/intrinsic estimation show that CARVE achieves strong and robust performance across diverse benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 通过系统消融实验揭示影响3D视觉几何估计的关键因素，并提出CARVE模型实现高分辨率与跨帧一致性的统一。
analysis.research_motivation: 前馈视觉几何估计中，多帧模型跨帧一致性好但单帧精度常不如单帧模型，这一矛盾限制了实际应用，亟需系统分析关键因素并设计统一方案。
analysis.problem: 如何识别并利用影响3D视觉几何估计性能的关键因素，同时解决多帧模型单帧精度不足的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多帧模型跨帧一致性好但单帧精度弱于强单帧模型；数据多样性和质量提升可进一步释放性能；常用的置信度感知损失和梯度损失可能无意中阻碍性能；局部区域对齐反而降低性能。
analysis.method: 提出CARVE模型，包含一致性损失函数（强制深度图、相机参数和点图对齐）和高效利用高分辨率信息的架构设计。
contributions: 系统消融实验揭示数据规模、损失函数、对齐策略等关键因素对3D视觉几何估计的影响规律。
提出CARVE模型，通过一致性损失和高分辨率架构整合优化方法与高分辨率输入的优势。
analysis.experiments: 在点云重建、视频深度估计、相机位姿/内参估计等多个基准上验证，CARVE取得强且鲁棒的性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集和训练配置，泛化性需进一步验证。
高分辨率输入可能增加计算开销，实时性待评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 系统消融实验揭示关键因素，方法创新且实验充分，与3D视觉方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过系统消融实验揭示影响3D视觉几何估计的关键因素，并提出CARVE模型实现高分辨率与跨帧一致性的统一。

papers.title: Fairness under uncertainty in sequential decisions
papers.abstract: Fair machine learning (ML) methods help identify and mitigate the risk that algorithms encode or automate social injustices. Algorithmic approaches alone cannot resolve structural inequalities, but they can support socio-technical decision systems by surfacing discriminatory biases, clarifying trade-offs, and enabling governance. Although fairness is well studied in supervised learning, many real ML applications are online and sequential, with prior decisions informing future ones. Each decision is taken under uncertainty due to unobserved counterfactuals and finite samples, with dire consequences for under-represented groups, systematically under-observed due to historical exclusion and selective feedback. A bank cannot know whether a denied loan would have been repaid, and may have less data on marginalized populations. This paper introduces a taxonomy of uncertainty in sequential decision-making -- model, feedback, and prediction uncertainty -- providing shared vocabulary for assessing systems where uncertainty is unevenly distributed across groups. We formalize model and feedback uncertainty via counterfactual logic and reinforcement learning, and illustrate harms to decision makers (unrealized gains/losses) and subjects (compounding exclusion, reduced access) of policies that ignore the unobserved space. Algorithmic examples show it is possible to reduce outcome variance for disadvantaged groups while preserving institutional objectives (e.g. expected utility). Experiments on data simulated with varying bias show how unequal uncertainty and selective feedback produce disparities, and how uncertainty-aware exploration alters fairness metrics. The framework equips practitioners to diagnose, audit, and govern fairness risks. Where uncertainty drives unfairness rather than incidental noise, accounting for it is essential to fair and effective decision-making.

analysis.tldr: 提出顺序决策中公平性不确定性的分类框架，形式化模型、反馈和预测不确定性，并通过实验展示其对公平指标的影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 公平机器学习在监督学习中研究充分，但许多实际应用是顺序决策，且决策面临未观测反事实和有限样本导致的不确定性，这对历史被排斥群体尤其不利。现有方法缺乏系统分析这种不确定性的框架。
analysis.problem: 顺序决策中不确定性如何导致不公平，以及如何形式化并缓解这种不公平。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不确定性在群体间分布不均，历史排斥和选择性反馈导致弱势群体数据稀疏，加剧决策偏差。
analysis.method: 提出不确定性分类（模型、反馈、预测不确定性），用反事实逻辑和强化学习形式化，并通过算法示例展示如何降低弱势群体结果方差同时保留机构目标。
contributions: 提出顺序决策中公平性不确定性的分类框架，提供共享词汇。
形式化模型和反馈不确定性，并展示忽略不确定性导致的危害。
通过模拟实验证明不确定性感知探索能改变公平指标。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟数据上实验，展示不同偏差下不确定性分布不均和选择性反馈导致的差异，以及不确定性感知探索对公平指标的影响。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 实验基于模拟数据，未在真实世界系统中验证。
框架可能未涵盖所有类型的不确定性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 框架新颖且实用，但实验基于模拟数据，技术深度中等，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出顺序决策中公平性不确定性的分类框架，形式化模型、反馈和预测不确定性，并通过实验展示其对公平指标的影响。

papers.title: Conditional Diffusion Posterior Alignment for Sparse-View CT Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Computed Tomography (CT) is a widely used imaging modality in medical and industrial applications. To limit radiation exposure and measurement time, there is a growing interest in sparse-view CT, where the number of projection views is significantly reduced. Deep neural networks have shown great promise in improving reconstruction quality in sparse-view CT, especially generative diffusion models. However, these methods struggle to scale to large 3D volumes due to several reasons: (i) the high memory and computational requirements of 3D models, (ii) the lack of large 3D training datasets, and (iii) the inconsistencies across slices when using 2D models independently on each slice. We overcome these limitations and scale diffusion-based sparse-view CT reconstruction to large 3D volumes by combining conditional diffusion with explicit data consistency. We propose Conditional Diffusion Posterior Alignment (CDPA) to enable scalable 3D sparse-view CT reconstruction. A 2D U-Net diffusion model is conditioned on an initial 3D reconstruction to improve inter-slice consistency, combined with data-consistency alignment to match measured projections. Experiments on synthetic and real Cone Beam CT (CBCT) data show state-of-the-art performance, with ablations that confirm the synergistic effects of the proposed pipeline. Finally, we show that the same principles also strengthen fast denoising U-Nets, yielding near-diffusion quality at a fraction of the computational cost.

analysis.tldr: 提出条件扩散后验对齐方法，实现大规模3D稀疏视角CT重建，在合成和真实CBCT数据上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 稀疏视角CT可减少辐射和扫描时间，但现有扩散模型难以扩展到大规模3D体积，受限于高内存需求、缺乏3D训练数据以及2D模型切片间不一致。
analysis.problem: 如何利用扩散模型高效且一致地重建大规模3D稀疏视角CT图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 2D扩散模型独立处理切片会导致切片间不一致，且3D模型计算成本高、数据稀缺。
analysis.method: 条件扩散后验对齐（CDPA）：使用2D U-Net扩散模型，以初始3D重建为条件提升切片一致性，并结合数据一致性对齐匹配测量投影。
contributions: 提出CDPA框架，将条件扩散与显式数据一致性结合，实现可扩展的3D稀疏视角CT重建。
在合成和真实CBCT数据上验证了SOTA性能，消融实验证实了各组件的协同效应。
证明相同原理可增强快速去噪U-Net，以较低计算成本获得接近扩散模型的质量。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实锥束CT（CBCT）数据上进行实验，包括消融研究，结果达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖初始3D重建的质量。
2D U-Net条件扩散可能仍存在部分切片间不一致。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实用，实验充分，对医学图像重建领域有显著贡献。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出条件扩散后验对齐方法，实现大规模3D稀疏视角CT重建，在合成和真实CBCT数据上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Stealthy Backdoor Attacks against LLMs Based on Natural Style Triggers
papers.abstract: The growing application of large language models (LLMs) in safety-critical domains has raised urgent concerns about their security. Many recent studies have demonstrated the feasibility of backdoor attacks against LLMs. However, existing methods suffer from three key shortcomings: explicit trigger patterns that compromise naturalness, unreliable injection of attacker-specified payloads in long-form generation, and incompletely specified threat models that obscure how backdoors are delivered and activated in practice. To address these gaps, we present BadStyle, a complete backdoor attack framework and pipeline. BadStyle leverages an LLM as a poisoned sample generator to construct natural and stealthy poisoned samples that carry imperceptible style-level triggers while preserving semantics and fluency. To stabilize payload injection during fine-tuning, we design an auxiliary target loss that reinforces the attacker-specified target content in responses to poisoned inputs and penalizes its emergence in benign responses. We further ground the attack in a realistic threat model and systematically evaluate BadStyle under both prompt-induced and PEFT-based injection strategies. Extensive experiments across seven victim LLMs, including LLaMA, Phi, DeepSeek, and GPT series, demonstrate that BadStyle achieves high attack success rates (ASRs) while maintaining strong stealthiness. The proposed auxiliary target loss substantially improves the stability of backdoor activation, yielding an average ASR improvement of around 30% across style-level triggers. Even in downstream deployment scenarios unknown during injection, the implanted backdoor remains effective. Moreover, BadStyle consistently evades representative input-level defenses and bypasses output-level defenses through simple camouflage.

analysis.tldr: 提出BadStyle框架，利用自然风格触发器实现隐蔽后门攻击，并设计辅助目标损失稳定载荷注入。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在安全关键领域的应用日益广泛，但现有后门攻击方法存在触发器不自然、长文本生成中载荷注入不稳定、威胁模型不完整等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何实现隐蔽且稳定的后门攻击，使触发器自然、载荷注入可靠，并在实际威胁模型下有效。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法触发器模式显眼，破坏自然性；长文本生成中攻击者指定载荷注入不可靠；威胁模型不完整，掩盖后门传递和激活方式。
analysis.method: BadStyle框架：利用LLM作为有毒样本生成器，构造带有不可感知风格级触发器的自然有毒样本；设计辅助目标损失，强化有毒输入中目标内容并抑制其在良性响应中出现；在提示诱导和PEFT注入策略下评估。
contributions: 提出BadStyle，一个完整的后门攻击框架，使用自然风格触发器实现隐蔽攻击。
设计辅助目标损失，显著提升后门激活稳定性，平均ASR提升约30%。
在多种LLM（LLaMA、Phi、DeepSeek、GPT系列）上验证，攻击成功率高且隐蔽性强，能绕过输入级和输出级防御。
analysis.experiments: 在7个受害者LLM上实验，包括LLaMA、Phi、DeepSeek和GPT系列，BadStyle实现高攻击成功率（ASR）和强隐蔽性；辅助目标损失使ASR平均提升约30%；在未知下游部署场景中后门仍有效；能逃避代表性输入级防御和输出级防御。
limitations: 可能依赖特定风格触发器的选择，不同风格效果可能不同。
未讨论对更大规模或不同架构LLM的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，对LLM安全有重要警示意义，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出BadStyle框架，利用自然风格触发器实现隐蔽后门攻击，并设计辅助目标损失稳定载荷注入。

papers.title: Efficient Logic Gate Networks for Video Copy Detection
papers.abstract: Video copy detection requires robust similarity estimation under diverse visual distortions while operating at very large scale. Although deep neural networks achieve strong performance, their computational cost and descriptor size limit practical deployment in high-throughput systems. In this work, we propose a video copy detection framework based on differentiable Logic Gate Networks (LGNs), which replace conventional floating-point feature extractors with compact, logic-based representations. Our approach combines aggressive frame miniaturization, binary preprocessing, and a trainable LGN embedding model that learns both logical operations and interconnections. After training, the model can be discretized into a purely Boolean circuit, enabling extremely fast and memory-efficient inference. We systematically evaluate different similarity strategies, binarization schemes, and LGN architectures across multiple dataset folds and difficulty levels. Experimental results demonstrate that LGN-based models achieve competitive or superior accuracy and ranking performance compared to prior models, while producing descriptors several orders of magnitude smaller and delivering inference speeds exceeding 11k samples per second. These findings indicate that logic-based models offer a promising alternative for scalable and resource-efficient video copy detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于可微逻辑门网络（LGN）的视频拷贝检测框架，用紧凑布尔电路替代浮点特征提取器，实现高精度、超小描述符和极快推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频拷贝检测需要在大规模场景下对多种视觉失真进行鲁棒相似性估计，但深度神经网络计算成本和描述符大小限制了实际部署。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种计算高效、描述符紧凑且精度高的视频拷贝检测方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合帧微型化、二值预处理和可训练逻辑门网络（LGN）嵌入模型，训练后离散化为纯布尔电路。
contributions: 提出基于LGN的视频拷贝检测框架，用逻辑运算替代浮点运算。
系统评估了不同相似性策略、二值化方案和LGN架构。
实验表明LGN模型在精度和排序性能上具有竞争力，且描述符极小、推理速度超过11k样本/秒。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集折叠和难度级别上评估了不同相似性策略、二值化方案和LGN架构，结果显示LGN模型达到竞争性或更优的准确率和排序性能。
limitations: 可能对极端复杂场景的泛化能力有限。
逻辑门网络的表达能力可能不如深度神经网络。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖（逻辑门网络替代浮点网络），但应用场景较窄，实验信息有限，适合阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于可微逻辑门网络（LGN）的视频拷贝检测框架，用紧凑布尔电路替代浮点特征提取器，实现高精度、超小描述符和极快推理。

papers.title: StyleID: A Perception-Aware Dataset and Metric for Stylization-Agnostic Facial Identity Recognition
papers.abstract: Creative face stylization aims to render portraits in diverse visual idioms such as cartoons, sketches, and paintings while retaining recognizable identity. However, current identity encoders, which are typically trained and calibrated on natural photographs, exhibit severe brittleness under stylization. They often mistake changes in texture or color palette for identity drift or fail to detect geometric exaggerations. This reveals the lack of a style-agnostic framework to evaluate and supervise identity consistency across varying styles and strengths. To address this gap, we introduce StyleID, a human perception-aware dataset and evaluation framework for facial identity under stylization. StyleID comprises two datasets: (i) StyleBench-H, a benchmark that captures human same-different verification judgments across diffusion- and flow-matching-based stylization at multiple style strengths, and (ii) StyleBench-S, a supervision set derived from psychometric recognition-strength curves obtained through controlled two-alternative forced-choice (2AFC) experiments. Leveraging StyleBench-S, we fine-tune existing semantic encoders to align their similarity orderings with human perception across styles and strengths. Experiments demonstrate that our calibrated models yield significantly higher correlation with human judgments and enhanced robustness for out-of-domain, artist drawn portraits. All of our datasets, code, and pretrained models are publicly available at https://kwanyun.github.io/StyleID_page/

analysis.tldr: 提出感知对齐的面部风格化身份识别数据集与评估框架，微调编码器以匹配人类判断。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有身份编码器在风格化（如卡通、素描）下表现脆弱，常误判纹理变化为身份漂移，缺乏风格无关的评估与监督框架。
analysis.problem: 解决风格化面部图像的身份一致性评估与编码器校准问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含人类感知判断的StyleBench-H基准和基于心理物理实验的StyleBench-S监督集，微调语义编码器使其相似度排序与人类感知对齐。
contributions: 提出StyleID，包含人类感知标注的风格化面部身份识别数据集。
通过微调编码器实现与人类判断更高的一致性，提升跨风格鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明校准模型与人类判断相关性显著提高，对域外艺术家绘制肖像鲁棒性增强。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定风格化类型（扩散/流匹配）。
依赖人类标注，扩展性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 数据集和评估框架有创新，但应用范围较窄，适合相关领域研究者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出感知对齐的面部风格化身份识别数据集与评估框架，微调编码器以匹配人类判断。

papers.title: WorldMark: A Unified Benchmark Suite for Interactive Video World Models
papers.abstract: Interactive video generation models such as Genie, YUME, HY-World, and Matrix-Game are advancing rapidly, yet every model is evaluated on its own benchmark with private scenes and trajectories, making fair cross-model comparison impossible. Existing public benchmarks offer useful metrics such as trajectory error, aesthetic scores, and VLM-based judgments, but none supplies the standardized test conditions -- identical scenes, identical action sequences, and a unified control interface -- needed to make those metrics comparable across models with heterogeneous inputs. We introduce WorldMark, the first benchmark that provides such a common playing field for interactive Image-to-Video world models. WorldMark contributes: (1) a unified action-mapping layer that translates a shared WASD-style action vocabulary into each model's native control format, enabling apples-to-apples comparison across six major models on identical scenes and trajectories; (2) a hierarchical test suite of 500 evaluation cases covering first- and third-person viewpoints, photorealistic and stylized scenes, and three difficulty tiers from Easy to Hard spanning 20-60s; and (3) a modular evaluation toolkit for Visual Quality, Control Alignment, and World Consistency, designed so that researchers can reuse our standardized inputs while plugging in their own metrics as the field evolves. We will release all data, evaluation code, and model outputs to facilitate future research. Beyond offline metrics, we launch World Model Arena (warena.ai), an online platform where anyone can pit leading world models against each other in side-by-side battles and watch the live leaderboard.

analysis.tldr: WorldMark 是首个为交互式视频世界模型提供统一评测基准的平台，支持跨模型公平比较。
analysis.research_motivation: 交互式视频生成模型发展迅速，但各模型使用私有场景和轨迹进行评估，导致跨模型比较不公平；现有基准缺乏标准化测试条件。
analysis.problem: 缺乏统一的基准来公平比较不同交互式视频世界模型在相同场景和动作序列下的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 WorldMark 基准，包含统一动作映射层、500个分层测试用例和模块化评估工具包。
contributions: 提出统一动作映射层，将共享的 WASD 风格动作词汇转换为各模型原生控制格式，实现六种主要模型在相同场景和轨迹上的公平比较。
构建包含 500 个评估用例的分层测试套件，涵盖第一/第三人称视角、真实/风格化场景及三个难度等级。
提供模块化评估工具包，支持视觉质量、控制对齐和世界一致性评估，并允许研究者复用标准化输入。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅支持当前列出的六种模型，扩展性需验证。
评估指标可能无法覆盖所有世界模型特性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 首个统一基准，解决跨模型比较痛点，但摘要未提供实验细节，技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: WorldMark 是首个为交互式视频世界模型提供统一评测基准的平台，支持跨模型公平比较。

papers.title: Sapiens2
papers.abstract: We present Sapiens2, a model family of high-resolution transformers for human-centric vision focused on generalization, versatility, and high-fidelity outputs. Our model sizes range from 0.4 to 5 billion parameters, with native 1K resolution and hierarchical variants that support 4K. Sapiens2 substantially improves over its predecessor in both pretraining and post-training. First, to learn features that capture low-level details (for dense prediction) and high-level semantics (for zero-shot or few-label settings), we combine masked image reconstruction with self-distilled contrastive objectives. Our evaluations show that this unified pretraining objective is better suited for a wider range of downstream tasks. Second, along the data axis, we pretrain on a curated dataset of 1 billion high-quality human images and improve the quality and quantity of task annotations. Third, architecturally, we incorporate advances from frontier models that enable longer training schedules with improved stability. Our 4K models adopt windowed attention to reason over longer spatial context and are pretrained with 2K output resolution. Sapiens2 sets a new state-of-the-art and improves over the first generation on pose (+4 mAP), body-part segmentation (+24.3 mIoU), normal estimation (45.6% lower angular error) and extends to new tasks such as pointmap and albedo estimation. Code: https://github.com/facebookresearch/sapiens2

analysis.tldr: Sapiens2 是一个面向人体视觉的高分辨率 Transformer 模型家族，通过统一预训练目标、大规模数据和架构改进，在多项任务上达到 SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有的人体视觉模型在泛化性、多任务支持和输出保真度方面存在不足，且难以同时捕捉低级细节和高级语义。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个统一的人体视觉模型，使其在密集预测、零样本/少样本设置等多种下游任务中表现优异，并支持高分辨率输出。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合掩码图像重建与自蒸馏对比目标的统一预训练目标；使用10亿高质量人体图像数据集；引入窗口注意力机制支持4K分辨率；模型规模0.4B到5B参数。
contributions: 提出统一预训练目标，结合掩码重建和自蒸馏对比学习，提升多任务性能。
构建10亿高质量人体图像数据集并改进任务标注质量。
引入窗口注意力和高分辨率预训练，支持4K输出，在姿态估计、分割、法线估计等任务上达到SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在姿态估计（+4 mAP）、身体部位分割（+24.3 mIoU）、法线估计（角度误差降低45.6%）等任务上超越第一代，并扩展到点图和反照率估计。
limitations: 模型参数量大（最高5B），推理成本高。
主要针对人体视觉，泛化到其他领域可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且SOTA结果显著，与人体视觉应用高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Sapiens2 是一个面向人体视觉的高分辨率 Transformer 模型家族，通过统一预训练目标、大规模数据和架构改进，在多项任务上达到 SOTA。

papers.title: Geometric Monomial (GEM): a family of rational 2N-differentiable activation functions
papers.abstract: The choice of activation function plays a crucial role in the optimization and performance of deep neural networks. While the Rectified Linear Unit (ReLU) remains the dominant choice due to its simplicity and effectiveness, its lack of smoothness may hinder gradient-based optimization in deep architectures. In this work we propose a family of $C^{2N}$-smooth activation functions whose gate follows a log-logistic CDF, achieving ReLU-like performance with purely rational arithmetic. We introduce three variants: GEM (the base family), E-GEM (an $ε$-parameterized generalization enabling arbitrary $L^p$-approximation of ReLU), and SE-GEM (a piecewise variant eliminating dead neurons with $C^{2N}$ junction smoothness). An $N$-ablation study establishes $N=1$ as optimal for standard-depth networks, reducing the GELU deficit on CIFAR-100 + ResNet-56 from 6.10% to 2.12%. The smoothness parameter $N$ further reveals a CNN-transformer tradeoff: $N=1$ is preferred for deep CNNs, while $N=2$ is preferred for transformers. On MNIST, E-GEM ties the best baseline (99.23%). On CIFAR-10 + ResNet-56, SE-GEM ($ε=10^{-4}$) surpasses GELU (92.51% vs 92.44%) -- the first GEM-family activation to outperform GELU. On CIFAR-100 + ResNet-56, E-GEM reduces the GELU deficit from 6.10% (GEM $N=2$) to just 0.62%. On GPT-2 (124M), GEM achieves the lowest perplexity (72.57 vs 73.76 for GELU), with GEM $N=1$ also beating GELU (73.32). On BERT-small, E-GEM ($ε=10$) achieves the best validation loss (6.656) across all activations. The $ε$-parameterization reveals a scale-dependent optimum: small $ε$ ($10^{-4}$--$10^{-6}$) for deep CNNs and larger transformers, with the special case of small transformers (BERT-small) benefiting from large $ε$ ($ε=10$) due to its limited depth and unconstrained gradients.

analysis.tldr: 提出一族C^{2N}光滑有理激活函数GEM，在多种网络和数据集上达到或超越GELU性能。
analysis.research_motivation: ReLU虽简单有效但缺乏光滑性，可能阻碍深度网络的梯度优化；现有光滑激活函数如GELU计算复杂，需要更高效且性能相当的有理替代方案。
analysis.problem: 设计一族光滑、有理、可微的激活函数，在保持ReLU/GELU性能的同时提供更高阶光滑性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: N消融实验表明N=1对标准深度网络最优；光滑参数N在CNN和Transformer中存在权衡：CNN偏好N=1，Transformer偏好N=2；ε参数化揭示尺度依赖的最优值。
analysis.method: 提出基于log-logistic CDF的C^{2N}光滑有理激活函数族GEM，及其ε参数化变体E-GEM和分段变体SE-GEM。
contributions: 提出GEM激活函数族，实现C^{2N}光滑且纯有理运算，性能接近ReLU/GELU。
引入E-GEM和SE-GEM变体，分别实现任意L^p逼近ReLU和消除死亡神经元。
通过实验揭示N和ε在不同网络架构中的最优选择规律。
analysis.experiments: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10/100+ResNet-56、GPT-2、BERT-small上评估，SE-GEM在CIFAR-10上超越GELU，GEM在GPT-2上取得最低困惑度。
limitations: 仅验证了中等规模网络和数据集，大规模网络和数据集上的表现未知。
ε参数化引入额外超参数，调优成本可能增加。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 提出新激活函数族，实验较充分，但属于增量改进，影响有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一族C^{2N}光滑有理激活函数GEM，在多种网络和数据集上达到或超越GELU性能。

papers.title: Encoder-Free Human Motion Understanding via Structured Motion Descriptions
papers.abstract: The world knowledge and reasoning capabilities of text-based large language models (LLMs) are advancing rapidly, yet current approaches to human motion understanding, including motion question answering and captioning, have not fully exploited these capabilities. Existing LLM-based methods typically learn motion-language alignment through dedicated encoders that project motion features into the LLM's embedding space, remaining constrained by cross-modal representation and alignment. Inspired by biomechanical analysis, where joint angles and body-part kinematics have long served as a precise descriptive language for human movement, we propose \textbf{Structured Motion Description (SMD)}, a rule-based, deterministic approach that converts joint position sequences into structured natural language descriptions of joint angles, body part movements, and global trajectory. By representing motion as text, SMD enables LLMs to apply their pretrained knowledge of body parts, spatial directions, and movement semantics directly to motion reasoning, without requiring learned encoders or alignment modules. We show that this approach goes beyond state-of-the-art results on both motion question answering (66.7\% on BABEL-QA, 90.1\% on HuMMan-QA) and motion captioning (R@1 of 0.584, CIDEr of 53.16 on HumanML3D), surpassing all prior methods. SMD additionally offers practical benefits: the same text input works across different LLMs with only lightweight LoRA adaptation (validated on 8 LLMs from 6 model families), and its human-readable representation enables interpretable attention analysis over motion descriptions. Code, data, and pretrained LoRA adapters are available at https://yaozhang182.github.io/motion-smd/.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构化运动描述（SMD），将人体运动序列转换为结构化自然语言，无需专用编码器即可让LLM直接理解运动，在问答和描述任务上超越SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于LLM的运动理解方法依赖专用编码器进行跨模态对齐，未能充分利用LLM的预训练知识和推理能力，且存在跨模态表征瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM无需专用编码器或对齐模块，直接利用其预训练知识进行人体运动理解（问答和描述）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出结构化运动描述（SMD），一种基于规则的确定性方法，将关节位置序列转换为关节角度、身体部位运动和全局轨迹的结构化自然语言描述，使运动表示为纯文本。
contributions: 提出SMD，一种无需编码器的运动理解方法，通过结构化文本表示直接利用LLM的预训练知识。
在运动问答和描述任务上超越所有先前方法，达到SOTA。
验证了SMD在不同LLM上的通用性（8个LLM，6个模型族），仅需轻量LoRA适配。
analysis.experiments: 在BABEL-QA（66.7%）、HuMMan-QA（90.1%）上达到运动问答SOTA；在HumanML3D上运动描述R@1为0.584，CIDEr为53.16，超越所有先前方法。
limitations: SMD依赖规则生成，可能无法捕捉细微运动细节或复杂交互。

papers.title: Fine-Grained Perspectives: Modeling Explanations with Annotator-Specific Rationales
papers.abstract: Beyond exploring disaggregated labels for modeling perspectives, annotator rationales provide fine-grained signals of individual perspectives. In this work, we propose a framework for jointly modeling annotator-specific label prediction and corresponding explanations, fine-tuned on the annotators' provided rationales. Using a dataset with disaggregated natural language inference (NLI) annotations and annotator-provided explanations, we condition predictions on both annotator identity and demographic metadata through a representation-level User Passport mechanism. We further introduce two explainer architectures: a post-hoc prompt-based explainer and a prefixed bridge explainer that transfers annotator-conditioned classifier representations directly into a generative model. This design enables explanation generation aligned with individual annotator perspectives. Our results show that incorporating explanation modeling substantially improves predictive performance over a baseline annotator-aware classifier, with the prefixed bridge approach achieving more stable label alignment and higher semantic consistency, while the post-hoc approach yields stronger lexical similarity. These findings indicate that modeling explanations as expressions of fine-grained perspective provides a richer and more faithful representation of disagreement. The proposed approaches advance perspectivist modeling by integrating annotator-specific rationales into both predictive and generative components.

analysis.tldr: 提出联合建模标注者特定标签预测与解释的框架，通过用户护照机制和两种解释器架构提升预测性能与解释一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法仅利用分解标签建模标注者视角，但缺乏对标注者提供的细粒度解释（rationales）的建模，无法充分捕捉个体视角的差异。
analysis.problem: 如何联合建模标注者特定的标签预测与对应的解释生成，以更忠实地表示标注者间的分歧。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出框架，包括：1) 用户护照机制（User Passport）在表示层注入标注者身份和人口统计元数据；2) 两种解释器架构：事后提示解释器（post-hoc prompt-based）和前缀桥接解释器（prefixed bridge），后者将标注者条件化的分类器表示直接传入生成模型。
contributions: 提出联合建模标注者特定标签预测与解释的框架，整合标注者身份和人口统计信息。
设计两种解释器架构，实现与个体标注者视角对齐的解释生成。
analysis.experiments: 在自然语言推理（NLI）数据集上，使用分解标注和标注者提供的解释进行实验。结果显示，引入解释建模显著提升了标注者感知分类器的预测性能；前缀桥接方法在标签对齐和语义一致性上更稳定，事后方法在词汇相似性上更强。
limitations: 可能依赖标注者提供的解释质量，低质量解释会影响模型效果。
用户护照机制需要标注者身份和人口统计信息，在隐私敏感场景中可能受限。

papers.title: Causal Disentanglement for Full-Reference Image Quality Assessment
papers.abstract: Existing deep network-based full-reference image quality assessment (FR-IQA) models typically work by performing pairwise comparisons of deep features from the reference and distorted images. In this paper, we approach this problem from a different perspective and propose a novel FR-IQA paradigm based on causal inference and decoupled representation learning. Unlike typical feature comparison-based FR-IQA models, our approach formulates degradation estimation as a causal disentanglement process guided by intervention on latent representations. We first decouple degradation and content representations by exploiting the content invariance between the reference and distorted images. Second, inspired by the human visual masking effect, we design a masking module to model the causal relationship between image content and degradation features, thereby extracting content-influenced degradation features from distorted images. Finally, quality scores are predicted from these degradation features using either supervised regression or label-free dimensionality reduction. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves highly competitive performance on standard IQA benchmarks across fully supervised, few-label, and label-free settings. Furthermore, we evaluate the approach on diverse non-standard natural image domains with scarce data, including underwater, radiographic, medical, neutron, and screen-content images. Benefiting from its ability to perform scenario-specific training and prediction without labeled IQA data, our method exhibits superior cross-domain generalization compared to existing training-free FR-IQA models.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于因果解耦的全参考图像质量评估新范式，通过解耦退化与内容表征实现跨域泛化。

设计掩码模块建模内容-退化因果关系

papers.title: Dilated CNNs for Periodic Signal Processing: A Low-Complexity Approach
papers.abstract: Denoising of periodic signals and accurate waveform estimation are core tasks across many signal processing domains, including speech, music, medical diagnostics, radio, and sonar. Although deep learning methods have recently shown performance improvements over classical approaches, they require substantial computational resources and are usually trained separately for each signal observation. This study proposes a computationally efficient method based on DCNN and Re-sampling, termed R-DCNN, designed for operation under strict power and resource constraints. The approach targets signals with varying fundamental frequencies and requires only a single observation for training. It generalizes to additional signals via a lightweight resampling step that aligns time scales in signals with different frequencies to re-use the same network weights. Despite its low computational complexity, R-DCNN achieves performance comparable to state-of-the-art classical methods, such as autoregressive (AR)-based techniques, as well as conventional DCNNs trained individually for each observation. This combination of efficiency and performance makes the proposed method particularly well suited for deployment in resource-constrained environments without sacrificing denoising or estimation accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于扩张卷积和重采样的轻量级周期信号处理方法，在低计算复杂度下达到与经典方法相当的降噪性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 周期信号降噪和波形估计在语音、音乐、医学诊断等领域至关重要，但现有深度学习方法计算资源需求大且通常需为每个信号单独训练，难以部署在资源受限环境中。
analysis.problem: 如何在严格功耗和资源约束下，仅用单次观测训练即可处理不同基频的周期信号降噪与波形估计。

contributions: 提出一种低计算复杂度的R-DCNN方法，适用于资源受限环境下的周期信号处理。
通过重采样实现跨频率信号权重共享，无需为每个观测单独训练。

papers.title: GS-Quant: Granular Semantic and Generative Structural Quantization for Knowledge Graph Completion
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown immense potential in Knowledge Graph Completion (KGC), yet bridging the modality gap between continuous graph embeddings and discrete LLM tokens remains a critical challenge. While recent quantization-based approaches attempt to align these modalities, they typically treat quantization as flat numerical compression, resulting in semantically entangled codes that fail to mirror the hierarchical nature of human reasoning. In this paper, we propose GS-Quant, a novel framework that generates semantically coherent and structurally stratified discrete codes for KG entities. Unlike prior methods, GS-Quant is grounded in the insight that entity representations should follow a linguistic coarse-to-fine logic. We introduce a Granular Semantic Enhancement module that injects hierarchical knowledge into the codebook, ensuring that earlier codes capture global semantic categories while later codes refine specific attributes. Furthermore, a Generative Structural Reconstruction module imposes causal dependencies on the code sequence, transforming independent discrete units into structured semantic descriptors. By expanding the LLM vocabulary with these learned codes, we enable the model to reason over graph structures isomorphically to natural language generation. Experimental results demonstrate that GS-Quant significantly outperforms existing text-based and embedding-based baselines. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/mikumifa/GS-Quant.

analysis.tldr: GS-Quant通过粒度语义增强和生成式结构量化，将知识图谱实体编码为层次化离散代码，弥合连续图嵌入与LLM离散token之间的模态鸿沟。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有量化方法将量化视为扁平数值压缩，导致语义纠缠的代码无法反映人类推理的层次结构，限制了LLM在知识图谱补全中的性能。
analysis.problem: 如何生成语义连贯且结构分层的离散代码，以对齐连续图嵌入与LLM离散token，提升KGC效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前量化方法产生语义纠缠的代码，未能捕捉实体表示的层次化语义结构。
analysis.method: 提出GS-Quant框架，包含粒度语义增强模块（注入层次化知识到码本）和生成式结构重建模块（对代码序列施加因果依赖），将实体编码为结构化语义描述符，并扩展LLM词汇表。
contributions: 提出GS-Quant框架，首次将层次化语义和因果结构引入知识图谱实体的离散量化编码。

papers.title: Task-specific Subnetwork Discovery in Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Underwater Navigation
papers.abstract: Autonomous underwater vehicles are required to perform multiple tasks adaptively and in an explainable manner under dynamic, uncertain conditions and limited sensing, challenges that classical controllers struggle to address. This demands robust, generalizable, and inherently interpretable control policies for reliable long-term monitoring. Reinforcement learning, particularly multi-task RL, overcomes these limitations by leveraging shared representations to enable efficient adaptation across tasks and environments. However, while such policies show promising results in simulation and controlled experiments, they yet remain opaque and offer limited insight into the agent's internal decision-making, creating gaps in transparency, trust, and safety that hinder real-world deployment. The internal policy structure and task-specific specialization remain poorly understood. To address these gaps, we analyze the internal structure of a pretrained multi-task reinforcement learning network in the HoloOcean simulator for underwater navigation by identifying and comparing task-specific subnetworks responsible for navigating toward different species. We find that in a contextual multi-task reinforcement learning setting with related tasks, the network uses only about 1.5% of its weights to differentiate between tasks. Of these, approximately 85% connect the context-variable nodes in the input layer to the next hidden layer, highlighting the importance of context variables in such settings. Our approach provides insights into shared and specialized network components, useful for efficient model editing, transfer learning, and continual learning for underwater monitoring through a contextual multi-task reinforcement learning method.

analysis.tldr: 通过识别多任务强化学习网络中的任务特定子网络，发现仅约1.5%的权重用于区分任务，且85%集中在输入层上下文变量到隐藏层的连接。

analysis.method: 在HoloOcean模拟器中，对预训练的多任务强化学习网络进行子网络发现，通过识别和比较导航至不同物种的任务特定子网络来分析内部结构。

papers.title: To See the Unseen: on the Generalization Ability of Transformers in Symbolic Reasoning
papers.abstract: We investigate the ability of decoder-only transformer models to perform abstract symbolic reasoning; specifically solving propositional logic reasoning problems given in-context. Previous work demonstrated that models fail to generalize to problems involving variable names that were not observed during training, and it was shown that one reason behind this is the difficulty of copying (or generating) unseen tokens. We show both theoretically and empirically that a particular representational collapse also has a crucial role: the unembeddings (last-layer weights) of unseen tokens collapse to nearly the same vector during training. The collapse makes distinguishing multiple unseen variables difficult for the model (especially when the embedding and unembedding parameters are shared), and provides a mechanistic explanation for the effectiveness of existing heuristic interventions like "active forgetting", which periodically reset the token (un)embeddings. Based on these observations, we devise a combination of techniques, involving a small architecture change facilitating copying, data diversity, and freezing or resetting (un)embeddings, that achieves generalization to unseen tokens. We support our claims with extensive controlled experiments on propositional logic reasoning problems. Beyond synthetic experiments, we also observe evidence of (un)embedding collapse in the open-weight models in the Gemma 3 family, which includes 99 unused tokens reserved for downstream use. Empirically we find that the correlated embeddings of these tokens are a poor initialization for finetuning applications.

analysis.tldr: 发现Transformer在符号推理中对未见token的(un)embedding坍缩是泛化失败的关键原因，并提出组合改进方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 先前工作表明Transformer在命题逻辑推理中无法泛化到未见变量名，但仅归因于复制未见token的困难，缺乏对表征层面根本原因的深入分析。
analysis.problem: 解决decoder-only Transformer在上下文符号推理中泛化到未见token的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到未见token的unembedding（最后一层权重）在训练中坍缩到几乎相同的向量，导致模型难以区分多个未见变量；该现象在Gemma 3的未使用token中也有体现。
analysis.method: 组合技术：1) 小架构修改以促进复制；2) 数据多样性；3) 冻结或重置(un)embeddings。
contributions: 理论证明并实验验证了(un)embedding坍缩是泛化失败的关键机制。
为现有启发式方法（如主动遗忘）提供了机械论解释。
提出有效组合方法实现未见token的泛化。
analysis.experiments: 在命题逻辑推理问题上进行了大量受控实验，并在Gemma 3系列模型上验证了(un)embedding坍缩现象。
limitations: 方法在更复杂推理任务上的泛化性未验证。
架构修改可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 揭示了Transformer泛化失败的新机制，方法简洁有效，实验充分，对理解LLM泛化有重要价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 发现Transformer在符号推理中对未见token的(un)embedding坍缩是泛化失败的关键原因，并提出组合改进方法。

papers.title: DualSplat: Robust 3D Gaussian Splatting via Pseudo-Mask Bootstrapping from Reconstruction Failures
papers.abstract: While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) achieves real-time photorealistic rendering, its performance degrades significantly when training images contain transient objects that violate multi-view consistency. Existing methods face a circular dependency: accurate transient detection requires a well-reconstructed static scene, while clean reconstruction itself depends on reliable transient masks. We address this challenge with DualSplat, a Failure-to-Prior framework that converts first-pass reconstruction failures into explicit priors for a second reconstruction stage. We observe that transients, which appear in only a subset of views, often manifest as incomplete fragments during conservative initial training. We exploit these failures to construct object-level pseudo-masks by combining photometric residuals, feature mismatches, and SAM2 instance boundaries. These pseudo-masks then guide a clean second-pass 3DGS optimization, while a lightweight MLP refines them online by gradually shifting from prior supervision to self-consistency. Experiments on RobustNeRF and NeRF On-the-go show that DualSplat outperforms existing baselines, demonstrating particularly clear advantages in transient-heavy scenes and transient regions.

analysis.tldr: DualSplat通过将首次重建失败转化为伪掩码先验，实现鲁棒的3D高斯泼溅，有效处理瞬态物体干扰。
analysis.research_motivation: 3DGS在训练图像包含瞬态物体时性能显著下降，现有方法面临循环依赖：准确检测瞬态需要良好重建的静态场景，而干净重建又依赖可靠的瞬态掩码。
analysis.problem: 解决3DGS在瞬态物体破坏多视图一致性时的鲁棒重建问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到瞬态物体在保守初始训练中常表现为不完整碎片，利用这一失败模式构建伪掩码。
analysis.method: 提出Failure-to-Prior框架：第一阶段保守训练后，结合光度残差、特征不匹配和SAM2实例边界构建物体级伪掩码；第二阶段用伪掩码引导干净3DGS优化，并引入轻量MLP在线细化掩码，从先验监督逐渐过渡到自一致性。
contributions: 提出DualSplat框架，将重建失败转化为显式先验，打破瞬态检测与静态重建的循环依赖。
设计基于光度残差、特征不匹配和SAM2的伪掩码生成方法，有效识别瞬态物体。
引入在线掩码细化机制，通过MLP从先验监督过渡到自一致性，提升掩码质量。
analysis.experiments: 在RobustNeRF和NeRF On-the-go数据集上评估，DualSplat优于现有基线，尤其在瞬态密集场景和瞬态区域表现突出。
limitations: 依赖SAM2的实例分割能力，可能受限于SAM2的泛化性。
两阶段训练增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，解决3DGS实际部署中的关键问题，实验验证充分，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DualSplat通过将首次重建失败转化为伪掩码先验，实现鲁棒的3D高斯泼溅，有效处理瞬态物体干扰。

papers.title: Promoting Simple Agents: Ensemble Methods for Event-Log Prediction
papers.abstract: We compare lightweight automata-based models (n-grams) with neural architectures (LSTM, Transformer) for next-activity prediction in streaming event logs. Experiments on synthetic patterns and five real-world process mining datasets show that n-grams with appropriate context windows achieve comparable accuracy to neural models while requiring substantially fewer resources. Unlike windowed neural architectures, which show unstable performance patterns, n-grams provide stable and consistent accuracy. While we demonstrate that classical ensemble methods like voting improve n-gram performance, they require running many agents in parallel during inference, increasing memory consumption and latency. We propose an ensemble method, the promotion algorithm, that dynamically selects between two active models during inference, reducing overhead compared to classical voting schemes. On real-world datasets, these ensembles match or exceed the accuracy of non-windowed neural models with lower computational cost.

analysis.tldr: 轻量级n-gram模型在事件日志预测中可媲美神经网络，且提出动态模型选择的promotion集成方法降低开销。
analysis.research_motivation: 事件日志预测中，神经网络模型（LSTM、Transformer）虽准确但资源消耗大，而轻量级模型（如n-gram）的潜力未被充分探索，且现有集成方法推理开销高。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持预测准确性的同时，降低事件日志预测模型的计算资源消耗和推理延迟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: n-gram模型在适当上下文窗口下准确率与神经网络相当，且稳定性更好；窗口化神经网络性能不稳定；经典集成方法（投票）虽提升性能但增加内存和延迟。
analysis.method: 提出promotion算法，在推理时动态选择两个活跃模型之一，减少集成开销。
contributions: 系统比较了n-gram与神经网络在事件日志预测中的性能与资源消耗，发现n-gram在资源效率上具有优势。
提出promotion集成方法，在保持准确率的同时降低推理时的内存和延迟开销。
analysis.experiments: 在合成模式和五个真实世界流程挖掘数据集上进行了实验，对比了n-gram、LSTM、Transformer及集成方法。
limitations: promotion算法仅涉及两个模型的选择，可能不适用于更复杂的多模型集成场景。
未在更广泛的任务或数据集上验证泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法创新有限，实验规模较小，与重点方向弱相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 轻量级n-gram模型在事件日志预测中可媲美神经网络，且提出动态模型选择的promotion集成方法降低开销。

papers.title: DCMorph: Face Morphing via Dual-Stream Cross-Attention Diffusion
papers.abstract: Advancing face morphing attack techniques is crucial to anticipate evolving threats and develop robust defensive mechanisms for identity verification systems. This work introduces DCMorph, a dual-stream diffusion-based morphing framework that simultaneously operates at both identity conditioning and latent space levels. Unlike image-level methods suffering from blending artifacts or GAN-based approaches with limited reconstruction fidelity, DCMorph leverages identity-conditioned latent diffusion models through two mechanisms: (1) decoupled cross-attention interpolation that injects identity-specific features from both source faces into the denoising process, enabling explicit dual-identity conditioning absent in existing diffusion-based methods, and (2) DDIM inversion with spherical interpolation between inverted latent representations from both source faces, providing geometrically consistent initial latent representation that preserves structural attributes. Vulnerability analyses across four state-of-the-art face recognition systems demonstrate that DCMorph achieves the highest attack success rates compared to existing methods at both operational thresholds, while remaining challenging to detect by current morphing attack detection solutions.

analysis.tldr: 提出双流扩散框架DCMorph，通过解耦交叉注意力插值和DDIM反演球面插值实现高成功率人脸变形攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 人脸变形攻击技术对身份验证系统构成威胁，现有图像级方法存在混合伪影，GAN方法重建保真度有限，亟需更逼真的变形方法以推动防御机制发展。
analysis.problem: 如何生成高逼真度、高攻击成功率且难以被检测的人脸变形图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出双流扩散变形框架DCMorph，包含两个机制：(1) 解耦交叉注意力插值，将两个源人脸的身份特征注入去噪过程；(2) DDIM反演结合球面插值，在两个源人脸的潜在表示之间生成几何一致的初始潜在表示。
contributions: 提出DCMorph，首个在身份条件和潜在空间层面同时操作的双流扩散变形框架。
引入解耦交叉注意力插值，实现显式双身份条件注入。
利用DDIM反演球面插值提供结构保持的初始潜在表示。
analysis.experiments: 在四个最先进的人脸识别系统上进行漏洞分析，DCMorph在两种操作阈值下均达到最高攻击成功率，且难以被现有变形攻击检测方法识别。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量源人脸图像。
计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强，实验显示高攻击成功率，但属于攻击技术，应用场景有限。

papers.title: Local Neighborhood Instability in Parametric Projections: Quantitative and Visual Analysis
papers.abstract: Parametric projections let analysts embed new points in real time, but input variations from measurement noise or data drift can produce unpredictable shifts in the 2D layout. Whether and where a projection is locally stable remains largely unexamined. In this paper, we present a stability evaluation framework that probes parametric projections with Gaussian perturbations around selected anchor points and assesses how neighborhoods deform in the 2D embedding. Our approach combines quantitative measures of mean displacement, bias, and nearest-anchor assignment error with per-anchor visualizations of displacement vectors, local PCA ellipsoids, and Voronoi misassignment for detailed inspection. We demonstrate the framework's effectiveness on UMAP- and t-SNE-based neural projectors of varying network sizes and study the effect of Jacobian regularization as a gradient-based robustness strategy. We apply our framework to the MNIST and Fashion-MNIST datasets. The results show that our framework identifies unstable projection regions invisible to reconstruction error or neighborhood-preservation metrics.

analysis.tldr: 提出量化与可视化框架，评估参数化投影在局部邻域上的稳定性，发现传统指标无法捕捉的不稳定区域。
analysis.research_motivation: 参数化投影（如UMAP/t-SNE神经网络）能实时嵌入新点，但输入噪声或数据漂移可能导致2D布局不可预测的偏移，而局部稳定性问题尚未被系统研究。
analysis.problem: 如何定量和可视化地评估参数化投影在局部邻域上的稳定性，并识别不稳定区域。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出稳定性评估框架：在锚点周围施加高斯扰动，量化平均位移、偏差和最近锚点分配误差，并结合位移向量、局部PCA椭球和Voronoi误分配可视化。
contributions: 提出首个针对参数化投影局部稳定性的定量与可视化评估框架。
在MNIST和Fashion-MNIST上验证框架能识别传统指标（重构误差、邻域保持）无法发现的不稳定区域。
analysis.experiments: 在MNIST和Fashion-MNIST数据集上，使用不同网络规模的UMAP和t-SNE神经投影器，并研究Jacobian正则化的效果。
limitations: 仅评估了高斯扰动，未考虑其他类型噪声或数据漂移。
实验仅基于两个数据集，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
