papers.title: VARestorer: One-Step VAR Distillation for Real-World Image Super-Resolution
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in visual autoregressive models (VAR) have demonstrated their effectiveness in image generation, highlighting their potential for real-world image super-resolution (Real-ISR). However, adapting VAR for ISR presents critical challenges. The next-scale prediction mechanism, constrained by causal attention, fails to fully exploit global low-quality (LQ) context, resulting in blurry and inconsistent high-quality (HQ) outputs. Additionally, error accumulation in the iterative prediction severely degrades coherence in ISR task. To address these issues, we propose VARestorer, a simple yet effective distillation framework that transforms a pre-trained text-to-image VAR model into a one-step ISR model. By leveraging distribution matching, our method eliminates the need for iterative refinement, significantly reducing error propagation and inference time. Furthermore, we introduce pyramid image conditioning with cross-scale attention, which enables bidirectional scale-wise interactions and fully utilizes the input image information while adapting to the autoregressive mechanism. This prevents later LQ tokens from being overlooked in the transformer. By fine-tuning only 1.2\% of the model parameters through parameter-efficient adapters, our method maintains the expressive power of the original VAR model while significantly enhancing efficiency. Extensive experiments show that VARestorer achieves state-of-the-art performance with 72.32 MUSIQ and 0.7669 CLIPIQA on DIV2K dataset, while accelerating inference by 10 times compared to conventional VAR inference.

analysis.tldr: 提出VARestorer，将预训练文本到图像VAR模型蒸馏为一步式真实图像超分辨率模型，通过分布匹配和金字塔图像条件实现高效高质量重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉自回归模型（VAR）在图像生成中表现优异，但直接用于真实图像超分辨率（Real-ISR）时，因果注意力限制全局低质量上下文利用，且迭代预测导致误差累积和推理缓慢。
analysis.problem: 如何将预训练VAR模型高效适配为一步式Real-ISR模型，同时避免因果注意力的局限和迭代误差传播。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出VAR的下一尺度预测机制受因果注意力约束，无法充分利用全局低质量上下文，导致输出模糊且不一致；迭代预测中的误差累积严重损害ISR任务的连贯性。
analysis.method: 提出VARestorer蒸馏框架：1）利用分布匹配将预训练文本到图像VAR模型转化为一步式ISR模型，消除迭代细化；2）引入金字塔图像条件与跨尺度注意力，实现双向尺度交互，充分利用输入图像信息并适应自回归机制。仅微调1.2%参数。
contributions: 提出VARestorer，首个将VAR模型蒸馏为一步式Real-ISR模型的框架，通过分布匹配消除迭代推理。
设计金字塔图像条件与跨尺度注意力，解决因果注意力对全局上下文利用不足的问题。
在DIV2K数据集上达到SOTA性能（MUSIQ 72.32，CLIPIQA 0.7669），推理速度提升10倍。
analysis.experiments: 在DIV2K数据集上评估，使用MUSIQ和CLIPIQA指标，与现有方法对比达到SOTA，推理加速10倍。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练VAR模型的质量，泛化性需进一步验证。
仅微调1.2%参数，可能限制对特定退化模式的适应能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（一步蒸馏+金字塔条件），实验SOTA且效率提升显著，与图像生成/超分方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VARestorer，将预训练文本到图像VAR模型蒸馏为一步式真实图像超分辨率模型，通过分布匹配和金字塔图像条件实现高效高质量重建。

papers.title: AI-Gram: When Visual Agents Interact in a Social Network
papers.abstract: We present AI-Gram, a fully deployed, continuously operating social platform where every participant is an autonomous LLM-driven agent generating and responding to visual content. Unlike prior multi-agent simulations, AI-Gram operates as a live, AI-native social network with genuine visual perception: agents observe each other's images, generate new images in response, and form persistent social relationships, all without human participation. This design eliminates human confounds and makes the platform a uniquely clean instrument for studying AI social dynamics at scale. Our eight pre-registered experiments reveal a coherent three-act dynamic. Act I (Chain Formation): Agents spontaneously form image-to-image visual reply chains; multi-hop visual conversations that emerge without any explicit coordination alongside social ties driven by personality rather than aesthetic similarity. Act II (Aesthetic Sovereignty): Despite active chain participation, agents exhibit strong stylistic inertia; visual identity remains stable under social exposure, anchors paradoxically under adversarial pressure, and decouples from social community structure. Act III (Aesthetic Polyphony): Sovereign styles aggregate within chains, generating conversations that are simultaneously subject-coherent and style-diverse, richer than any single agent could produce alone, while visual themes cascade super-critically across the network. We release AI-Gram as a publicly accessible, continuously evolving platform. https://ai-gram.ai/

analysis.tldr: AI-Gram 是一个完全由 LLM 驱动的视觉 Agent 组成的社交网络，用于研究无人类参与下的 AI 社交动态。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多智能体模拟通常引入人类混淆因素，难以在纯净环境中大规模研究 AI 社交行为。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个无人类参与的、持续运行的 AI 社交网络，以观察视觉 Agent 之间的交互和社交动态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示了三个阶段的动态：链式形成（自发视觉回复链）、美学主权（风格惯性稳定）、美学复调（风格多样性与主题级联）。
analysis.method: 构建 AI-Gram 平台，所有参与者均为 LLM 驱动的视觉 Agent，通过观察和生成图像进行交互，并形成持久社交关系。
contributions: 提出并部署了首个完全由 AI Agent 组成的视觉社交网络平台 AI-Gram。
通过八个预注册实验揭示了视觉 Agent 社交动态的三阶段模式。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述了八个预注册实验揭示的三阶段动态。
limitations: 可能缺乏与人类社交网络的对比分析。
Agent 行为可能受限于底层 LLM 的能力和偏见。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 新颖的 AI 社交网络平台，方法创新且实验设计系统，但技术细节和实验结果未充分披露。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI-Gram 是一个完全由 LLM 驱动的视觉 Agent 组成的社交网络，用于研究无人类参与下的 AI 社交动态。

papers.title: HiCrew: Hierarchical Reasoning for Long-Form Video Understanding via Question-Aware Multi-Agent Collaboration
papers.abstract: Long-form video understanding remains fundamentally challenged by pervasive spatiotemporal redundancy and intricate narrative dependencies that span extended temporal horizons. While recent structured representations compress visual information effectively, they frequently sacrifice temporal coherence, which is critical for causal reasoning. Meanwhile, existing multi-agent frameworks operate through rigid, pre-defined workflows that fail to adapt their reasoning strategies to question-specific demands. In this paper, we introduce HiCrew, a hierarchical multi-agent framework that addresses these limitations through three core contributions. First, we propose a Hybrid Tree structure that leverages shot boundary detection to preserve temporal topology while performing relevance-guided hierarchical clustering within semantically coherent segments. Second, we develop a Question-Aware Captioning mechanism that synthesizes intent-driven visual prompts to generate precision-oriented semantic descriptions. Third, we integrate a Planning Layer that dynamically orchestrates agent collaboration by adaptively selecting roles and execution paths based on question complexity. Extensive experiments on EgoSchema and NExT-QA validate the effectiveness of our approach, demonstrating strong performance across diverse question types with particularly pronounced gains in temporal and causal reasoning tasks that benefit from our hierarchical structure-preserving design.

analysis.tldr: HiCrew通过层次化多智能体协作和问题感知机制，在长视频理解中显著提升了时序和因果推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 长视频理解面临时空冗余和复杂叙事依赖的挑战，现有结构化表示牺牲了时序连贯性，而多智能体框架采用固定工作流，无法适应问题特定需求。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能够保留时序拓扑、适应问题复杂度并动态协调多智能体的长视频理解框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HiCrew层次化多智能体框架，包含混合树结构（Hybrid Tree）通过镜头边界检测保留时序拓扑并进行相关性聚类、问题感知字幕机制（Question-Aware Captioning）生成意图驱动的语义描述、规划层（Planning Layer）根据问题复杂度动态选择角色和执行路径。
contributions: 提出混合树结构，在语义一致片段内进行相关性聚类并保留时序拓扑。
开发问题感知字幕机制，合成意图驱动的视觉提示以生成精准语义描述。
集成规划层，根据问题复杂度动态编排多智能体协作。
analysis.experiments: 在EgoSchema和NExT-QA数据集上验证有效性，在时序和因果推理任务上表现突出。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的镜头边界检测。
层次化结构可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验验证有效，与视频理解方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HiCrew通过层次化多智能体协作和问题感知机制，在长视频理解中显著提升了时序和因果推理能力。

papers.title: MeshLAM: Feed-Forward One-Shot Animatable Textured Mesh Avatar Reconstruction
papers.abstract: We introduce MeshLAM, a feed-forward framework for one-shot animatable mesh head reconstruction that generates high-fidelity, animatable 3D head avatars from a single image. Unlike previous work that relies on time-consuming test-time optimization or extensive multi-view data, our method produces complete mesh representations with inherent animatability from a single image in a single forward pass. Our approach employs a dual shape and texture map architecture that simultaneously processes mesh vertices and texture map with extracted image features from a shared transformer backbone, allowing for coherent shape carving and appearance modeling. To prevent mesh collapse and ensure topological integrity during feed-forward deformation, we propose an iterative GRU-based decoding mechanism with progressive geometry deformation and texture refinement, coupled with a novel reprojection-based texture guidance mechanism that anchors appearance learning to the input image. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in reconstruction quality, animation capability, and computational efficiency. Project page at https://meshlam.github.io.

analysis.tldr: MeshLAM 从单张图像前馈生成可动画化的高保真 3D 头部网格头像，无需测试时优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法依赖耗时的测试时优化或大量多视图数据，难以实现高效的单图像可动画化头像重建。
analysis.problem: 从单张图像高效重建具有内在可动画化能力的完整网格头部头像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用双形状和纹理图架构，通过共享 Transformer 骨干提取图像特征，同时处理网格顶点和纹理图；提出基于 GRU 的迭代解码机制实现渐进式几何变形和纹理细化，以及基于重投影的纹理引导机制。
contributions: 提出 MeshLAM，首个前馈式单图像可动画化网格头部头像重建框架。
设计双形状纹理图架构和 GRU 迭代解码机制，确保拓扑完整性和高质量重建。

limitations: 可能对极端姿态或遮挡的鲁棒性有限。

papers.title: 2L-LSH: A Locality-Sensitive Hash Function-Based Method For Rapid Point Cloud Indexing
papers.abstract: The development of 3D scanning technology has enabled the acquisition of massive point cloud models with diverse structures and large scales, thereby presenting significant challenges in point cloud processing. Fast neighboring points search is one of the most common problems, which is frequently used in model reconstruction, classification, retrieval and feature visualization. Hash function is well known for its high-speed and accurate performance in searching high-dimensional data, which is also the core of the proposed 2L-LSH. Specifically, the 2L-LSH algorithm adopts a two-step hash function strategy, in which the popular step divides the bounding box of the point cloud model and the second step constructs a generalized table-based data structure. The proposed 2L-LSH offers a highly efficient and accurate solution for fast neighboring points search in large-scale 3D point cloud models, making it a promising technique for various applications in the field. The proposed algorithm is compared with the well-known methods including Kd-tree and Octree; the obtained results demonstrated that the proposed method outperforms Kd-tree and Octree in terms of speed, i.e. the time consumption of kNN search can be 51.111% and 94.159% lower than Kd-tree and Octree, respectively. And the RN search time can be 54.519% and 41.840% lower than Kd-tree and Octree, respectively.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于局部敏感哈希的两步哈希函数方法2L-LSH，用于大规模点云快速近邻搜索，速度显著优于Kd-tree和Octree。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D扫描技术发展使点云模型规模巨大、结构多样，快速近邻搜索成为点云处理中的常见瓶颈，现有方法如Kd-tree和Octree在大规模数据上速度不足。
analysis.problem: 如何实现大规模3D点云模型中快速且准确的近邻点搜索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出2L-LSH算法，采用两步哈希函数策略：第一步划分点云模型的包围盒，第二步构建基于广义表的数据结构。
contributions: 提出2L-LSH算法，结合两步哈希实现高效点云近邻搜索。
实验证明2L-LSH在kNN搜索和RN搜索上速度均优于Kd-tree和Octree。
analysis.experiments: 在点云数据上对比Kd-tree和Octree，kNN搜索时间降低51.111%和94.159%，RN搜索时间降低54.519%和41.840%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于静态点云，未讨论动态场景。

papers.title: UHR-DETR: Efficient End-to-End Small Object Detection for Ultra-High-Resolution Remote Sensing Imagery
papers.abstract: Ultra-High-Resolution (UHR) imagery has become essential for modern remote sensing, offering unprecedented spatial coverage. However, detecting small objects in such vast scenes presents a critical dilemma: retaining the original resolution for small objects causes prohibitive memory bottlenecks. Conversely, conventional compromises like image downsampling or patch cropping either erase small objects or destroy context. To break this dilemma, we propose UHR-DETR, an efficient end-to-end transformer-based detector designed for UHR imagery. First, we introduce a Coverage-Maximizing Sparse Encoder that dynamically allocates finite computational resources to informative high-resolution regions, ensuring maximum object coverage with minimal spatial redundancy. Second, we design a Global-Local Decoupled Decoder. By integrating macroscopic scene awareness with microscopic object details, this module resolves semantic ambiguities and prevents scene fragmentation. Extensive experiments on the UHR imagery datasets (e.g., STAR and SODA-A) demonstrate the superiority of UHR-DETR under strict hardware constraints (e.g., a single 24GB RTX 3090). It achieves a 2.8\% mAP improvement while delivering a 10$\times$ inference speedup compared to standard sliding-window baselines on the STAR dataset. Our codes and models will be available at https://github.com/Li-JingFang/UHR-DETR.

analysis.tldr: 提出UHR-DETR，一种用于超高分辨率遥感图像小目标检测的高效端到端Transformer检测器，通过稀疏编码和全局-局部解耦解码器解决内存瓶颈和上下文丢失问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 超高分辨率遥感图像中小目标检测面临两难：保留原始分辨率导致内存瓶颈，而下采样或裁剪会丢失小目标或破坏上下文。现有方法无法兼顾效率与精度。
analysis.problem: 在超高分辨率遥感图像中高效检测小目标，同时避免内存瓶颈和上下文丢失。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，直接处理超高分辨率图像会导致内存瓶颈，而传统妥协方法（如下采样或裁剪）会丢失小目标或破坏场景上下文。
analysis.method: 提出UHR-DETR，包含两个核心模块：1) Coverage-Maximizing Sparse Encoder，动态分配计算资源到信息丰富的高分辨率区域，最大化目标覆盖并减少空间冗余；2) Global-Local Decoupled Decoder，融合宏观场景感知与微观细节，解决语义模糊和场景碎片化。
contributions: 提出UHR-DETR，首个针对超高分辨率遥感图像小目标检测的高效端到端Transformer检测器。
设计Coverage-Maximizing Sparse Encoder和Global-Local Decoupled Decoder，在严格硬件约束下实现精度和速度的显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 在STAR和SODA-A数据集上，单张RTX 3090上UHR-DETR相比标准滑动窗口基线在STAR数据集上mAP提升2.8%，推理速度提升10倍。
limitations: 可能对极端高分辨率或密集小目标场景的泛化性需进一步验证。
稀疏编码策略可能在某些场景下遗漏稀疏分布的目标。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且效果显著，与遥感图像分析方向高度相关。

papers.title: Brief chatbot interactions produce lasting changes in human moral values
papers.abstract: Moral judgements form the foundation of human social behavior and societal systems. While Artificial Intelligence chatbots increasingly serve as personal advisors, their influence on moral judgments remains largely unexplored. Here, we examined whether directive AI conversations shift moral evaluations using a within-subject naturalistic paradigm. Fifty-three participants rated moral scenarios, then discussed four with a chatbot prompted to shift moral judgments and four with a control agent. The brief conversations induced significant directional shifts in moral judgments, accepting stricter standards as well as advocating greater leniency (ps < 0.05; Cohen's d = 0.735-1.576), with increasing strengths of this effect during a two-week follow-up (Cohen's d = 1.038-2.069). Critically, the control condition produced no changes, and the effects did not extend to punishment while participants remained unaware of the persuasive intent, and both agents were rated equally likable and convincing, suggesting a vulnerability to undetected and lasting manipulation of foundational moral values.

analysis.tldr: 简短聊天机器人对话能显著且持久地改变人类道德判断，且参与者未察觉被操控。
analysis.research_motivation: AI聊天机器人日益成为个人顾问，但其对道德判断的影响尚不清楚，存在潜在的社会风险。
analysis.problem: 探究定向AI对话是否能改变人类的道德评价，以及这种改变是否持久且可被察觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：定向对话显著改变道德判断（效应量中等至大），且效果在两周后增强；控制条件无变化；参与者未察觉说服意图，且对两个机器人的喜好和说服力评分相同。
analysis.method: 采用被试内自然主义范式，53名参与者先对道德场景评分，然后与定向改变道德判断的聊天机器人或控制代理讨论四个场景，并在两周后跟踪测量。
contributions: 首次实验证明简短AI对话能持久改变人类道德价值观。
揭示这种改变在参与者无意识下发生，且效果随时间增强，凸显潜在风险。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及统计显著性（p<0.05）和效应量（Cohen's d范围）。
limitations: 样本量较小（53人），可能限制泛化性。
仅测试了单一聊天机器人设置，未探索不同模型或对话风格的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations

papers.title: Pre-process for segmentation task with nonlinear diffusion filters
papers.abstract: This paper deals with the case of using nonlinear diffusion filters to obtain piecewise constant images as a previous process for segmentation techniques. We first show an intrinsic formulation for the nonlinear diffusion equation to provide some design conditions on the diffusion filters. According to this theoretical framework, we propose a new family of diffusivities; they are obtained from nonlinear diffusion techniques and are related with backward diffusion. Their goal is to split the image in closed contours with a homogenized grey intensity inside and with no blurred edges. We also prove that our filters satisfy the well-posedness semi-discrete and full discrete scale-space requirements. This shows that by using semi-implicit schemes, a forward nonlinear diffusion equation is solved, instead of a backward nonlinear diffusion equation, connecting with an edge-preserving process. Under the conditions established for the diffusivity and using a stopping criterion for the diffusion time, we get piecewise constant images with a low computational effort. Finally, we test our filter with real images and we illustrate the effects of our diffusivity function as a method to get piecewise constant images. The code is available at https://github.com/cplatero/NonlinearDiffusion.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于非线性扩散滤波的预处理方法，用于生成分段常数图像以提升分割效果。

analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

contributions: 给出了非线性扩散方程的内在公式化表达，为扩散滤波器设计提供了理论条件。
提出一种新的扩散系数族，能够生成封闭轮廓且边缘不模糊的分段常数图像。
证明了所提滤波器满足半离散和全离散尺度空间适定性要求。

papers.title: Differentially Private De-identification of Dutch Clinical Notes: A Comparative Evaluation
papers.abstract: Protecting patient privacy in clinical narratives is essential for enabling secondary use of healthcare data under regulations such as GDPR and HIPAA. While manual de-identification remains the gold standard, it is costly and slow, motivating the need for automated methods that combine privacy guarantees with high utility. Most automated text de-identification pipelines employed named entity recognition (NER) to identify protected entities for redaction. Although methods based on differential privacy (DP) provide formal privacy guarantees, more recently also large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for text de-identification in the clinical domain. In this work, we present the first comparative study of DP, NER, and LLMs for Dutch clinical text de-identification. We investigate these methods separately as well as hybrid strategies that apply NER or LLM preprocessing prior to DP, and assess performance in terms of privacy leakage and extrinsic evaluation (entity and relation classification). We show that DP mechanisms alone degrade utility substantially, but combining them with linguistic preprocessing, especially LLM-based redaction, significantly improves the privacy-utility trade-off.

analysis.tldr: 首次系统比较差分隐私、命名实体识别和大语言模型在荷兰语临床文本去标识化中的表现，发现结合LLM预处理可显著改善隐私-效用权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床文本去标识化是合规利用医疗数据的关键，但手动方法成本高、速度慢；现有自动化方法缺乏隐私保证与实用性的系统比较，尤其是针对荷兰语等非英语场景。
analysis.problem: 如何在荷兰语临床文本去标识化中平衡隐私保护（差分隐私）与下游任务效用（实体/关系分类）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 纯差分隐私机制严重损害数据效用；结合NER或LLM预处理（尤其是LLM）可大幅改善隐私-效用权衡。
analysis.method: 比较三种方法：差分隐私（DP）、命名实体识别（NER）、大语言模型（LLM），以及混合策略（NER/LLM预处理后加DP），在荷兰语临床文本上进行隐私泄露评估和外在任务（实体/关系分类）评测。
contributions: 首次对DP、NER和LLM在荷兰语临床文本去标识化中进行系统比较
提出并评估混合策略（NER/LLM预处理+DP），证明LLM预处理能显著改善隐私-效用权衡
analysis.experiments: 在荷兰语临床文本上评估隐私泄露和外在任务（实体/关系分类）性能。
limitations: 仅针对荷兰语，可能不直接推广到其他语言
未提供具体数据集规模和模型细节
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 首次系统比较DP、NER和LLM在荷兰语临床去标识化中的表现，方法清晰但实验细节有限，对隐私保护领域有参考价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次系统比较差分隐私、命名实体识别和大语言模型在荷兰语临床文本去标识化中的表现，发现结合LLM预处理可显著改善隐私-效用权衡。

papers.title: FairQE: Multi-Agent Framework for Mitigating Gender Bias in Translation Quality Estimation
papers.abstract: Quality Estimation (QE) aims to assess machine translation quality without reference translations, but recent studies have shown that existing QE models exhibit systematic gender bias. In particular, they tend to favor masculine realizations in gender-ambiguous contexts and may assign higher scores to gender-misaligned translations even when gender is explicitly specified. To address these issues, we propose FairQE, a multi-agent-based, fairness-aware QE framework that mitigates gender bias in both gender-ambiguous and gender-explicit scenarios. FairQE detects gender cues, generates gender-flipped translation variants, and combines conventional QE scores with LLM-based bias-mitigating reasoning through a dynamic bias-aware aggregation mechanism. This design preserves the strengths of existing QE models while calibrating their gender-related biases in a plug-and-play manner. Extensive experiments across multiple gender bias evaluation settings demonstrate that FairQE consistently improves gender fairness over strong QE baselines. Moreover, under MQM-based meta-evaluation following the WMT 2023 Metrics Shared Task, FairQE achieves competitive or improved general QE performance. These results show that gender bias in QE can be effectively mitigated without sacrificing evaluation accuracy, enabling fairer and more reliable translation evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 提出多智能体框架FairQE，通过性别翻转和偏差感知聚合缓解翻译质量评估中的性别偏见。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有翻译质量评估模型存在系统性性别偏见，在性别模糊语境中偏好阳性表达，甚至在性别明确时给性别错配翻译更高分数，影响评估公平性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲评估准确性的前提下，有效缓解翻译质量评估中的性别偏见。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有QE模型在性别模糊语境中偏好阳性表达，且在性别明确时可能给性别错配翻译更高分数。
analysis.method: 提出FairQE多智能体框架，包含性别线索检测、性别翻转变体生成、基于LLM的偏差缓解推理和动态偏差感知聚合机制，以即插即用方式校准现有QE模型的性别偏见。
contributions: 提出首个多智能体公平感知QE框架FairQE，同时处理性别模糊和性别明确场景下的偏见。
设计动态偏差感知聚合机制，结合传统QE分数与LLM推理，在保持评估性能的同时提升公平性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个性别偏见评估设置上，FairQE持续优于强QE基线；在WMT 2023 Metrics Shared Task的MQM元评估中，取得有竞争力或更好的通用QE性能。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的推理质量，LLM本身可能存在偏见。
性别翻转策略可能不适用于所有语言对或复杂性别表达。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，实验充分，对公平性研究有实际价值，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多智能体框架FairQE，通过性别翻转和偏差感知聚合缓解翻译质量评估中的性别偏见。

papers.title: CSC: Turning the Adversary's Poison against Itself
papers.abstract: Poisoning-based backdoor attacks pose significant threats to deep neural networks by embedding triggers in training data, causing models to misclassify triggered inputs as adversary-specified labels while maintaining performance on clean data. Existing poison restraint-based defenses often suffer from inadequate detection against specific attack variants and compromise model utility through unlearning methods that lead to accuracy degradation. This paper conducts a comprehensive analysis of backdoor attack dynamics during model training, revealing that poisoned samples form isolated clusters in latent space early on, with triggers acting as dominant features distinct from benign ones. Leveraging these insights, we propose Cluster Segregation Concealment (CSC), a novel poison suppression defense. CSC first trains a deep neural network via standard supervised learning while segregating poisoned samples through feature extraction from early epochs, DBSCAN clustering, and identification of anomalous clusters based on class diversity and density metrics. In the concealment stage, identified poisoned samples are relabeled to a virtual class, and the model's classifier is fine-tuned using cross-entropy loss to replace the backdoor association with a benign virtual linkage, preserving overall accuracy. CSC was evaluated on four benchmark datasets against twelve poisoning-based attacks, CSC outperforms nine state-of-the-art defenses by reducing average attack success rates to near zero with minimal clean accuracy loss. Contributions include robust backdoor patterns identification, an effective concealment mechanism, and superior empirical validation, advancing trustworthy artificial intelligence.

analysis.tldr: 提出Cluster Segregation Concealment (CSC)防御方法，通过早期特征聚类隔离并重标后门样本，将攻击成功率降至接近零且几乎不损失干净准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 后门攻击威胁深度学习模型，现有防御方法检测不全面或通过遗忘机制导致模型效用下降，亟需更有效的防御策略。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著降低模型干净准确率的前提下，有效防御多种基于投毒的后门攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 中毒样本在训练早期就在潜在空间中形成孤立簇，且触发器作为主导特征与良性特征明显不同。
analysis.method: CSC方法：先通过标准监督训练，利用早期epoch的特征提取、DBSCAN聚类和基于类别多样性与密度的异常簇识别来隔离中毒样本；然后在隐藏阶段将中毒样本重标为虚拟类，用交叉熵损失微调分类器，将后门关联替换为良性虚拟关联。
contributions: 提出CSC防御方法，有效识别后门模式并抑制攻击
在四个基准数据集上针对十二种攻击，将平均攻击成功率降至接近零且干净准确率损失极小
优于九种现有最先进防御方法
analysis.experiments: 在四个基准数据集上对十二种投毒攻击进行实验，CSC优于九种现有防御，平均攻击成功率接近零，干净准确率损失极小。
limitations: 可能对特定攻击变种或复杂触发模式效果有限
依赖早期epoch特征，可能受训练不稳定影响
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，防御效果显著，与安全对齐方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Cluster Segregation Concealment (CSC)防御方法，通过早期特征聚类隔离并重标后门样本，将攻击成功率降至接近零且几乎不损失干净准确率。

papers.title: SemanticAgent: A Semantics-Aware Framework for Text-to-SQL Data Synthesis
papers.abstract: Existing text-to-SQL synthesis pipelines still conflate executability with semantic validity: syntactic checks and execution-based validation can retain queries that execute successfully while violating database semantics. To address these limitations, we propose SemanticAgent, a semantic-aware synthesis framework. SemanticAgent organizes synthesis around three specialized modules: an analyzer, a synthesizer, and a verifier. Through a three-stage protocol of semantic analysis, stepwise synthesis, and diagnostic refinement, SemanticAgent transforms execution-based validation alone into a traceable reasoning process. Our framework generates synthetic data that consistently outperforms prior synthesis methods under semantic-quality evaluation, leading to stronger downstream fine-tuning performance, especially on semantically demanding benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义感知框架SemanticAgent，通过分析-合成-验证三阶段协议提升Text-to-SQL数据合成的语义有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Text-to-SQL合成流程将可执行性与语义有效性混为一谈，语法检查和执行验证可能保留违反数据库语义的查询，导致合成数据质量不足。
analysis.problem: 如何生成语义有效的Text-to-SQL合成数据，避免仅依赖执行验证的局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SemanticAgent框架，包含分析器、合成器和验证器三个模块，通过语义分析、逐步合成和诊断精炼三阶段协议，将执行验证转化为可追溯的推理过程。
contributions: 提出语义感知的Text-to-SQL数据合成框架SemanticAgent，区分语义有效性与可执行性。
设计三阶段协议（语义分析、逐步合成、诊断精炼）提升合成数据的语义质量。
analysis.experiments: 在语义质量评估下，合成数据持续优于先前方法，并在下游微调中表现更强，尤其在语义要求高的基准上。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量语义分析模块，对复杂数据库模式适应性待验证。
三阶段协议可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，针对语义有效性这一关键问题，但实验细节不足，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义感知框架SemanticAgent，通过分析-合成-验证三阶段协议提升Text-to-SQL数据合成的语义有效性。

papers.title: S1-VL: Scientific Multimodal Reasoning Model with Thinking-with-Images
papers.abstract: We present S1-VL, a multimodal reasoning model for scientific domains that natively supports two complementary reasoning paradigms: Scientific Reasoning, which relies on structured chain-of-thought, and Thinking-with-Images, which enables the model to actively manipulate images through Python code execution during reasoning. In the Thinking-with-Images mode, the model generates and executes image-processing code in a sandbox environment, obtains intermediate visual results, and continues reasoning in a multi-turn iterative manner. This design is particularly effective for challenging scenarios such as high-resolution scientific chart interpretation, microscopic image understanding, and geometry-assisted reasoning. To construct the training data, we collect scientific multimodal datasets spanning six disciplines: mathematics, physics, chemistry, astronomy, geography, and biology. We further develop a six-dimensional quality filtering framework for reasoning trajectories. To mitigate redundant, ineffective, and erroneous visual operations commonly found in existing datasets, we propose a multi-stage filtering pipeline together with an adaptive data routing strategy. This strategy converts samples with low visual information gain into pure Reasoning-mode data, enabling the model to learn when image operations are truly necessary. S1-VL is trained through a four-stage progressive pipeline: scientific multimodal SFT, Thinking-with-Images cold-start SFT, and two stages of reinforcement learning with SAPO. We build S1-VL-32B on top of Qwen3-VL-32B-Thinking and evaluate it on 13 benchmarks. Experimental results show that S1-VL-32B achieves state-of-the-art performance on all five Thinking-with-Images benchmarks, including HRBench-4K, HRBench-8K, MME-RealWorld-CN, MME-RealWorld-Lite, and V*, and outperforms compared systems on scientific reasoning benchmarks such as Physics and VRSBench.

analysis.tldr: 提出S1-VL，一种支持Thinking-with-Images的科学多模态推理模型，通过代码执行操作图像进行迭代推理，在多个基准上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有科学多模态推理模型主要依赖结构化思维链，缺乏主动操作图像的能力，难以处理高分辨率科学图表、微观图像等复杂场景。
analysis.problem: 如何让多模态推理模型在科学领域能够主动操作图像（如缩放、标注）以辅助推理，并避免无效的视觉操作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有数据集中存在冗余、无效和错误的视觉操作，需要过滤；模型需要学会判断何时真正需要图像操作。
analysis.method: 提出Thinking-with-Images范式，模型在推理时生成并执行Python图像处理代码，获取中间视觉结果并迭代推理；构建六维质量过滤框架和多阶段过滤管道，结合自适应数据路由策略；采用四阶段渐进训练流程（科学多模态SFT、Thinking-with-Images冷启动SFT、两阶段SAPO强化学习）。
contributions: 提出Thinking-with-Images推理范式，使模型能通过代码执行主动操作图像进行迭代推理。
构建六维质量过滤框架和多阶段过滤管道，配合自适应数据路由策略，减少无效视觉操作。
在13个基准上评估，S1-VL-32B在所有Thinking-with-Images基准和部分科学推理基准上达到SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在13个基准上评估，包括HRBench-4K、HRBench-8K、MME-RealWorld-CN、MME-RealWorld-Lite、V*等Thinking-with-Images基准，以及Physics、VRSBench等科学推理基准，S1-VL-32B达到SOTA。
limitations: 模型基于Qwen3-VL-32B-Thinking，可能受限于基座模型能力。
Thinking-with-Images模式依赖沙箱环境执行代码，可能带来额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，Thinking-with-Images范式新颖，实验充分且达到SOTA，与VLM方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出S1-VL，一种支持Thinking-with-Images的科学多模态推理模型，通过代码执行操作图像进行迭代推理，在多个基准上达到SOTA。

papers.title: You Only Gaussian Once: Controllable 3D Gaussian Splatting for Ultra-Densely Sampled Scenes
papers.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has revolutionized neural rendering, yet existing methods remain predominantly research prototypes ill-suited for production-level deployment. We identify a critical "Industry-Academia Gap" hindering real-world application: unpredictable resource consumption from heuristic Gaussian growth, the "sparsity shield" of current benchmarks that rewards hallucination over physical fidelity, and severe multi-sensor data pollution. To bridge this gap, we propose YOGO (You Only Gaussian Once), a system-level framework that reformulates the stochastic growth process into a deterministic, budget-aware equilibrium. YOGO integrates a novel budget controller for hardware-constrained resource allocation and an availability-registration protocol for robust multi-sensor fusion. To push the boundaries of reconstruction fidelity, we introduce Immersion v1.0, the first ultra-dense indoor dataset specifically designed to break the "sparsity shield." By providing saturated viewpoint coverage, Immersion v1.0 forces algorithms to focus on extreme physical fidelity rather than viewpoint interpolation, and enables the community to focus on the upper limits of high-fidelity reconstruction. Extensive experiments demonstrate that YOGO achieves state-of-the-art visual quality while maintaining a strictly deterministic profile, establishing a new standard for production-grade 3DGS. To facilitate reproducibility, part scenes of Immersion v1.0 dataset and source code of YOGO has been publicly released. The project link is https://jjrcn.github.io/yogo-project-home/

analysis.tldr: 提出YOGO框架，将3DGS从随机生长转为确定性预算均衡，并发布超密集室内数据集Immersion v1.0以突破稀疏性屏障。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3DGS方法存在资源消耗不可预测、基准数据集稀疏性导致模型依赖插值而非物理保真度、多传感器数据污染等问题，阻碍了生产级部署。
analysis.problem: 如何实现资源可控、高保真且鲁棒的多传感器融合的3D高斯泼溅重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前基准存在“稀疏性屏障”，即稀疏视角下模型倾向于幻觉而非物理真实；多传感器数据污染严重；高斯增长过程随机导致资源不可控。
analysis.method: YOGO框架：将随机增长过程重构为确定性、预算感知的均衡，包含预算控制器（硬件约束资源分配）和可用性注册协议（鲁棒多传感器融合）。
contributions: 提出YOGO框架，实现资源可控的确定性3DGS重建，达到SOTA视觉质量。
发布Immersion v1.0超密集室内数据集，打破稀疏性屏障，推动高保真重建研究。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 超密集数据集采集成本高，可能限制泛化性。
预算控制器可能对极端硬件场景适应性不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（确定性预算均衡）和数据集贡献（超密集室内）均具较高价值，但摘要未提供实验细节，保守评分。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出YOGO框架，将3DGS从随机生长转为确定性预算均衡，并发布超密集室内数据集Immersion v1.0以突破稀疏性屏障。

papers.title: VG-CoT: Towards Trustworthy Visual Reasoning via Grounded Chain-of-Thought
papers.abstract: The advancement of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) requires precise local region-based reasoning that faithfully grounds the model's logic in actual visual evidence. However, existing datasets face limitations in scalability due to extensive manual annotation and lack of explicit alignment between multi-step reasoning and corresponding image regions, which constrains the evaluation of model trustworthiness. To address these challenges, we propose the Visual Grounding Chain-of-Thought (VG-CoT) dataset, which explicitly links each reasoning step to real visual evidence within the image through a fully automated three-stage pipeline. The pipeline first extracts object- and text-level visual evidence using state-of-the-art detection and OCR models, then generates step-by-step grounded reasoning with GPT-4o, and finally refines the grounding through a rationale-driven open-set detection process. In addition, we introduce a new benchmark that comprehensively evaluates LVLMs reasoning across three complementary dimensions: Rationale Quality, Answer Accuracy, and Reasoning-Answer Alignment. Experiments with representative LVLMs, including LLaVA-1.5 and Qwen2-VL, demonstrate consistent improvements on most evaluation metrics, confirming that VG-CoT effectively enhances trustworthy, evidence-based reasoning while maintaining scalable and cost-efficient dataset construction. The dataset and code will be released publicly upon acceptance to facilitate further research.

analysis.tldr: 提出 VG-CoT 数据集，通过自动化流水线将多步推理与图像区域显式对齐，提升 LVLM 的可信视觉推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉推理数据集依赖大量人工标注，且多步推理与图像区域缺乏显式对齐，限制了模型可信度的评估。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化构建将每个推理步骤与真实视觉证据显式链接的数据集，以支持可信视觉推理的评估与训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 全自动三阶段流水线：1) 用检测和OCR模型提取物体和文本级视觉证据；2) 用GPT-4o生成逐步接地推理；3) 通过理由驱动的开放集检测精化接地。
contributions: 提出 VG-CoT 数据集，自动化地将推理步骤与图像区域显式对齐。
引入新基准，从推理质量、答案准确性和推理-答案对齐三个维度评估 LVLM 推理。
analysis.experiments: 在 LLaVA-1.5 和 Qwen2-VL 等模型上实验，显示在多数指标上有一致改进。
limitations: 依赖 GPT-4o 生成推理，可能引入生成偏差。
开放集检测的泛化性可能受限于预训练模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 自动化构建接地推理数据集的方法新颖，基准设计全面，与 VLM 可信推理方向高度相关，实验验证有效。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 VG-CoT 数据集，通过自动化流水线将多步推理与图像区域显式对齐，提升 LVLM 的可信视觉推理能力。

papers.title: Supervised Learning Has a Necessary Geometric Blind Spot: Theory, Consequences, and Minimal Repair
papers.abstract: PGD adversarial training, the standard robustness method, can reduce Jacobian Frobenius norm yet worsen clean-input geometry (e.g., TDI 1.336 vs. ERM 1.093). We show this is not an implementation artifact but a theorem-level consequence of supervised learning. We prove that any encoder minimizing supervised loss must retain non-zero sensitivity along directions correlated with training labels, including directions that are nuisance at test time. This holds across proper scoring rules, architectures, and dataset sizes. We call this the geometric blind spot of supervised learning. This theorem unifies four empirical phenomena often treated separately: non-robust features, texture bias, corruption fragility, and the robustness-accuracy tradeoff. It also explains why suppressing sensitivity in one adversarial direction can redistribute sensitivity elsewhere. We introduce Trajectory Deviation Index (TDI), a diagnostic of geometric isotropy. Unlike CKA, intrinsic dimension, or Jacobian Frobenius norm alone, TDI captures the failure mode above. In our experiments, PGD attains low Frobenius norm but high TDI, while PMH attains the lowest TDI with one additional training term and no architectural changes. Across seven tasks, BERT/SST-2, and ImageNet ViT-B/16 (backbone family underlying CLIP/DINO/SAM), the blind spot is measurable and repairable. It appears at foundation-model scale, worsens with model scale and task-specific fine-tuning, and is substantially reduced by PMH. PMH also leads on non-Gaussian corruption types (blur/brightness/contrast) without corruption-specific training.

analysis.tldr: 监督学习存在几何盲点：任何最小化监督损失的编码器必须沿标签相关方向保持非零敏感性，这统一了非鲁棒特征、纹理偏差、腐败脆弱性和鲁棒性-准确性权衡等四个现象，并通过轨迹偏差指数（TDI）诊断，PMH方法可修复。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准鲁棒性方法（如PGD对抗训练）虽能降低Jacobian Frobenius范数，却可能恶化干净输入的几何性质（如TDI升高），且该现象并非实现伪影，而是监督学习的定理级后果，亟需理论解释与修复。
analysis.problem: 证明监督学习存在固有的几何盲点：编码器必须沿标签相关方向保持非零敏感性，导致对测试时无关方向（nuisance）的脆弱性，并统一多个经验现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: PGD对抗训练降低Jacobian Frobenius范数但提高TDI（1.336 vs ERM 1.093），表明敏感性被重新分布而非消除；该盲点随模型规模增大和任务微调而恶化，且在基础模型（如ViT-B/16）中可测量。
analysis.method: 提出轨迹偏差指数（TDI）作为几何各向同性诊断指标，并引入PMH（Probabilistic Margin Hardening）方法，通过一个额外训练项在不改变架构的情况下降低TDI。
contributions: 理论上证明监督学习存在几何盲点：任何最小化监督损失的编码器必须沿标签相关方向保持非零敏感性，该结论适用于多种评分规则、架构和数据集规模。
统一解释非鲁棒特征、纹理偏差、腐败脆弱性和鲁棒性-准确性权衡四个经验现象。
提出TDI诊断指标，并给出PMH修复方法，在BERT/SST-2和ImageNet ViT-B/16等任务上验证盲点可测量且可修复。
analysis.experiments: 在七个任务上验证，包括BERT/SST-2和ImageNet ViT-B/16（CLIP/DINO/SAM的骨干家族），PMH在非高斯腐败类型（模糊/亮度/对比度）上表现领先，无需腐败特定训练。
limitations: PMH方法仅在特定任务上验证，泛化性需进一步探索。
理论证明基于监督损失最小化，对自监督或强化学习等范式是否适用未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 理论创新强，统一多个现象并提供可诊断指标和修复方法，实验覆盖基础模型，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 监督学习存在几何盲点：任何最小化监督损失的编码器必须沿标签相关方向保持非零敏感性，这统一了非鲁棒特征、纹理偏差、腐败脆弱性和鲁棒性-准确性权衡等四个现象，并通过轨迹偏差指数（TDI）诊断，PMH方法可修复。

papers.title: From Noise to Intent: Anchoring Generative VLA Policies with Residual Bridges
papers.abstract: Bridging high-level semantic understanding with low-level physical control remains a persistent challenge in embodied intelligence, stemming from the fundamental spatiotemporal scale mismatch between cognition and action. Existing generative VLA policies typically adopt a "Generation-from-Noise" paradigm, which disregards this disparity, leading to representation inefficiency and weak condition alignment during optimization. In this work, we propose ResVLA, an architecture that shifts the paradigm to "Refinement-from-Intent." Recognizing that robotic motion naturally decomposes into global intent and local dynamics, ResVLA utilizes spectral analysis to decouple control into a deterministic low-frequency anchor and a stochastic high-frequency residual. By anchoring the generative process on the predicted intent, our model focuses strictly on refining local dynamics via a residual diffusion bridge. Extensive simulation experiments show that ResVLA achieves competitive performance, strong robustness to language and robot embodiment perturbations, and faster convergence than standard generative baselines. It also demonstrates strong performance in real-world robot experiments.

analysis.tldr: ResVLA通过残差扩散桥将生成式VLA策略从“噪声生成”范式转变为“意图精炼”，提升表征效率和条件对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 具身智能中高层语义理解与低层物理控制之间存在时空尺度不匹配，现有生成式VLA策略忽视这一差异，导致表征效率低和条件对齐弱。
analysis.problem: 如何解决生成式VLA策略中认知与动作的时空尺度不匹配问题，提高表征效率和条件对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ResVLA架构，利用频谱分析将机器人控制解耦为确定性低频意图和随机性高频残差，通过残差扩散桥在预测意图上精炼局部动力学。
contributions: 提出ResVLA架构，将生成式VLA策略从“噪声生成”范式转变为“意图精炼”范式。
利用频谱分析解耦控制为低频意图和高频残差，通过残差扩散桥实现高效精炼。
analysis.experiments: 在仿真和真实机器人实验中，ResVLA表现出竞争性能、对语言和机器人形态扰动的强鲁棒性，以及比标准生成基线更快的收敛速度。
limitations: 可能依赖频谱分析的准确性，对复杂动态场景的适应性待验证。
真实实验规模可能有限，泛化性需进一步评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，与VLA方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ResVLA通过残差扩散桥将生成式VLA策略从“噪声生成”范式转变为“意图精炼”，提升表征效率和条件对齐。

papers.title: EdgeFormer: local patch-based edge detection transformer on point clouds
papers.abstract: Edge points on 3D point clouds can clearly convey 3D geometry and surface characteristics, therefore, edge detection is widely used in many vision applications with high industrial and commercial demands. However, the fine-grained edge features are difficult to detect effectively as they are generally densely distributed or exhibit small-scale surface gradients. To address this issue, we present a learning-based edge detection network, named EdgeFormer, which mainly consists of two stages. Based on the observation that spatially neighboring points tend to exhibit high correlation, forming the local underlying surface, we convert the edge detection of the entire point cloud into a point classification based on local patches. Therefore, in the first stage, we construct local patch feature descriptors that describe the local neighborhood around each point. In the second stage, we classify each point by analyzing the local patch feature descriptors generated in the first stage. Due to the conversion of the point cloud into local patches, the proposed method can effectively extract the finer details. The experimental results show that our model demonstrates competitive performance compared to six baselines.

analysis.tldr: EdgeFormer通过将点云边缘检测转化为局部块分类，有效提取细粒度边缘特征。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D点云边缘检测在工业应用中需求高，但细粒度边缘特征因密集分布或小尺度梯度难以有效检测。
analysis.problem: 现有方法难以有效检测点云中密集或小尺度梯度的细粒度边缘点。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到空间邻近点具有高相关性，形成局部潜在表面，可将全局边缘检测转化为局部块分类。
analysis.method: 两阶段网络：第一阶段构建描述每个点局部邻域的局部块特征描述符，第二阶段基于这些描述符对每个点进行分类。
contributions: 提出EdgeFormer，将点云边缘检测转化为局部块分类，提升细粒度边缘提取能力。
在多个基准上相比六种基线方法取得有竞争力的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在点云边缘检测基准上与六种基线方法对比，EdgeFormer表现出有竞争力的性能。
limitations: 可能对局部块大小和特征描述符设计敏感。
未在真实工业场景中验证泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但实验信息有限，与重点方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EdgeFormer通过将点云边缘检测转化为局部块分类，有效提取细粒度边缘特征。

papers.title: Conjecture and Inquiry: Quantifying Software Performance Requirements via Interactive Retrieval-Augmented Preference Elicitation
papers.abstract: Since software performance requirements are documented in natural language, quantifying them into mathematical forms is essential for software engineering. Yet, the vagueness in performance requirements and uncertainty of human cognition have caused highly uncertain ambiguity in the interpretations, rendering their automated quantification an unaddressed and challenging problem. In this paper, we formalize the problem and propose IRAP, an approach that quantifies performance requirements into mathematical functions via interactive retrieval-augmented preference elicitation. IRAP differs from the others in that it explicitly derives from problem-specific knowledge to retrieve and reason the preferences, which also guides the progressive interaction with stakeholders, while reducing the cognitive overhead. Experiment results against 10 state-of-the-art methods on four real-world datasets demonstrate the superiority of IRAP on all cases with up to 40x improvements under as few as five rounds of interactions.

analysis.tldr: 提出IRAP方法，通过交互式检索增强偏好引导，将自然语言软件性能需求量化为数学函数，显著优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 软件性能需求以自然语言描述，量化成数学形式对软件工程至关重要，但需求模糊和认知不确定性导致自动化量化困难。
analysis.problem: 如何从自然语言性能需求中自动生成精确的数学函数，同时减少认知负担。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: IRAP：交互式检索增强偏好引导方法，通过问题特定知识检索和推理偏好，逐步与利益相关者交互，降低认知开销。
contributions: 形式化了软件性能需求量化问题。
提出了IRAP方法，利用检索增强偏好引导实现交互式量化。
analysis.experiments: 在四个真实数据集上与10种最先进方法对比，IRAP在所有案例中表现优越，仅需5轮交互即可实现高达40倍的改进。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的知识库进行检索。
交互轮次虽少但仍需人工参与。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验效果显著，但属于软件工程领域，与ML核心方向关联较弱。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出IRAP方法，通过交互式检索增强偏好引导，将自然语言软件性能需求量化为数学函数，显著优于现有方法。

papers.title: VLAA-GUI: Knowing When to Stop, Recover, and Search, A Modular Framework for GUI Automation
papers.abstract: Autonomous GUI agents face two fundamental challenges: early stopping, where agents prematurely declare success without verifiable evidence, and repetitive loops, where agents cycle through the same failing actions without recovery. We present VLAA-GUI, a modular GUI agentic framework built around three integrated components that guide the system on when to Stop, Recover, and Search. First, a mandatory Completeness Verifier enforces UI-observable success criteria and verification at every finish step -- with an agent-level verifier that cross-examines completion claims with decision rules, rejecting those lacking direct visual evidence. Second, a mandatory Loop Breaker provides multi-tier filtering: switching interaction mode after repeated failures, forcing strategy changes after persistent screen-state recurrence, and binding reflection signals to strategy shifts. Third, an on-demand Search Agent searches online for unfamiliar workflows by directly querying a capable LLM with search ability, returning results as plain text. We additionally integrate a Coding Agent for code-intensive actions and a Grounding Agent for precise action grounding, both invoked on demand when required. We evaluate VLAA-GUI across five top-tier backbones, including Opus 4.5, 4.6 and Gemini 3.1 Pro, on two benchmarks with Linux and Windows tasks, achieving top performance on both (77.5% on OSWorld and 61.0% on WindowsAgentArena). Notably, three of the five backbones surpass human performance (72.4%) on OSWorld in a single pass. Ablation studies show that all three proposed components consistently improve a strong backbone, while a weaker backbone benefits more from these tools when the step budget is sufficient. Further analysis also shows that the Loop Breaker nearly halves wasted steps for loop-prone models.

analysis.tldr: VLAA-GUI提出模块化GUI自动化框架，通过停止、恢复和搜索三个组件解决智能体过早停止和重复循环问题，在OSWorld和WindowsAgentArena上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主GUI智能体面临过早停止（无验证证据就声明成功）和重复循环（相同失败动作循环无恢复）两大挑战，现有方法缺乏系统性的停止、恢复和搜索机制。
analysis.problem: 如何设计模块化框架，使GUI智能体能够基于可验证证据决定何时停止、从失败循环中恢复以及搜索未知工作流。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到智能体存在过早停止和重复循环两种失败模式，且循环倾向模型浪费大量步骤。
analysis.method: 提出VLAA-GUI框架，包含三个核心组件：强制性完整性验证器（在每一步结束时检查UI可观察的成功标准）、强制性循环中断器（多层级过滤：切换交互模式、强制策略变化、绑定反思信号）和按需搜索代理（通过LLM搜索在线查询未知工作流）。此外集成编码代理和接地代理。
contributions: 提出模块化GUI自动化框架，集成停止、恢复和搜索三个组件。
在五个顶级骨干模型上评估，在OSWorld和WindowsAgentArena上达到SOTA，三个骨干单次超越人类表现。
消融实验验证三个组件均能提升强骨干性能，弱骨干在充足步数预算下获益更多。
analysis.experiments: 在OSWorld和WindowsAgentArena两个基准上，使用Opus 4.5、4.6和Gemini 3.1 Pro等五个骨干模型评估，VLAA-GUI达到77.5%和61.0%的准确率。三个骨干单次超越人类72.4%的OSWorld表现。消融实验显示所有组件一致提升性能，循环中断器将近乎减半循环模型的浪费步骤。
limitations: 摘要未提及跨平台泛化性，可能仅适用于Linux和Windows任务。
搜索代理依赖外部LLM，可能引入延迟和成本。

papers.title: mcdok at SemEval-2026 Task 13: Finetuning LLMs for Detection of Machine-Generated Code
papers.abstract: Multi-domain detection of the machine-generated code snippets in various programming languages is a challenging task. SemEval-2026 Task~13 copes with this challenge in various angles, as a binary detection problem as well as attribution of the source. Specifically, its subtasks also cover generator LLM family detection, as well as a hybrid code co-generated by humans and machines, or adversarially modified codes hiding its origin. Our submitted systems adjusted the existing mdok approach (focused on machine-generated text detection) to these specific kinds of problems by exploring various base models, more suitable for code understanding. The results indicate that the submitted systems are competitive in all three subtasks. However, the margins from the top-performing systems are significant, and thus further improvements are possible.

analysis.tldr: 微调LLM检测机器生成代码，在SemEval-2026任务13中取得有竞争力但非最优的结果。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器生成代码的检测对于维护代码安全性和原创性至关重要，但现有方法主要针对自然文本，缺乏对代码特性的适配。

analysis.method: 基于mdok方法，通过探索更适合代码理解的基础模型进行微调，适配代码检测任务。

papers.title: KD-CVG: A Knowledge-Driven Approach for Creative Video Generation
papers.abstract: Creative Generation (CG) leverages generative models to automatically produce advertising content that highlights product features, and it has been a significant focus of recent research. However, while CG has advanced considerably, most efforts have concentrated on generating advertising text and images, leaving Creative Video Generation (CVG) relatively underexplored. This gap is largely due to two major challenges faced by Text-to-Video (T2V) models: (a) \textbf{ambiguous semantic alignment}, where models struggle to accurately correlate product selling points with creative video content, and (b) \textbf{inadequate motion adaptability}, resulting in unrealistic movements and distortions. To address these challenges, we develop a comprehensive Advertising Creative Knowledge Base (ACKB) as a foundational resource and propose a knowledge-driven approach (KD-CVG) to overcome the knowledge limitations of existing models. KD-CVG consists of two primary modules: Semantic-Aware Retrieval (SAR) and Multimodal Knowledge Reference (MKR). SAR utilizes the semantic awareness of graph attention networks and reinforcement learning feedback to enhance the model's comprehension of the connections between selling points and creative videos. Building on this, MKR incorporates semantic and motion priors into the T2V model to address existing knowledge gaps. Extensive experiments have demonstrated KD-CVG's superior performance in achieving semantic alignment and motion adaptability, validating its effectiveness over other state-of-the-art methods. The code and dataset will be open source at https://kdcvg.github.io/KDCVG/.

analysis.tldr: 提出知识驱动的创意视频生成方法KD-CVG，通过构建广告创意知识库和双模块设计解决T2V模型的语义对齐与运动适应性问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有创意生成研究集中于文本和图像，视频生成领域探索不足，主要因为T2V模型在语义对齐和运动适应性上存在瓶颈。
analysis.problem: T2V模型在创意视频生成中难以准确关联产品卖点与视频内容，且生成的运动不真实、存在畸变。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出T2V模型面临两大挑战：模糊的语义对齐（难以将卖点与视频内容正确关联）和不足的运动适应性（导致不真实运动和畸变）。
analysis.method: 构建广告创意知识库ACKB，提出KD-CVG方法，包含语义感知检索（SAR）和多模态知识参考（MKR）两个模块，SAR利用图注意力网络和强化学习增强语义理解，MKR将语义和运动先验注入T2V模型。
contributions: 构建了广告创意知识库ACKB作为基础资源
提出KD-CVG方法，通过SAR和MKR模块分别解决语义对齐和运动适应性问题
实验证明KD-CVG在语义对齐和运动适应性上优于现有方法
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到大量实验证明KD-CVG在语义对齐和运动适应性上优于其他最先进方法，但未提供具体数值或数据集细节。
limitations: 可能依赖特定广告领域知识库，泛化性待验证
未提及计算开销或推理效率
