analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PLOTTER框架，在事件图和角色图上进行叙事规划，显著提升长文本叙事连贯性和逻辑一致性。

papers.title: CAP: Controllable Alignment Prompting for Unlearning in LLMs
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) trained on unfiltered corpora inherently risk retaining sensitive information, necessitating selective knowledge unlearning for regulatory compliance and ethical safety. However, existing parameter-modifying methods face fundamental limitations: high computational costs, uncontrollable forgetting boundaries, and strict dependency on model weight access. These constraints render them impractical for closed-source models, yet current non-invasive alternatives remain unsystematic and reliant on empirical experience. To address these challenges, we propose the Controllable Alignment Prompting for Unlearning (CAP) framework, an end-to-end prompt-driven unlearning paradigm. CAP decouples unlearning into a learnable prompt optimization process via reinforcement learning, where a prompt generator collaborates with the LLM to suppress target knowledge while preserving general capabilities selectively. This approach enables reversible knowledge restoration through prompt revocation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CAP achieves precise, controllable unlearning without updating model parameters, establishing a dynamic alignment mechanism that overcomes the transferability limitations of prior methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出CAP框架，通过强化学习优化提示词实现LLM可控遗忘，无需修改模型参数。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有参数修改方法计算成本高、遗忘边界不可控且依赖模型权重访问，不适用于闭源模型；非侵入方法缺乏系统性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改模型参数的前提下，实现精确、可控的知识遗忘，同时保持通用能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: CAP框架：通过强化学习将遗忘任务解耦为可学习的提示优化过程，提示生成器与LLM协作，抑制目标知识同时选择性保留通用能力，支持通过撤销提示恢复知识。
contributions: 提出端到端提示驱动的遗忘范式CAP，无需修改模型参数。
实现可逆的知识恢复机制，通过撤销提示恢复遗忘知识。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖提示生成器的质量，对复杂遗忘任务效果未知。
可逆性在多次遗忘后可能退化。

analysis.reason: 方法新颖且针对闭源模型遗忘问题有实际价值，但摘要缺乏实验细节。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CAP框架，通过强化学习优化提示词实现LLM可控遗忘，无需修改模型参数。

papers.title: Robust Cross-Domain WiFi Fall Detection via Physics-Driven Attention-Enhanced Transformers
papers.abstract: Device-free fall detection utilizing WiFi Channel State Information (CSI) has emerged as a promising, privacy-preserving solution for elderly health monitoring in the Internet of Things (IoT) era. However, existing deep learning approaches suffer from severe performance degradation when deployed in unseen environments due to static background overfitting and Non-Line-of-Sight (NLoS) signal attenuation. To address these critical bottlenecks, we propose a robust, domain-generalizable framework featuring a novel Attention-Enhanced CNN-Transformer hybrid architecture. First, we design a physics-driven \textbf{Dynamic Variance Gate (DVG)} to dynamically calculate local temporal variance, acting as a soft-attention mask that eliminates static environmental DC components while amplifying dynamic human motion. Second, we introduce a Physics-Aware Data Augmentation strategy to force the network to learn invariant morphological signatures rather than environment-specific noise. Furthermore, a Convolutional Block Attention Module (CBAM) is integrated to refine spatiotemporal features prior to Transformer-based sequence modeling. Extensive cross-domain evaluations across four distinct indoor environments demonstrate that our method achieves 97.6\% accuracy in NLoS scenarios and 98.8\% in completely unseen environments without target-domain fine-tuning. Finally, we deploy the proposed framework on an edge computing system equipped with commercial WiFi NICs. Real-world live inference field tests confirm the system's robustness against unseen environmental layouts and its capability for continuous, low-latency whole-home safety monitoring.

analysis.tldr: 提出物理驱动的注意力增强Transformer，实现跨域WiFi跌倒检测，在未见环境中达98.8%准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有WiFi跌倒检测方法在跨域场景下因静态背景过拟合和非视距信号衰减导致性能严重下降，亟需鲁棒的域泛化方案。
analysis.problem: 解决WiFi CSI跌倒检测在未知环境中的域泛化问题，克服静态背景干扰和NLoS衰减。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出静态背景过拟合和NLoS信号衰减是跨域性能下降的关键瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出物理驱动的动态方差门（DVG）消除静态分量，结合物理感知数据增强和CBAM注意力模块的CNN-Transformer混合架构。
contributions: 设计物理驱动的动态方差门（DVG）作为软注意力掩码，抑制静态背景并放大动态人体运动。
提出物理感知数据增强策略，迫使网络学习不变形态特征而非环境噪声。
在四个室内环境跨域评估中，NLoS场景达97.6%准确率，完全未见环境达98.8%准确率，并部署于边缘计算系统。
analysis.experiments: 在四个不同室内环境进行跨域评估，NLoS场景准确率97.6%，完全未见环境准确率98.8%，并在商用WiFi NIC边缘系统上完成实时现场测试。
limitations: 可能对极端遮挡或多人场景的泛化能力未提及。
物理感知数据增强的通用性可能受限于特定信号模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出物理驱动的注意力增强Transformer，实现跨域WiFi跌倒检测，在未见环境中达98.8%准确率。

papers.title: CorridorVLA: Explicit Spatial Constraints for Generative Action Heads via Sparse Anchors
papers.abstract: Vision--Language--Action (VLA) models often use intermediate representations to connect multimodal inputs with continuous control, yet spatial guidance is often injected implicitly through latent features. We propose $CorridorVLA$, which predicts sparse spatial anchors as incremental physical changes (e.g., $Δ$-positions) and uses them to impose an explicit tolerance region in the training objective for action generation. The anchors define a corridor that guides a flow-matching action head: trajectories whose implied spatial evolution falls outside it receive corrective gradients, while minor deviations from contacts and execution noise are permitted. On the more challenging LIBERO-Plus benchmark, CorridorVLA yields consistent gains across both SmolVLA and GR00T, improving success rate by $3.4\%$--$12.4\%$ over the corresponding baselines; notably, our GR00T-Corr variant reaches a success rate of $83.21\%$. These results indicate that action-aligned physical cues can provide direct and interpretable constraints for generative action policies, complementing spatial guidance encoded in visual or latent forms. Code is available at https://github.com/corridorVLA.

analysis.tldr: 通过稀疏锚点显式约束动作生成空间区域，提升VLA模型成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLA模型通常隐式注入空间引导，缺乏显式物理约束，导致动作生成不够精准。
analysis.problem: 如何为VLA模型的生成式动作头提供显式、可解释的空间约束。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 预测稀疏空间锚点（如Δ-位置）作为增量物理变化，在训练目标中定义容忍区域（corridor），引导流匹配动作头，对超出区域的轨迹施加校正梯度。
contributions: 提出CorridorVLA，利用稀疏锚点显式约束动作生成空间区域。
在LIBERO-Plus基准上，基于SmolVLA和GR00T均取得一致提升，GR00T-Corr变体达到83.21%成功率。
analysis.experiments: 在LIBERO-Plus基准上测试，CorridorVLA在SmolVLA和GR00T上分别提升3.4%-12.4%成功率，GR00T-Corr达到83.21%。
limitations: 可能依赖锚点预测的准确性。
仅在单一基准上验证，泛化性待考。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验提升显著，与VLA方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过稀疏锚点显式约束动作生成空间区域，提升VLA模型成功率。

papers.title: ReCAPA: Hierarchical Predictive Correction to Mitigate Cascading Failures
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action systems follow instructions to execute multi-step tasks in multimodal environments. Recent VLA approaches typically rely on post-hoc correction mechanisms or operate under fixed task decompositions and alignment schemes. However, once an intermediate step is mis-specified, local errors propagate through subsequent steps and eventually accumulate into cascading failures. To mitigate this compounding effect, we propose Predictive Alignment and Planning Architecture, a framework that uses prediction and contrast to adjust deviations across three levels: actions, subgoals, and trajectories. Semantic alignment is enforced at all levels using a Sinkhorn-based module and a Score-field module. The predictive correction and alignment jointly update the action generator during training, enabling it to adjust fine-grained steps to remain aligned with the overall intent. We further introduce two new metrics to quantify error propagation and recovery processes in tasks, capturing how mistakes spread and fade over long-horizon execution. Experiments show that ReCAPA achieves competitive results on embodied agent benchmarks such as VisualAgentBench, MineDojo, and AI2-THOR, outperforming strong proprietary and open-source Large Language Model baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出分层预测校正框架ReCAPA，通过动作、子目标、轨迹三级对齐缓解VLA系统中的级联失败。
analysis.research_motivation: VLA系统在多步任务中，中间步骤的局部错误会逐级传播并累积为级联失败，现有后验校正或固定分解方案无法有效抑制这种复合效应。
analysis.problem: 如何通过预测性校正和语义对齐，在动作、子目标和轨迹三个层次上抑制错误传播，避免级联失败。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出局部错误会通过后续步骤传播并累积，导致级联失败；现有后验校正或固定分解方案无法有效缓解。
analysis.method: 提出ReCAPA框架，包含预测对齐与规划架构，使用Sinkhorn模块和Score-field模块在动作、子目标、轨迹三级进行语义对齐，并通过预测校正联合更新动作生成器。
contributions: 提出分层预测校正框架ReCAPA，在动作、子目标、轨迹三级抑制级联失败。
引入两个新指标量化长程任务中的错误传播与恢复过程。
analysis.experiments: 在VisualAgentBench、MineDojo、AI2-THOR等具身智能基准上取得有竞争力的结果，超越强开源和闭源大语言模型基线。
limitations: 可能依赖任务分解的初始质量。
多级对齐的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 针对VLA级联失败问题提出分层预测校正方法，创新性和实验验证充分，与机器人/自动化方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分层预测校正框架ReCAPA，通过动作、子目标、轨迹三级对齐缓解VLA系统中的级联失败。

papers.title: SparKV: Overhead-Aware KV Cache Loading for Efficient On-Device LLM Inference
papers.abstract: Efficient inference for on-device Large Language Models (LLMs) remains challenging due to limited hardware resources and the high cost of the prefill stage, which processes the full input context to construct Key-Value (KV) caches. We present SparKV, an adaptive KV loading framework that combines cloud-based KV streaming with on-device computation. SparKV models the cost of individual KV chunks and decides whether each chunk should be streamed or computed locally, while overlapping the two execution paths to reduce latency. To handle fluctuations in wireless connectivity and edge resource availability, SparKV further refines offline-generated schedules at runtime to rebalance communication and computation costs. Experiments across diverse datasets, LLMs, and edge devices show that SparKV reduces Time-to-First-Token by 1.3$x-5.1x with negligible impact on response quality, while lowering per-request energy consumption by 1.5x to 3.3x, demonstrating its robustness and practicality for real-world on-device deployment.

analysis.tldr: SparKV通过开销感知的KV缓存加载策略，结合云端流式传输与本地计算，显著降低设备端LLM推理的首令牌延迟和能耗。
analysis.research_motivation: 设备端LLM推理受限于硬件资源，预填充阶段构建KV缓存开销大，现有方法难以平衡通信与计算成本。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地在设备端LLM推理中加载KV缓存，以降低首令牌延迟和能耗，同时保证响应质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SparKV框架，对KV块进行开销建模，决定每个块是流式传输还是本地计算，并重叠两条执行路径；运行时根据无线连接和边缘资源波动调整离线生成的调度。
contributions: 提出开销感知的KV缓存加载框架SparKV，结合云端流式传输与本地计算。
设计运行时调度细化机制，适应无线连接和资源波动。
analysis.experiments: 在多种数据集、LLM和边缘设备上实验，SparKV将首令牌延迟降低1.3倍至5.1倍，每请求能耗降低1.5倍至3.3倍，对响应质量影响可忽略。
limitations: 依赖云端流式传输，可能受网络稳定性影响。
开销模型可能需针对不同硬件调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，对设备端LLM推理有显著加速效果，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SparKV通过开销感知的KV缓存加载策略，结合云端流式传输与本地计算，显著降低设备端LLM推理的首令牌延迟和能耗。

papers.title: EngramaBench: Evaluating Long-Term Conversational Memory with Structured Graph Retrieval
papers.abstract: Large language model assistants are increasingly expected to retain and reason over information accumulated across many sessions. We introduce EngramaBench, a benchmark for long-term conversational memory built around five personas, one hundred multi-session conversations, and one hundred fifty queries spanning factual recall, cross-space integration, temporal reasoning, adversarial abstention, and emergent synthesis. We evaluate Engrama, a graph-structured memory system, against GPT-4o full-context prompting and Mem0, an open-source vector-retrieval memory system. All three use the same answering model (GPT-4o), isolating the effect of memory architecture. GPT-4o full-context achieves the highest composite score (0.6186), while Engrama scores 0.5367 globally but is the only system to score higher than full-context prompting on cross-space reasoning (0.6532 vs. 0.6291, n=30). Mem0 is cheapest but substantially weaker (0.4809). Ablations reveal that the components driving Engrama's cross-space advantage trade off against global composite score, exposing a systems-level tension between structured memory specialization and aggregate optimization.

analysis.tldr: 提出EngramaBench基准测试，评估图结构记忆系统Engrama在长期对话中的表现，发现其在跨空间推理上优于全上下文提示但整体得分较低。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型助手需要跨会话保留和推理信息，现有记忆系统缺乏标准化评估，且不同记忆架构对长期对话性能的影响尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估长期对话记忆系统，并分析图结构记忆与全上下文提示、向量检索记忆在多种推理任务上的性能差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Engrama在跨空间推理上超越全上下文提示，但全局得分较低，表明结构化记忆专业化与全局优化之间存在系统级权衡。
analysis.method: 构建包含5个角色、100个多会话对话和150个查询的基准EngramaBench，覆盖事实回忆、跨空间整合、时间推理、对抗性弃权和新兴综合五类任务；评估Engrama（图结构记忆）、GPT-4o全上下文提示和Mem0（向量检索记忆），使用相同回答模型GPT-4o。
contributions: 提出EngramaBench，一个用于长期对话记忆评估的基准，包含多样化的任务类型和会话数据。
通过实验揭示图结构记忆在跨空间推理上的优势及其与全局性能的权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在EngramaBench上比较Engrama、GPT-4o全上下文提示和Mem0，报告复合得分和分任务得分，并进行消融实验。摘要未提供具体实验结果细节。
limitations: 基准规模有限（5个角色、100个会话），可能不足以覆盖真实场景的多样性。
仅使用GPT-4o作为回答模型，未测试其他基础模型下的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 提出新的长期对话记忆基准，实验设计清晰，揭示了结构化记忆的权衡，但基准规模有限，整体贡献中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EngramaBench基准测试，评估图结构记忆系统Engrama在长期对话中的表现，发现其在跨空间推理上优于全上下文提示但整体得分较低。

papers.title: UAU-Net: Uncertainty-aware Representation Learning and Evidential Classification for Facial Action Unit Detection
papers.abstract: Facial action unit (AU) detection remains challenging because it involves heterogeneous, AU-specific uncertainties arising at both the representation and decision stages. Recent methods have improved discriminative feature learning, but they often treat the AU representations as deterministic, overlooking uncertainty caused by visual noise, subject-dependent appearance variations, and ambiguous inter-AU relationships, all of which can substantially degrade robustness. Meanwhile, conventional point-estimation classifiers often provide poorly calibrated confidence, producing overconfident predictions, especially under the severe label imbalance typical of AU datasets. We propose UAU-Net, an Uncertainty-aware AU detection framework that explicitly models uncertainty at both stages. At the representation stage, we introduce CV-AFE, a conditional VAE (CVAE)-based AU feature extraction module that learns probabilistic AU representations by jointly estimating feature means and variances across multiple spatio-temporal scales; conditioning on AU labels further enables CV-AFE to capture uncertainty associated with inter-AU dependencies. At the decision stage, we design AB-ENN, an Asymmetric Beta Evidential Neural Network for multi-label AU detection, which parameterizes predictive uncertainty with Beta distributions and mitigates overconfidence via an asymmetric loss tailored to highly imbalanced binary labels. Extensive experiments on BP4D and DISFA show that UAU-Net achieves strong AU detection performance, and further analyses indicate that modeling uncertainty in both representation learning and evidential prediction improves robustness and reliability.

analysis.tldr: 提出UAU-Net，通过不确定性感知的表征学习和证据分类提升面部动作单元检测的鲁棒性和可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 面部动作单元检测面临异质性、AU特定的不确定性，现有方法将AU表征视为确定性，忽略了视觉噪声、外观变化和AU间关系模糊带来的不确定性，且点估计分类器在标签不平衡下易产生过度自信的预测。
analysis.problem: 如何显式建模面部动作单元检测中表征和决策两个阶段的不确定性，以提升模型鲁棒性和校准性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法将AU表征视为确定性，导致对视觉噪声、外观变化和AU间关系模糊的鲁棒性不足；点估计分类器在标签不平衡下校准差，产生过度自信预测。
analysis.method: 提出UAU-Net，包含两个模块：1) CV-AFE，基于条件VAE的AU特征提取模块，学习概率性AU表征（均值和方差）；2) AB-ENN，非对称Beta证据神经网络，用Beta分布参数化预测不确定性，并通过非对称损失缓解标签不平衡。
contributions: 提出UAU-Net，首个在表征和决策阶段同时建模不确定性的AU检测框架。
设计CV-AFE模块，利用条件VAE学习概率性AU表征，捕捉多尺度时空不确定性。
设计AB-ENN模块，用Beta分布和不对称损失实现校准良好的多标签AU检测。
analysis.experiments: 在BP4D和DISFA数据集上实验，UAU-Net取得了强AU检测性能，进一步分析表明建模不确定性提升了鲁棒性和可靠性。
limitations: 可能依赖AU标签进行条件建模，对标签质量敏感。
计算复杂度可能较高，因涉及VAE和证据网络。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强，结合不确定性建模和证据分类，实验验证有效，但应用领域较专。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出UAU-Net，通过不确定性感知的表征学习和证据分类提升面部动作单元检测的鲁棒性和可靠性。

papers.title: Zero-Shot Detection of LLM-Generated Text via Implicit Reward Model
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities across various tasks. However, their ability to generate human-like text has raised concerns about potential misuse. This underscores the need for reliable and effective methods to detect LLM-generated text. In this paper, we propose IRM, a novel zero-shot approach that leverages Implicit Reward Models for LLM-generated text detection. Such implicit reward models can be derived from publicly available instruction-tuned and base models. Previous reward-based method relies on preference construction and task-specific fine-tuning. In comparison, IRM requires neither preference collection nor additional training. We evaluate IRM on the DetectRL benchmark and demonstrate that IRM can achieve superior detection performance, outperforms existing zero-shot and supervised methods in LLM-generated text detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种零样本检测LLM生成文本的方法，利用隐式奖励模型，无需偏好收集或额外训练。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM生成类人文本的能力引发潜在滥用风险，需要可靠有效的检测方法，而现有方法依赖偏好构建和任务微调，成本高且泛化性差。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖偏好数据或额外训练的情况下，零样本检测LLM生成的文本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从公开的指令微调模型和基础模型中提取隐式奖励模型（IRM），直接用于零样本检测，无需偏好收集或额外训练。
contributions: 提出IRM方法，利用隐式奖励模型进行零样本LLM文本检测。
在DetectRL基准上超越现有零样本和监督方法，无需额外训练。
analysis.experiments: 在DetectRL基准上评估，显示IRM在检测性能上优于现有零样本和监督方法。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构的隐式奖励质量。
未在更多样化的数据集或跨领域场景中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，零样本检测有重要应用价值，但实验细节有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种零样本检测LLM生成文本的方法，利用隐式奖励模型，无需偏好收集或额外训练。

papers.title: Sparse Forcing: Native Trainable Sparse Attention for Real-time Autoregressive Diffusion Video Generation
papers.abstract: We introduce Sparse Forcing, a training-and-inference paradigm for autoregressive video diffusion models that improves long-horizon generation quality while reducing decoding latency. Sparse Forcing is motivated by an empirical observation in autoregressive diffusion rollouts: attention concentrates on a persistent subset of salient visual blocks, forming an implicit spatiotemporal memory in the KV cache, and exhibits a locally structured block-sparse pattern within sliding windows. Building on this observation, we propose a trainable native sparsity mechanism that learns to compress, preserve, and update these persistent blocks while restricting computation within each local window to a dynamically selected local neighborhood. To make the approach practical at scale for both training and inference, we further propose Persistent Block-Sparse Attention (PBSA), an efficient GPU kernel that accelerates sparse attention and memory updates for low-latency, memory-efficient decoding. Experiments show that Sparse Forcing improves the VBench score by +0.26 over Self-Forcing on 5-second text-to-video generation while delivering a 1.11-1.17x decoding speedup and 42% lower peak KV-cache footprint. The gains are more pronounced on longer-horizon rollouts, delivering improved visual quality with +0.68 and +2.74 VBench improvements, and 1.22x and 1.27x speedups on 20-second and 1-minute generations, respectively.

analysis.tldr: 提出Sparse Forcing，一种用于自回归视频扩散模型的训练-推理范式，通过可训练的稀疏注意力机制提升长视频生成质量并降低解码延迟。
analysis.research_motivation: 自回归视频扩散模型在长序列生成中面临注意力计算开销大、KV缓存占用高的问题，现有方法难以兼顾生成质量和实时性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲生成质量的前提下，实现自回归视频扩散模型的高效稀疏注意力，以支持实时长视频生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到自回归扩散推理中注意力集中在少数显著视觉块上，形成隐式时空记忆，且在滑动窗口内呈现局部结构化块稀疏模式。
analysis.method: 提出Sparse Forcing范式，包含可训练的原生稀疏机制（学习压缩、保留和更新持久块）和高效GPU内核Persistent Block-Sparse Attention (PBSA)，实现低延迟、低内存的解码。
contributions: 提出Sparse Forcing训练-推理范式，利用注意力稀疏性提升长视频生成质量并加速解码。
设计PBSA GPU内核，实现高效的稀疏注意力和内存更新，显著降低KV缓存峰值占用。
analysis.experiments: 在文本到视频生成任务上，5秒生成VBench得分提升+0.26，解码加速1.11-1.17倍，KV缓存峰值降低42%；20秒和1分钟生成分别获得+0.68和+2.74的VBench提升，加速1.22倍和1.27倍。
limitations: 稀疏模式可能不适用于所有视频内容，需进一步验证泛化性。
当前仅针对自回归扩散模型，其他架构的适用性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且效果显著，与视频生成方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Sparse Forcing，一种用于自回归视频扩散模型的训练-推理范式，通过可训练的稀疏注意力机制提升长视频生成质量并降低解码延迟。

papers.title: Post-AGI Economies: Autonomy and the First Fundamental Theorem of Welfare Economics
papers.abstract: The First Fundamental Theorem of Welfare Economics assumes that welfare-bearing agents are autonomous and implicitly relies on a binary distinction between autonomy and instrumentality. Welfare subjects are those who have autonomy and therefore the capacity to choose and enter into utility comparisons, while everything else does not. In post-AGI economies this presupposition becomes nontrivial because artificial systems may exhibit varying degrees of autonomy, functioning as tools, delegates, strategic market actors, manipulators of choice environments, or possible welfare subjects. We argue that the theorem ought to be subject to an autonomy qualification where the impact of these changes in autonomy assumptions is incorporated. Using a minimal general-equilibrium model with autonomy-conditioned welfare, welfare-status assignment, delegation accounting, and verification institutions, we set out conditions for which autonomy-complete competitive equilibrium is autonomy-Pareto efficient. The classical theorem is recovered as the low-autonomy limit.

analysis.tldr: 探讨后AGI经济体中自主性变化对福利经济学第一基本定理的影响，提出自主性限定条件。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统福利经济学假设福利主体具有自主性，但后AGI时代人工系统可能展现不同程度的自主性，挑战了该假设的二元区分，需要重新审视定理的适用性。
analysis.problem: 如何将自主性变化纳入福利经济学第一基本定理，使其适用于包含不同自主性水平人工系统的后AGI经济体。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象或失败模式。
analysis.method: 构建一个包含自主性条件福利、福利状态分配、委托核算和验证机构的最小一般均衡模型，定义自主性完全竞争均衡并证明其自主性帕累托最优性。
contributions: 提出自主性限定条件，将自主性变化纳入福利经济学第一基本定理。
构建最小一般均衡模型，证明自主性完全竞争均衡的自主性帕累托最优性，并恢复经典定理作为低自主性极限。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 模型为最小化设定，可能忽略现实复杂性。
自主性度量与验证机制的具体实现未详细讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 理论创新性较高，但缺乏实验验证且与主流ML方向距离较远，适合理论研究者参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 探讨后AGI经济体中自主性变化对福利经济学第一基本定理的影响，提出自主性限定条件。

papers.title: A Demonstration of SQLyzr: A Platform for Fine-Grained Text-to-SQL Evaluation and Analysis
papers.abstract: Text-to-SQL models have significantly improved with the adoption of Large Language Models (LLMs), leading to their increasing use in real-world applications. Although many benchmarks exist for evaluating the performance of text-to-SQL models, they often rely on a single aggregate score, lack evaluation under realistic settings, and provide limited insight into model behaviour across different query types. In this work, we present SQLyzr, a comprehensive benchmark and evaluation platform for text-to-SQL models. SQLyzr incorporates a diverse set of evaluation metrics that capture multiple aspects of generated queries, while enabling more realistic evaluation through workload alignment with real-world SQL usage patterns and database scaling. It further supports fine-grained query classification, error analysis, and workload augmentation, allowing users to better diagnose and improve text-to-SQL models. This demonstration showcases these capabilities through an interactive experience. Through SQLyzr's graphical interface, users can customize evaluation settings, analyze fine-grained reports, and explore additional features of the platform. We envision that SQLyzr facilitates the evaluation and iterative improvement of text-to-SQL models by addressing key limitations of existing benchmarks. The source code of SQLyzr is available at https://github.com/sepideh-abedini/SQLyzr.

analysis.tldr: SQLyzr是一个细粒度Text-to-SQL评估平台，支持多样化指标、真实场景对齐和错误分析。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Text-to-SQL基准依赖单一聚合分数，缺乏真实场景评估，且对模型在不同查询类型上的行为洞察有限。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个支持细粒度、真实场景的Text-to-SQL评估平台，以更好地诊断和改进模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SQLyzr平台整合了多样化评估指标、工作负载对齐（真实SQL使用模式）、数据库缩放、细粒度查询分类、错误分析和工作负载增强。
contributions: 提出SQLyzr，一个综合的Text-to-SQL评估平台，支持细粒度分析和真实场景评估。
开源平台代码，便于社区使用和扩展。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集或SQL方言，泛化性需验证。
平台功能丰富但用户学习成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 平台设计有实际价值，但摘要未提供实验验证，创新性和影响力中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SQLyzr是一个细粒度Text-to-SQL评估平台，支持多样化指标、真实场景对齐和错误分析。

papers.title: Align Generative Artificial Intelligence with Human Preferences: A Novel Large Language Model Fine-Tuning Method for Online Review Management
papers.abstract: Online reviews have played a pivotal role in consumers' decision-making processes. Existing research has highlighted the significant impact of managerial review responses on customer relationship management and firm performance. However, a large portion of online reviews remains unaddressed due to the considerable human labor required to respond to the rapid growth of online reviews. While generative AI has achieved remarkable success in a range of tasks, they are general-purpose models and may not align well with domain-specific human preferences. To tailor these general generative AI models to domain-specific applications, finetuning is commonly employed. Nevertheless, several challenges persist in finetuning with domain-specific data, including hallucinations, difficulty in representing domain-specific human preferences, and over conservatism in offline policy optimization. To address these challenges, we propose a novel preference finetuning method to align an LLM with domain-specific human preferences for generating online review responses. Specifically, we first identify the source of hallucination and propose an effective context augmentation approach to mitigate the LLM hallucination. To represent human preferences, we propose a novel theory-driven preference finetuning approach that automatically constructs human preference pairs in the online review domain. Additionally, we propose a curriculum learning approach to further enhance preference finetuning. To overcome the challenge of over conservatism in existing offline preference finetuning method, we propose a novel density estimation-based support constraint method to relax the conservatism, and we mathematically prove its superior theoretical guarantees. Extensive evaluations substantiate the superiority of our proposed preference finetuning method.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合上下文增强、理论驱动偏好构建和课程学习的偏好微调方法，用于将LLM与在线评论管理中的领域特定人类偏好对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线评论数量激增，人工回复成本高，而通用生成AI模型难以匹配领域特定的人类偏好，现有微调方法存在幻觉、偏好表示困难和过度保守等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何有效微调LLM以生成符合在线评论管理领域人类偏好的回复，同时解决幻觉、偏好表示和过度保守性挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出通用生成AI模型在领域应用中存在幻觉、难以表示领域特定人类偏好以及离线策略优化中的过度保守性。
analysis.method: 提出一种偏好微调方法，包括：上下文增强缓解幻觉、理论驱动的偏好对自动构建、课程学习增强微调，以及基于密度估计的支持约束方法缓解过度保守性。
contributions: 提出上下文增强方法缓解LLM幻觉
提出理论驱动的偏好微调方法自动构建人类偏好对
提出课程学习增强偏好微调
提出密度估计支持约束方法缓解过度保守性并给出理论保证
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法在在线评论领域验证，泛化性未知
理论驱动的偏好构建可能依赖领域知识
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强，有理论证明，但实验细节缺失，应用场景较窄。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合上下文增强、理论驱动偏好构建和课程学习的偏好微调方法，用于将LLM与在线评论管理中的领域特定人类偏好对齐。

papers.title: IntrAgent: An LLM Agent for Content-Grounded Information Retrieval through Literature Review
papers.abstract: Scientific research relies on accurate information retrieval from literature to support analytical decisions. In this work, we introduce a new task, INformation reTRieval through literAture reVIEW (IntraView), which aims to automate fine-grained information retrieval faithfully grounded in the provided content in response to research-driven queries, and propose IntrAgent, an LLM-based agent that addresses this challenging task. In particular, IntrAgent is designed to mimic human behaviors when reading literature for information retrieval -- identifying relevant sections and then iteratively extracting key details to refine the retrieved information. It follows a two-stage pipeline: a Section Ranking stage that prioritizes relevant literature sections through structural-knowledge-enabled reasoning, and an Iterative Reading stage that continuously extracts details and synthesizes them into concise, contextually grounded answers. To support rigorous evaluation, we introduce IntraBench, a new benchmark consisting of 315 test instances built from expert-authored questions paired with literature spanning five STEM domains. Across seven backbone LLMs, IntrAgent achieves on average 13.2% higher cross-domain accuracy than state-of-the-art RAG and research-agent baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出IntrAgent，一个模拟人类阅读行为的LLM Agent，通过两阶段流水线实现文献中细粒度、内容忠实的信息检索，在跨领域基准上平均准确率提升13.2%。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学研究依赖从文献中准确检索信息以支持分析决策，但现有方法（如RAG）在细粒度、内容忠实的信息提取上存在不足，缺乏模拟人类阅读行为的自动化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何实现文献中细粒度、内容忠实的信息检索，以响应研究驱动的查询。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: IntrAgent采用两阶段流水线：1) Section Ranking阶段，通过结构知识推理优先排序相关文献章节；2) Iterative Reading阶段，迭代提取细节并综合成简洁、上下文忠实的答案。
contributions: 提出了IntraView任务，即通过文献综述进行内容忠实的信息检索。
设计了IntrAgent，一个模拟人类阅读行为的LLM Agent。
构建了IntraBench基准，包含315个测试实例，覆盖五个STEM领域。
实验表明IntrAgent在跨领域准确率上平均比SOTA RAG和研究Agent基线高13.2%。
analysis.experiments: 在IntraBench基准上，使用七个骨干LLM进行实验，IntrAgent平均跨领域准确率比SOTA RAG和研究Agent基线高13.2%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的结构化文献数据。
迭代阅读阶段可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新（模拟人类阅读行为）且实验效果显著，但技术细节有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出IntrAgent，一个模拟人类阅读行为的LLM Agent，通过两阶段流水线实现文献中细粒度、内容忠实的信息检索，在跨领域基准上平均准确率提升13.2%。

papers.title: On Reasoning Behind Next Occupation Recommendation
papers.abstract: In this work, we develop a novel reasoning approach to enhance the performance of large language models (LLMs) in future occupation prediction. In this approach, a reason generator first derives a ``reason'' for a user using his/her past education and career history. The reason summarizes the user's preference and is used as the input of an occupation predictor to recommend the user's next occupation. This two-step occupation prediction approach is, however, non-trivial as LLMs are not aligned with career paths or the unobserved reasons behind each occupation decision. We therefore propose to fine-tune LLMs improving their reasoning and occupation prediction performance. We first derive high-quality oracle reasons, as measured by factuality, coherence and utility criteria, using a LLM-as-a-Judge. These oracle reasons are then used to fine-tune small LLMs to perform reason generation and next occupation prediction. Our extensive experiments show that: (a) our approach effectively enhances LLM's accuracy in next occupation prediction making them comparable to fully supervised methods and outperforming unsupervised methods; (b) a single LLM fine-tuned to perform reason generation and occupation prediction outperforms two LLMs fine-tuned to perform the tasks separately; and (c) the next occupation prediction accuracy depends on the quality of generated reasons. Our code is available at https://github.com/Sarasarahhhhh/job_prediction.

analysis.tldr: 通过微调LLM生成职业偏好理由，提升下一职业推荐准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM在职业路径预测上缺乏对齐，且未考虑职业决策背后的隐性理由，导致推荐性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM生成高质量理由来提升下一职业预测的准确性和可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段方法：先用LLM-as-a-Judge生成高质量oracle理由（基于事实性、连贯性和效用），再用这些理由微调小型LLM，使其同时进行理由生成和职业预测。
contributions: 提出一种基于理由生成的LLM微调方法，提升下一职业预测性能。
实验证明联合微调（理由生成+预测）优于分开微调，且预测精度依赖于理由质量。
analysis.experiments: 在职业预测数据集上进行了实验，与全监督和无监督方法对比，显示所提方法达到全监督水平并超越无监督方法。
limitations: 依赖LLM-as-a-Judge生成oracle理由，可能引入偏差。
仅针对职业预测领域，泛化性未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但应用场景较窄，实验规模有限，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过微调LLM生成职业偏好理由，提升下一职业推荐准确率。

papers.title: ARFBench: Benchmarking Time Series Question Answering Ability for Software Incident Response
papers.abstract: Time series question-answering (TSQA), in which we ask natural language questions to infer and reason about properties of time series, is a promising yet underexplored capability of foundation models. In this work, we present ARFBench, a TSQA benchmark that evaluates the understanding of multimodal foundation models (FMs) on time series anomalies prevalent in software incident data. ARFBench consists of 750 questions across 142 time series and 5.38M data points from 63 production incidents sourced exclusively from internal telemetry at Datadog. We evaluate leading proprietary and open-source LLMs, VLMs, and time series FMs and observe that frontier VLMs perform markedly better than existing baselines; the leading model (GPT-5) achieves a 62.7% accuracy and 51.9% F1. We next demonstrate the promise of specialized multimodal approaches. We develop a novel TSFM + VLM hybrid prototype which we post-train on a small set of synthetic and real data that yields comparable overall F1 and accuracy with frontier models. Lastly, we find models and human domain experts exhibit complementary strengths. We define a model-expert oracle, a best-of-2 oracle selector over model and expert answers, yielding 82.8% F1 and 87.2% accuracy and establishing a new superhuman frontier for future TSQA models. The benchmark is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/Datadog/ARFBench.

analysis.tldr: 提出ARFBench基准，评估多模态基础模型在软件事件时间序列问答上的能力，发现前沿VLM表现最佳，混合模型有潜力，人机互补可超越人类。
analysis.research_motivation: 时间序列问答（TSQA）是基础模型有前景但未被充分探索的能力，现有基准缺乏对软件事件数据中时间序列异常的理解评估。
analysis.problem: 缺乏针对软件事件时间序列异常的多模态基础模型TSQA评估基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 前沿VLM（如GPT-5）显著优于现有基线；TSFM+VLM混合模型经少量训练后性能接近前沿模型；模型与人类专家优势互补。
analysis.method: 构建包含750个问题、142个时间序列、来自63个生产事件的基准ARFBench；提出TSFM+VLM混合原型，在合成和真实数据上后训练。
contributions: 提出ARFBench，首个针对软件事件时间序列异常的多模态TSQA基准
系统评估多种前沿模型，发现VLM表现最佳
提出TSFM+VLM混合模型，展示专用多模态方法的潜力
定义模型-专家oracle，证明人机互补可超越人类
analysis.experiments: 评估了多种专有和开源LLM、VLM及时间序列FM，GPT-5准确率62.7%、F1 51.9%；混合模型性能接近；模型-专家oracle达F1 82.8%、准确率87.2%。
limitations: 基准数据仅来自Datadog内部遥测，可能不具广泛代表性
混合模型仅在小规模数据上后训练，泛化性待验证
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 新颖的TSQA基准，实验充分，人机互补结果有启发性，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ARFBench基准，评估多模态基础模型在软件事件时间序列问答上的能力，发现前沿VLM表现最佳，混合模型有潜力，人机互补可超越人类。

papers.title: A Probabilistic Framework for Improving Dense Object Detection in Underwater Image Data via Annealing-Based Data Augmentation
papers.abstract: Object detection models typically perform well on images captured in controlled environments with stable lighting, water clarity, and viewpoint, but their performance degrades substantially in real-world underwater settings characterized by high variability and frequent occlusions. In this work, we address these challenges by introducing a novel data augmentation framework designed to improve robustness in dense and unconstrained underwater scenes. Using the DeepFish dataset, which contains images of fish in natural environments, we first generate bounding box annotations from provided segmentation masks to construct a custom detection dataset. We then propose a pseudo-simulated annealing-based augmentation algorithm, inspired by the copy-paste strategy of Deng et al. [1], to synthesize realistic crowded fish scenarios. Our approach improves spatial diversity and object density during training, enabling better generalization to complex scenes. Experimental results show that our method significantly outperforms a baseline YOLOv10 model, particularly on a challenging test set of manually annotated images collected from live-stream footage in the Florida Keys. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of our augmentation strategy for improving detection performance in dense, real-world underwater environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于退火的数据增强框架，提升水下密集目标检测的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 水下环境光照、清晰度变化大且遮挡频繁，现有目标检测模型在真实水下场景中性能严重下降，需要提升模型对密集和复杂场景的泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何通过数据增强提高水下密集目标检测模型在高度可变和遮挡场景中的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于伪模拟退火的复制-粘贴数据增强算法，从分割掩码生成边界框标注，合成逼真的拥挤鱼群场景，增加训练数据的空间多样性和目标密度。
contributions: 提出一种伪模拟退火增强算法，用于合成密集水下场景。
在DeepFish数据集上构建检测数据集，并在真实直播视频测试集上验证了方法有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在DeepFish数据集和佛罗里达礁岛群直播视频手动标注的挑战性测试集上，方法显著优于基线YOLOv10模型。
limitations: 仅针对鱼类检测，可能不适用于其他水下目标。
依赖分割掩码生成标注，标注获取成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但应用场景较窄，实验规模有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于退火的数据增强框架，提升水下密集目标检测的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Trust but Verify: Introducing DAVinCI -- A Framework for Dual Attribution and Verification in Claim Inference for Language Models
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable fluency and versatility across a wide range of NLP tasks, yet they remain prone to factual inaccuracies and hallucinations. This limitation poses significant risks in high-stakes domains such as healthcare, law, and scientific communication, where trust and verifiability are paramount. In this paper, we introduce DAVinCI - a Dual Attribution and Verification framework designed to enhance the factual reliability and interpretability of LLM outputs. DAVinCI operates in two stages: (i) it attributes generated claims to internal model components and external sources; (ii) it verifies each claim using entailment-based reasoning and confidence calibration. We evaluate DAVinCI across multiple datasets, including FEVER and CLIMATE-FEVER, and compare its performance against standard verification-only baselines. Our results show that DAVinCI significantly improves classification accuracy, attribution precision, recall, and F1-score by 5-20%. Through an extensive ablation study, we isolate the contributions of evidence span selection, recalibration thresholds, and retrieval quality. We also release a modular DAVinCI implementation that can be integrated into existing LLM pipelines. By bridging attribution and verification, DAVinCI offers a scalable path to auditable, trustworthy AI systems. This work contributes to the growing effort to make LLMs not only powerful but also accountable.

analysis.tldr: DAVinCI框架通过归因与验证双阶段提升LLM输出的事实可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM虽流畅但易产生事实错误和幻觉，在医疗、法律等高风险领域缺乏可信度，现有方法仅做验证而未结合归因。
analysis.problem: 如何同时实现LLM生成声明的归因（来源追溯）与验证（事实核查），以提高输出的准确性和可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段将生成声明归因于内部模型组件和外部来源；第二阶段基于蕴含推理和置信度校准验证每个声明。
contributions: 提出DAVinCI框架，融合归因与验证以增强LLM事实可靠性
在FEVER和CLIMATE-FEVER上分类准确率、归因精确率/召回率/F1提升5-20%
消融实验分离证据跨度选择、重校准阈值和检索质量的贡献
发布模块化实现，可集成到现有LLM流水线
analysis.experiments: 在FEVER和CLIMATE-FEVER数据集上评估，与标准仅验证基线对比，分类准确率、归因精确率/召回率/F1提升5-20%，并进行了消融实验。
limitations: 可能依赖外部检索质量
归因内部组件的可解释性可能有限
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新（归因+验证）且实验提升显著，与幻觉/事实性方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DAVinCI框架通过归因与验证双阶段提升LLM输出的事实可靠性。

papers.title: How VLAs (Really) Work In Open-World Environments
papers.abstract: Vision-language-action models (VLAs) have been extensively used in robotics applications, achieving great success in various manipulation problems. More recently, VLAs have been used in long-horizon tasks and evaluated on benchmarks, such as BEHAVIOR1K (B1K), for solving complex household chores. The common metric for measuring progress in such benchmarks is success rate or partial score based on satisfaction of progress-agnostic criteria, meaning only the final states of the objects are considered, regardless of the events that lead to such states. In this paper, we argue that using such evaluation protocols say little about safety aspects of operation and can potentially exaggerate reported performance, undermining core challenges for future real-world deployment. To this end, we conduct a thorough analysis of state-of-the-art models on the B1K Challenge and evaluate policies in terms of robustness via reproducibility and consistency of performance, safety aspects of policies operations, task awareness, and key elements leading to the incompletion of tasks. We then propose evaluation protocols to capture safety violations to better measure the true performance of the policies in more complex and interactive scenarios. At the end, we discuss the limitations of the existing VLAs and motivate future research.

analysis.tldr: VLAs在开放世界中的表现被高估，现有评估指标忽略安全性和过程质量，本文提出新协议以揭示真实性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLA评估仅关注最终状态成功率，忽略操作安全性和过程一致性，导致性能被夸大，阻碍真实世界部署。
analysis.problem: 如何设计评估协议以准确衡量VLA在开放世界中的鲁棒性、安全性和任务意识。

papers.title: SpatiO: Adaptive Test-Time Orchestration of Vision-Language Agents for Spatial Reasoning
papers.abstract: Understanding visual scenes requires not only recognizing objects but also reasoning about their spatial relationships. Unlike general vision-language tasks, spatial reasoning requires integrating multiple inductive biases, such as 2D appearance cues, depth signals, and geometric constraints, whose reliability varies across contexts. This suggests that effective spatial reasoning requires \emph{spatial adaptability}: the ability to flexibly coordinate different reasoning strategies depending on the input. However, most existing approaches rely on a single reasoning pipeline that implicitly learns a fixed spatial prior, limiting their ability to adapt under distribution changes. Multi-agent systems offer a promising alternative by aggregating diverse reasoning trajectories, but prior attempts in spatial reasoning primarily employ homogeneous agents, restricting the diversity of inductive biases they can leverage. In this work, we introduce SpatiO, a heterogeneous multi-agent framework for spatial reasoning that coordinates multiple vision-language specialists with complementary inductive biases. To enable effective collaboration, we propose Test-Time Orchestration (TTO), an optimization mechanism that dynamically evaluates and reweights agents based on their observed reliability during inference, without modifying model parameters. Extensive experiments on diverse spatial reasoning benchmarks, including 3DSRBench, STVQA-7k, CV-Bench, and Omni3D-Bench, demonstrate that SpatiO consistently improves spatial reasoning performance over both closed-source and open-source baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出SpatiO，一个异构多智能体框架，通过测试时编排动态协调多个视觉-语言专家，提升空间推理的适应性。
analysis.research_motivation: 空间推理需要整合多种归纳偏置（如2D外观、深度信号、几何约束），但现有方法依赖单一推理流水线，缺乏对分布变化的适应性；多智能体系统虽能聚合多样推理轨迹，但先前工作多使用同质智能体，限制了归纳偏置的多样性。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能动态协调具有互补归纳偏置的异构视觉-语言专家，以实现对空间推理任务的自适应测试时编排。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同空间推理线索（2D外观、深度、几何约束）的可靠性随上下文变化，单一固定先验的推理流水线难以适应分布变化。
analysis.method: 提出SpatiO，一个异构多智能体框架，包含多个具有互补归纳偏置的视觉-语言专家；并设计测试时编排（TTO）机制，在推理时根据观察到的可靠性动态评估和重新加权各智能体，无需修改模型参数。
contributions: 提出SpatiO，首个用于空间推理的异构多智能体框架，协调具有互补归纳偏置的视觉-语言专家。

在多个空间推理基准上取得一致改进，超越闭源和开源基线。
analysis.experiments: 在3DSRBench、STVQA-7k、CV-Bench和Omni3D-Bench等空间推理基准上进行实验，SpatiO一致优于闭源和开源基线。
limitations: 可能依赖多个预训练视觉-语言模型，计算开销较大。

papers.title: Doubly Saturated Ramsey Graphs: A Case Study in Computer-Assisted Mathematical Discovery
papers.abstract: Ramsey-good graphs are graphs that contain neither a clique of size $s$ nor an independent set of size $t$. We study doubly saturated Ramsey-good graphs, defined as Ramsey-good graphs in which the addition or removal of any edge necessarily creates an $s$-clique or a $t$-independent set. We present a method combining SAT solving with bespoke LLM-generated code to discover infinite families of such graphs, answering a question of Grinstead and Roberts from 1982. In addition, we use LLMs to generate and formalize correctness proofs in Lean. This case study highlights the potential of integrating automated reasoning, large language models, and formal verification to accelerate mathematical discovery. We argue that such tool-driven workflows will play an increasingly central role in experimental mathematics.

analysis.tldr: 结合SAT求解与LLM生成代码发现无限族双饱和Ramsey图，并用Lean形式化证明。
analysis.research_motivation: Ramsey-good图是图论中的重要概念，但构造双饱和Ramsey-good图（边增减必破坏性质）长期未解，Grinstead和Roberts于1982年提出相关问题，传统方法难以发现无限族。

papers.title: WildSplatter: Feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting with Appearance Control from Unconstrained Images
papers.abstract: We propose WildSplatter, a feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) model for unconstrained images with unknown camera parameters and varying lighting conditions. 3DGS is an effective scene representation that enables high-quality, real-time rendering; however, it typically requires iterative optimization and multi-view images captured under consistent lighting with known camera parameters. WildSplatter is trained on unconstrained photo collections and jointly learns 3D Gaussians and appearance embeddings conditioned on input images. This design enables flexible modulation of Gaussian colors to represent significant variations in lighting and appearance. Our method reconstructs 3D Gaussians from sparse input views in under one second, while also enabling appearance control under diverse lighting conditions. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach outperforms existing pose-free 3DGS methods on challenging real-world datasets with varying illumination.

analysis.tldr: WildSplatter 是一种前馈式 3D 高斯泼溅方法，能从无约束图像中快速重建并控制外观。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 3DGS 方法通常需要已知相机参数和一致光照的多视图图像，且依赖迭代优化，限制了其在真实世界无约束场景中的应用。

papers.title: Scale-Parameter Selection in Gaussian Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks
papers.abstract: Kolmogorov--Arnold Networks (KANs) have recently attracted attention as edge-based neural architectures in which learnable univariate functions replace conventional fixed activation functions. A key source of flexibility in KANs is the choice of basis functions used to parameterize the learnable edge functions. In this context, Gaussian basis functions provide a simple and efficient alternative to splines. However, their performance depends strongly on the scale (shape) parameter \(ε\), whose role has not been studied systematically. In this paper, we investigate how \(ε\) affects Gaussian KANs through first-layer feature geometry, conditioning, and approximation behavior. Our central observation is that scale selection is governed primarily by the first layer, since it is the only layer constructed directly on the input domain and any loss of distinguishability introduced there cannot be recovered by later layers. From this viewpoint, we analyze the first-layer feature matrix and identify a practical operating interval, \[ ε\in \left[\frac{1}{G-1},\frac{2}{G-1}\right], \] where \(G\) denotes the number of Gaussian centers. We interpret this interval not as a universal optimality result, but as a stable and effective design rule, and validate it through brute-force sweeps over \(ε\) across function-approximation problems with different collocation densities, grid resolutions, network architectures, and input dimensions, as well as physics-informed problems. We further show that this range is useful for fixed-scale selection, variable-scale constructions, constrained training of \(ε\), and efficient scale search using early training MSE. In this way, the paper positions scale selection as a practical design principle for Gaussian KANs rather than as an ad hoc hyperparameter choice.

analysis.tldr: 高斯KAN网络中尺度参数ε的选择主要由第一层决定，推荐区间[1/(G-1), 2/(G-1)]作为稳定设计规则。
analysis.research_motivation: KAN网络使用可学习单变量函数替代固定激活函数，其中高斯基函数简单高效，但其尺度参数ε对性能影响显著且缺乏系统研究。
analysis.problem: 如何系统选择高斯KAN网络中的尺度参数ε，避免依赖经验调参。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 尺度选择主要由第一层决定，因为第一层直接构建在输入域上，后续层无法恢复第一层引入的区分性损失。
analysis.method: 通过分析第一层特征矩阵的几何、条件数和逼近行为，推导出ε的稳定工作区间[1/(G-1), 2/(G-1)]，并在多种函数逼近和物理信息问题中通过暴力扫描验证。

提出了ε的实用设计区间[1/(G-1), 2/(G-1)]，并验证其在不同设置下的有效性。

papers.title: TAPO-Description Logic for Information Behavior: Refined OBoxes, Inference, and Categorical Semantics
papers.abstract: This paper develops a refined version of TAPO-description logic for the analysis of information behavior. The framework is treated not as a single homogeneous object logic, but as a layered formalism consisting of a static descriptive layer (TBox/ABox), a procedural layer (PBox), and an oracle-sensitive layer (OBox). To make this architecture mathematically explicit, we introduce a metalevel guard-judgment layer governing procedural branching and iteration. On this basis we formulate a core inference system for TAPO-description logic, covering static TBox/ABox reasoning, guarded procedural transition in the PBox, and validated external import in the OBox. We then give a categorical semantics for the resulting framework and indicate its sheaf-theoretic refinement. The theory is illustrated by examples of information-seeking behavior, including simple search behavior and review-sensitive ordering behavior in a curry restaurant. The aim is to treat not only static knowledge representation but also hesitation, external consultation, and action-guiding update within a unified logical setting.

analysis.tldr: 提出TAPO描述逻辑的细化版本，通过分层形式化（TBox/ABox、PBox、OBox）和范畴语义统一建模信息行为中的静态知识、程序过程与外部咨询。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有描述逻辑难以统一处理信息行为中的静态知识、程序性决策和外部信息源依赖，缺乏形式化的分层框架和语义基础。

analysis.method: 提出TAPO描述逻辑的细化版本，包含静态层（TBox/ABox）、程序层（PBox）和oracle敏感层（OBox），引入元层守卫-判断层控制程序分支与迭代，建立核心推理系统，并给出范畴语义（层论细化）。
contributions: 提出TAPO描述逻辑的分层细化架构，明确区分静态、程序和oracle敏感层。

papers.title: Feedback Over Form: Why Execution Feedback Matters More Than Pipeline Topology in 1-3B Code Generation
papers.abstract: Small language models (1-3B) are practical to run locally, but individually limited on harder code generation tasks. We ask whether composing them into pipelines can recover some of that lost capability. We study code generation pipelines built from 1-3B models with execution feedback, and use a NEAT-inspired evolutionary search to test whether more complex pipeline structure helps beyond a simple refinement loop. We evaluate on HumanEval (164 problems) and sanitized MBPP (427 problems), all with local inference on a single laptop. Self-refinement with execution feedback improves code generation by more than 4 standard deviations on both benchmarks. The gains are narrow in mechanism: refinement fixes many runtime errors (especially NameError and SyntaxError), but rarely fixes logic errors such as AssertionError. Within our tested general-purpose model pool, generator identity mattered less than refiner capability: a 1.5B generator paired with a 3B refiner matched a 3B model doing both roles. Early stopping is essential; without it, every iteration is net-negative. The code-specialized models outperform every general-purpose pipeline configuration, suggesting model specialization matters more than pipeline architecture. Preliminary text-only pipeline experiments without execution feedback did not show gains at this scale. In our constrained search space, evolutionary search mostly rediscovered the same simple generate-execute-refine loop we found manually, with no clearly significant gain from added topology. Single-evaluation fitness inflates results by 5-7 percent, selecting lucky genomes over good ones. On these benchmarks at 1-3B scale, execution feedback mattered more than added pipeline complexity in determining whether composition helped.

analysis.tldr: 在1-3B代码生成中，执行反馈比流水线拓扑更重要，简单自精炼循环优于复杂结构。
analysis.research_motivation: 小语言模型（1-3B）在本地部署实用，但单独处理复杂代码生成任务能力有限，因此研究如何通过组合流水线来恢复部分能力。
analysis.problem: 探究在1-3B规模下，代码生成流水线的结构复杂度与执行反馈对性能的相对贡献。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自精炼显著提升性能，但主要修复运行时错误（如NameError、SyntaxError），很少修复逻辑错误（如AssertionError）；生成器身份不如精炼器能力重要；早期停止至关重要；代码专用模型优于通用流水线；无执行反馈的文本流水线无增益；进化搜索未发现复杂拓扑的显著优势；单次评估适应度会高估结果5-7%。
analysis.method: 使用NEAT启发的进化搜索探索流水线结构，并与手动设计的简单生成-执行-精炼循环对比，所有模型在单台笔记本电脑上本地推理。

发现简单自精炼循环在HumanEval和MBPP上显著优于复杂结构，执行反馈是关键
analysis.experiments: 在HumanEval（164个问题）和sanitized MBPP（427个问题）上评估，所有推理在单台笔记本电脑上本地完成。

papers.title: Reinforcing 3D Understanding in Point-VLMs via Geometric Reward Credit Assignment
papers.abstract: Point-Vision-Language Models promise to empower embodied agents with executable spatial reasoning, yet they frequently succumb to geometric hallucination where predicted 3D structures contradict the observed 2D reality. We identify a key cause of this failure not as a representation bottleneck but as a structural misalignment in reinforcement learning, where sparse geometric tokens are drowned out by noisy and broadcasted sequence-level rewards. To resolve this causal dilution, we propose Geometric Reward Credit Assignment, a framework that disentangles holistic supervision into field-specific signals and routes them exclusively to their responsible token spans. This mechanism transforms vague feedback into precise gradient updates and effectively turns generic policy optimization into targeted structural alignment. Furthermore, we internalize physical constraints via a Reprojection-Consistency term which serves as a cross-modal verifier to penalize physically impossible geometries. Validated on a calibrated benchmark derived from ShapeNetCore, our approach bridges the reliability gap by boosting 3D KPA from 0.64 to 0.93, increasing 3D bounding box intersection over union to 0.686, and raising reprojection consistency scores to 0.852. Crucially, these gains are achieved while maintaining robust 2D localization performance, marking a meaningful step from plausible textual outputs toward physically verifiable spatial predictions.

analysis.tldr: 通过几何奖励信用分配和重投影一致性约束，显著提升点云-视觉-语言模型的3D理解能力，减少几何幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: 点云-视觉-语言模型在空间推理中常出现几何幻觉，即预测的3D结构与2D观察矛盾，限制了其在具身智能中的可靠性。
analysis.problem: 现有强化学习训练中，稀疏的几何令牌被噪声和广播式的序列级奖励淹没，导致结构对齐失败。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出几何幻觉的根源不是表征瓶颈，而是强化学习中结构性的奖励分配错位：稀疏几何令牌被序列级奖励稀释。
analysis.method: 提出几何奖励信用分配框架，将整体奖励分解为场特定信号并路由到对应令牌跨度；同时引入重投影一致性项作为跨模态验证器，惩罚物理上不可能的几何结构。
contributions: 识别了点云-视觉-语言模型中几何幻觉的因果稀释问题，并提出几何奖励信用分配方法。
引入重投影一致性约束，将物理约束内化到训练中。
在ShapeNetCore基准上显著提升3D关键点准确率、3D边界框IoU和重投影一致性分数，同时保持2D定位性能。
analysis.experiments: 在基于ShapeNetCore校准的基准上验证，3D KPA从0.64提升至0.93，3D边界框IoU达0.686，重投影一致性分数达0.852。
limitations: 仅在合成数据集ShapeNetCore上验证，真实场景泛化性未知。
方法依赖点云和2D图像的精确对齐，可能受传感器噪声影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验效果显著，与VLM/3D理解方向高度相关，值得精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过几何奖励信用分配和重投影一致性约束，显著提升点云-视觉-语言模型的3D理解能力，减少几何幻觉。
